title: Full-Time General Virtual Assistant (30–40+ hrs/week)
description:
Hello!



We’re looking to hire 2–3 full-time Virtual Assistants to join our dynamic, positive team of 8 VAs. You’ll be working directly with our amazing clients: speakers, authors, and coaches based in Canada, the US, and Europe, on a variety of tasks including admin support, social media, content creation, and more.



We have another job posting for those who have video editing experience. Here's the link: https://www.onlinejobs.ph/jobseekers/job/FullTime-Virtual-Assistant-with-YouTube-Video-Creation-Experience-3040-hrsweek
Please do not apply if:



 • You’ve already applied to one of our current job postings (choose the one that fits you best)

 • You’ve applied for a role with us before



About the Role:

You’ll be contracted under our company and work directly to support 2–4 clients at a time, building to a max of 40-50 hours a week. 



Tasks may include:

 • Admin procedures and documentation

 • General admin and inbox support

 • Social media content creation and scheduling

 • CRM management 
 campaigns, automation)

 • Video/audio editing

 • Newsletter and blog prep

 • Course and book formatting

 • Website updates

 • Podcast publishing

 • Research and misc. Tasks



What We’re Looking For 



REQUIREMENTS:

 • Proven experience as a VA (please don’t apply if you're brand new)

 • Availability for 30–40 hours/week with no competing job or student commitments

 • Experience supporting international (English-speaking) clients

 • Able to manage multiple clients simultaneously



SKILLS:

 • Strong written communication in English (you’ll need spoken English as well to communicate with us and your clients)

 • Familiarity with social media platforms

 • Familiarity with Google Suite + MS Office

, chat, and time management

title: AI Engineer (LangGraph / API Integration – 2-Week Project)
description:
Remote | Milestone-Based | Immediate Start | Potential for Ongoing Projects



About the Project



We’re developing an advanced AI-driven workflow system that connects multiple intelligent agents to generate personalized, real-world recommendations.



You’ll build the LangGraph-powered orchestration layer — integrating live data from real APIs and producing structured, dynamic outputs that can power real user experiences.



If you love solving complex problems, working with LangGraph or LangChain, and seeing your work go live fast — this project is for you.



This is a 2-week milestone-based sprint with strong potential for continued collaboration after successful delivery.



Responsibilities

- Build and implement a LangGraph-based AI workflow that generates structured outputs.

- Develop multi-agent logic.

- Integrate and normalize third-party APIs.

- Add personalization and reasoning metadata.

- Implement refinement logic (e.g., add day, adjust pace, swap activities).

- Integrate with Supabase/Postgres for data storage and retrieval.

- Ensure schema consistency, API reliability, and fast generation speed



Tech Stack

LangGraph (preferred) or LangChain

OpenAI GPT-4/5 or equivalent

Node.js / Python for orchestration logic

REST / GraphQL API Integration

Supabase / Postgres (preferred for persistence)

JSON Schema / Structured Outputs



Deliverables (within 2 weeks)

- Functional LangGraph workflow (survey ? discovery ? structured output).

- Multi-agent logic with live API data integration.

- Structured JSON output with reasoning fields.

- Refinement engine for dynamic updates.

- API endpoint or callable function for frontend integration.



Compensation

- Milestone-based payments tied to deliverables

- Competitive project-based rate

- Potential for future work after successful completion



To Apply



Please include:



-Experience & Samples



 -- GitHub or repo with LangGraph / LangChain work



 -- Example of a structured JSON output (from an AI workflow)



 -- Short description (3–5 sentences) of a similar AI project you’ve built



 -- Any links or screenshots of live or production projects (if available)



Optional (Nice to Have)



-- Short Loom video (2–3 min) explaining a past AI project or workflow



Rate & Availability

-- Your project rate (total) for this 2-week engagement

-- Confirmation of full-time availability for the project period

title: Virtual Assistant (Content, Business Admin, Life Support)
description:
Virtual Assistant (Part-Time) | Content + Marketing + Life Support



We’re a husband-and-wife team building a growing online business, building online presence, and looking for a highly organized, proactive Virtual Assistant to help us stay consistent, execute faster, and build 
ntum.



This role is content-first (your main focus), with some light admin and life organization support. You will have full access to AI tools to help you with your work.



***  Primary Focus: Content & Marketing Execution (MOST IMPORTANT)

You will help us go from “ideas everywhere” ? “consistent execution every week.”

Core Responsibilities

Plan and maintain a weekly content calendar

Organize ideas from notes, chats, and brainstorms into a clear system

Draft and schedule social media posts (LinkedIn + short-form content)

Repurpose content across platforms (posts ? captions ? ideas)

Research trends, topics, and viral content

Help ensure we are posting consistently (this is key)







***  Secondary: Content Curation (Reaction-Style Videos)

Find viral/trending videos to react to

Organize clips into a structured content queue

Suggest hooks, captions, and angles

Assist with posting and basic engagement



***  Business Support (Light)

Research tools, freelancers, or resources (ads, website, etc.)

Help us find and vet talent when needed

Organize information into simple, actionable summaries





***  Personal / Family Support (Light)

Help manage calendar and scheduling

Research activities, services, or trips

Assist with bookings, reminders, and simple life admin







***  What We’re Looking For

Extremely organized (you create structure where there is none)

Proactive (you don’t wait to be told what to do)

Strong research + problem-solving skills

Familiar with social media + content workflows

Familiar with AI tools

Clear and professional communicator

Comfortable with tools like ChatGPT, Google Docs, Sheets, etc.

Family oriented





***  Bonus skills:

Experience with content creation, captions, or short-form video

Experience working with entrepreneurs or startups







***  Hours & Pay

Part-time: 10–20 hours/week (to start)

Flexible schedule

Remote

Opportunity to grow into a larger role over time







***  Why This Role is Different

You’re not just doing random tasks.

You’re helping:

- Build a real business

- Create content that reaches thousands of people

- Bring structure to a fast-moving family + business life







***  How to Apply (IMPORTANT)

To be considered, follow these steps exactly:

title: Operations & Support Assistant
description:
Overview:



We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support daily operations across a portfolio of online businesses and property-related activities.



This role involves a mix of customer support, administrative coordination, outreach, and content review.



You will be responsible for handling tasks independently using structured systems and clear processes.



This is an operations and support role and does not involve advanced technical work, project management, or aggressive sales.





Working Hours:



- Monday to Friday

- 2:00 PM – 6:00 PM (Philippines Time)

- Fixed schedule





Responsibilities:



- Monitor and respond to customer enquiries via
 and messaging platforms

- Assist customers with placing orders and resolving common issues

- Monitor shared inboxes and respond to tenant or guest enquiries

- Coordinate maintenance requests with contractors

- Maintain organised records and track ongoing tasks



- Review support requests and platform activity

- Monitor listings or submissions for quality

- Flag suspicious or low-quality content



- Review blog content for quality and readability

- Improve SEO scores using provided tools

- Add internal links and ensure formatting consistency



- Perform structured outreach using provided scripts

- Contact businesses via social platforms

- Log outreach activity and responses





Requirements:



- Strong written English communication

- Experience in customer support or administrative roles

- High attention to detail

- Ability to follow processes and instructions accurately

- Comfortable working across multiple task types

- Able to work independently without constant supervision

- Reliable internet connection and own equipment





Bonus Skills:



- WordPress or CMS experience

- Basic SEO knowledge

- Social media outreach experience

- Marketplace or e-commerce support experience





Performance Expectations:



- Respond to customer messages within 2–4 hours during shift

- Complete assigned tasks daily with clear updates

- Outreach activity of 20–50 contacts per day (depending on task)

- Maintain accuracy and consistency across all work





Task Priority Order:



1. Customer support

2. Property or time-sensitive issues

3. Active conversations

4. Outreach tasks

5. Content updates





What This Role Is NOT:



- No project management

- No advanced technical work

- No system development or engineering

- No cold calling or aggressive sales

- No phone support (initially chat/email based)





Notes:



- Paid trial period (1–2 weeks)

- Performance review after probation

- Long-term role with growth opportunities

title: UK Property Manager
description:
Hours: Part-time, 20 hours per week

Working Hours: UK time 9:00am to 11:00am and 1:00pm to 3:00pm, Monday to Friday

Philippine time: 4:00pm to 6:00pm and 8:00pm to 10:00pm, Monday to Friday

Starting Salary: Starting at £450/month (approximately PHP 33,000/month), will raise with performance.

Probation: 3 months

Growth: Open to full-time for the right candidate over time



Who We Are



We are a self-managing UK property investor based in the North of England with a portfolio of approximately 20 residential properties including student lets, an HMO, and serviced accommodation. We manage everything directly without a lettings agency, which means this role genuinely matters.



We work at a fast pace, we communicate directly, and we expect the same in return. You will have real responsibility from day one and direct access to the portfolio owner. If you are looking for a role where you can grow your UK property knowledge, take ownership of a real portfolio, and be recognised for doing things properly, this is worth reading on.



The Role



This is a hands-on virtual property management position. You will manage the day-to-day operations of the portfolio including tenant communication, rent collection, maintenance coordination, compliance tracking, and property administration.



You are not here to simply pass messages along. You are here to manage, follow up, and keep things moving. Attention to detail is critical in this role. Errors in rent accounts, compliance records, or tenant correspondence have real consequences and we take accuracy seriously.



What You Will Do



Tenant Communication

First point of contact for all tenants via
, phone, SMS, and WhatsApp

Manage a dedicated WhatsApp group for each property

Handle enquiries, complaints, and day-to-day requests professionally and promptly

Coordinate tenant onboarding, check-ins, and move-outs

Manage the summer student changeover across multiple properties including check-outs, cleaning coordination, repairs, and new tenant check-ins

Support tenancy renewals and end-of-tenancy processes



Rent Collection and Arrears

Monitor all rent payments using Xero

Send proactive reminders ahead of due dates

Chase arrears promptly and escalate where necessary

Maintain an accurate live rent tracker at all times



Maintenance Coordination

Log and triage all maintenance requests from tenants

Coordinate with existing trusted tradespeople and source new contractors where needed

Obtain quotes, get approval, instruct works, and follow up to completion

Maintain a clear maintenance log for every property



Property Administration

Manage listings on OpenRent and other platforms

Keep digital files organised for every property including tenancy agreements, compliance certificates, and correspondence

Track compliance deadlines across the portfolio including gas safety, EPC, electrical certificates, and licensing requirements

Manage council tax, utility accounts, and direct debits carefully and accurately

Prepare regular portfolio update reports



Communication and Meetings

Manage the property
 inbox with care, responding accurately and escalating where appropriate

Draft professional correspondence to tenants, councils, contractors, and platforms

Attend scheduled check-in calls on time and prepared



What We Need From You



Essential

Minimum 2 years of verifiable hands-on experience in UK property management or UK residential lettings

References from a UK property employer that we can and will contact

Solid working knowledge of UK tenancy processes including ASTs, deposit protection, rent arrears, and property licensing

Excellent written English and very strong attention to detail

Highly organised and able to manage multiple properties and open tasks without losing track

Proactive by nature — you flag issues early, you follow up without being chased, and you take ownership

Comfortable communicating with UK tenants, contractors, and councils

Proficient in Microsoft Office, Google Suite, and Xero

Stable internet and a reliable home working setup



Strongly Preferred

UK lettings or property qualification such as ARLA Propertymark or NFOPP Technical Award

HMO management experience

Experience with student tenants and seasonal changeovers

Familiarity with OpenRent or similar UK platforms

Degree in Business, Property Management, Real Estate, or related field



Your application needs to include

• Your CV

• A cover letter in your own words. Tell us specifically what types of UK properties you managed, what types of tenants you worked with, and what tools and systems you used. Generic cover letters will not be considered.

• At least one verifiable reference from a UK property employer, including their name, company, and contact details

• Your written answer to this question in no more than 150 words: "A tenant has not paid rent for 14 days past the due date and is not responding to messages. Walk us through exactly what you would do, step by step."



Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



Shortlisted candidates will complete a short practical skills test and interview.

Cross-Team Coordination

s, newsletters, blog posts, and internal memos.

Travel and Event Coordination

title: Growth and Sales Manager
description:
About You 

You want to be part of something with massive potential, there from the ground floor. 

You thrive in environments where the expectations are high, the goal is challenging, the mission is clear, and the team supports each other to get better every day. 

You’re looking for a role with real responsibility, where you feel ownership over what you build. 

You are excited by working directly with a successful entrepreneur who invests in you. 

You want to build something that supports others through stable, dignified, growth-oriented jobs. 

You are a natural closer with a strategist’s mind — equally energized by understanding what makes people say “yes” and building the repeatable systems that turn those yeses into scale. 



Role Overview 

The Growth & Sales Manager is the engine behind Moonlight’s client acquisition strategy. As the Growth & Sales Manager you have a deep instinct for what drives people to say “yes” and the systems-thinking discipline to scale that into a repeatable process. You have a creative and entrepreneurial mind. You are adept at all lead gen tactics — whether it’s cold
, partnerships, webinars, LinkedIn plays, or unconventional outreach strategies. You will work closely with our Digital Marketer to bridge brand and performance — ensuring that outbound efforts are aligned with the broader marketing strategy and that Moonlight is continually being introduced to new audiences in compelling ways. 

Equal parts closer and strategist, this role is responsible for building, refining, and executing our entire outbound and inbound sales funnel — from lead generation through to conversion, onboarding, and renewal. This person is relentlessly outcome-driven, deeply persuasive, and thrives in a fast-paced, early-stage environment where growth is the mandate.



Qualifications 

? 5-7+ years of experience in a sales, growth, or business development role, ideally in a fast-paced startup or service-based business 

? Proven track record of exceeding sales targets and closing high-value clients through outbound channels 

? Deep understanding of sales psychology, lead qualification, and consultative selling 

? Experience designing or optimizing a high-converting sales funnel — from cold outreach to contract 

? Strong proficiency with CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Pipedrive) and sales automation tools ? Excellent verbal and written communication skills — persuasive, clear, and human 

? Highly analytical and data-driven with the ability to identify drop-off points and improve conversion rates 

 Creative thinker who enjoys testing and iterating on outreach strategies, messaging, and formats

? Comfortable collaborating with marketers, operators, and leadership to align growth across functions 

? Thrives in a lean, early-stage environment with high autonomy and a bias toward action 

? Excellent project management and organizational abilities; adept at balancing multiple priorities under tight timelines. 

? Comfort and skill in working remotely with distributed, multicultural teams 

Compensation, Growth, and Benefits 

? Competitive compensation commensurate with experience 

? Opportunity for performance-based bonuses as the company grows 

? Direct mentorship from the founder and CEO 

? 21 days of paid time off 

? Health benefits (in progress) 

? Philippines 13th month end of year bonus 



Apply here:

title: WordPress & LearnDash Content Assistant
description:
I run an online education platform built on WordPress and am looking for a detail-oriented assistant to help upload and manage quiz content, maintain the site, and make page edits.



This role involves working with structured content (Word documents and Excel spreadsheets) and ensuring accuracy when importing quizzes into the platform. It is not a creative role — it is accuracy-focused. You will be working with large volumes of structured educational content, so precision and consistency are essential.

Key Responsibilities:



Import quizzes into LearnDash from Excel/XLSX files

Compare uploaded questions against original Word documents to ensure accuracy

Fix formatting issues (text, images, equations, HTML)

Insert and align images correctly within quizzes

Apply quiz categories and tags correctly

Identify and fix errors (missing answers, incorrect formatting, broken layouts)

Make page edits and updates in Elementor (text changes, layout adjustments, creating new pages from templates)

Make small updates in the WordPress admin where required



Requirements:



Strong attention to detail (this is critical)

Comfortable working with Excel/Google Sheets

Experience with WordPress admin (not just front-end — you need to be comfortable navigating the backend)

Experience with Elementor page builder (creating and editing pages, not just minor text swaps)

Able to follow structured instructions carefully

Good English reading comprehension (the content is aimed at Australian students aged 11–14)

Reliable internet and availability for at least 2–3 hours per day



Nice to Have (not required):



Experience with LearnDash or any WordPress LMS plugin

Experience with FluentCRM or other WordPress
/CRM plugins

Basic HTML understanding (line breaks, image alignment, formatting)

Any familiarity with landing page structure or conversion-focused page design



Important: This role is not about being creative — it is accuracy-focused. You will be working with large volumes of structured content, so precision and consistency are essential.



Trial Task: Shortlisted candidates will be given a small paid task involving reviewing a quiz import, fixing formatting issues, and comparing against a source document.



Please include in your application:



Your experience with Excel or data entry work

Any experience with WordPress / LearnDash / Elementor

Why you think you are a good fit for a detail-focused role

Confirm you have read this listing and are comfortable with the $5 USD/hour rate

title: YouTube Researcher
description:
Research & Content Curator – Trend & Evergreen Video Specialist



About the Role:



We are seeking a highly analytical and creatively driven Researcher to join our team and spearhead a crucial initiative: identifying and cultivating profitable, trending, and enduring video niches on YouTube. 



This role isn’t just about finding popular content – it’s about understanding why these niches resonate with audiences and building a strategy to ensure long-term success. 



You’ll be the driving force behind discovering and validating promising video ideas, and ultimately, contributing to a steady stream of engaging content. You’ll be a strategic thinker, deeply familiar with YouTube analytics, and possess a keen eye for emerging trends.



Responsibilities:



Trend Identification: Research and analyze YouTube trends across various niches – identifying emerging topics, popular sounds, formats, and underserved areas. 



This includes leveraging YouTube Trends, Google Trends, and dedicated trend tracking tools.



Niche Validation: Rigorously assess the viability of potential niches using YouTube analytics, audience engagement data, and creator assessment. Validate these ideas with demonstrable audience interest and monetization potential.



Channel Analysis & Evaluation: Deep dive into 5-10 established YouTube channels that exemplify the successful combination of trending content, evergreen appeal, and good audience engagement. This includes understanding their content strategy, video formats, audience demographics, and content quality.



Data Analysis & Reporting: Compile, analyze, and present data-driven insights into identified niches – highlighting key metrics, potential for growth, and risk assessment. Develop regular reports with actionable recommendations.



Content Idea Generation: Proactively brainstorm and develop creative video concepts based on the research – focusing on evergreen formats (tutorials, lists, reviews, how-tos, etc.) that can maintain audience interest over time.



Community Engagement: Monitor social media, forums, and other online communities related to identified niches to understand audience sentiment, pain points, and emerging conversations.



YouTube Analytics Mastery: Become a proficient YouTube Analytics user – understanding key metrics (watch time, completion rates, audience retention, engagement), channel optimization, and audience behavior.



Collaboration: Work closely with content strategists and creative teams to integrate researched insights into actual video production.



Required Skills & Experience:



Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field.

Minimum 2-3 years of experience in market research, data analysis, or content analysis (preferably within the digital space).

Exceptional YouTube analytics proficiency (YouTube Studio, TubeBuddy, VidIQ – be familiar with at least one).

Strong analytical skills, ability to interpret data, and draw insightful conclusions.

Creative thinking and the ability to generate innovative video ideas.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

A strong understanding of YouTube SEO and algorithm principles.



If you have read this far you have great attention to detail - I won't reply to any applications unless you have the words YT Researcher in the subject line.



This has the potential to be long term work for the right person.

title: Finance Officer (Accounts Payable, Receivable, Procurement)
description:
Full-time- 40hrs/week

AU Business Hours (8:30 AM – 5:00 PM AEST)

$350/week



We are looking for a detail-oriented Finance Officer to join our growing international team. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working with numbers, improving processes, and managing financial operations in a structured environment. 



You will be responsible for supporting the finance team by managing accounts payable, accounts receivable, and procurement processes, ensuring invoices, payments, and financial records are handled accurately and on time.



This is a remote role working with an established international company with a collaborative and professional culture.



What You'll Do:



Accounts Payable

- Review and process supplier invoices

- Manage weekly payment runs

- Reconcile supplier invoices and statements

- Ensure invoices are coded correctly and approved

- Maintain organized invoice records

- Support month-end financial processes

- Coordinate with internal teams and external vendors





Procurement Support

- Raise purchase orders

- Assist in supplier sourcing and RFP preparation

- Maintain supplier databases

- Support supplier evaluation and onboarding





Accounts Receivable

- Process and allocate customer payments

- Reconcile payments with banking and accounting systems

- Maintain customer debtor accounts

- Assist with resolving payment discrepancies







What We're Looking For:



Required Skills & Experience

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or Business

- Proven experience in Accounts Payable

- Strong understanding of accounting principles and bookkeeping

- Experience handling high-volume invoices

- Strong Excel skills

- Excellent attention to detail

- Ability to work independently in a remote environment





Highly Preferred

- Experience using SAP or similar ERP systems

- Experience with financial reconciliation

- Experience supporting procurement processes

- Experience working with international finance teams



Key Traits for Success

We are looking for someone who is:

- Extremely detail-oriented

- Organized and able to meet deadlines

- A strong communicator with internal and external stakeholders

- Comfortable handling large volumes of financial data

- Proactive in improving processes





Why Join Us?

- Stable long-term remote opportunity

- Work with an experienced global finance team

- Structured processes and supportive leadership

- Opportunity to grow within an international company



To Apply:

- Share your most updated CV

- Answer the following questions in your application



1. How many years of Accounts Payable, Receivable and procurement experience do you have?

2. Which accounting or ERP systems have you used?

3. You receive a supplier invoice for $5,200, but the Purchase Order is $5,000 and the goods receipt shows $5,000.

What steps would you take before approving the invoice for payment?

4. A supplier statement shows 5 outstanding invoices, but your accounting system only shows 3 invoices recorded.

What would you do to reconcile this?

5. Why is it important to reconcile Accounts Payable before month-end closing, and what problems can happen if this is not done?

title: Business Development & Cold Outreach Coordinator (Remote)
description:
Location: Remote

Preferred Working Hours: US Central or Pacific Time Zone



Role Summary

We are seeking a high-energy, results-oriented Sales Professional to lead our B2B business development efforts. Your primary mission is to identify, hunt, and convert hospitality business owners into registered active clients on our B2B platform.

This is a pure sales role. While we value digital marketing skills, your success will be measured solely by your ability to hit aggressive registration and first-order KPIs through relentless cold outreach.



Key Responsibilities: 

Business Development & Registration Outreach (Primary KPI)

  -Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) to identify and research prospective hospitality businesses, including vacation rental owners, independent hotel owners, and boutique property operators, as target clients for our B2B website.

  -Conduct targeted outreach via cold
 and platforms such as vacation rental platforms and LinkedIn to engage qualified prospects and introduce our B2B website.

  -Use AI-assisted tools to write personalized, high-converting outreach copy and follow-up sequences tailored to each prospect’s business type.

  -Offer deep discount coupons or cash incentives to convert interested prospects into registered businesses on the platform.

  -Guide prospects through the full registration process: assist with W-9 form submission and successful Business Account creation on our B2B website.

  -Follow up with registered businesses to ensure they successfully place their first order, completing the full conversion cycle.

  -Track and report weekly registration and order conversion numbers. A minimum of 30 confirmed new business registrations must be achieved within the first month post-training.



Compensation:

  Base pay: $700/monthly negotiable with promotion opportunity after 3 month based on performance

  Performance bonus: $15 per confirmed new business registration/order placed through our B2B website 



Business Development & KPI

  -Primary KPI: Drive new business registrations on our B2B website by recruiting hospitality businesses and independent property owners via platforms including but not limited to LinkedIn, Airbnb, and other vacation rental platforms

  -Target prospects include vacation rental owners, boutique hotel owners, independent hospitality operators, and other small-to-mid-sized hospitality businesses.

  -Leverage deep discount offers and cash incentives as conversion tools to encourage prospects to complete their first order on the platform.

  -Track and report registration conversion metrics on a weekly basis.



Qualifications:

Required:

  -Strong written and verbal English skills, with the ability to write clear and persuasive outreach messages

  -Hands-on experience with AI tools such as Claude or ChatGPT. Candidates must be comfortable using AI for prospect research, copywriting, and outreach personalization. This is a requirement, not a nice-to-have.

  -Experience with cold outreach, B2B lead generation, or direct sales

  -Self-starter, goal-driven, and able to work independently in a fully remote environment

  -Proficiency in Google Sheets and general data organization

  -Availability to work within US Central or Pacific Standard Time hours (Monday to Friday, 8:00 PM – 4:00 AM PHT

Following up with leads who haven’t responded yet

Following up with unsold quotes and old leads

What This Role Is NOT

run ads

close high-ticket sales calls

do graphic design

build websites

This is more of a “make sure everything gets handled, followed up with, and organized” type of role.

What I’m Looking For

title: Customer Experience Agent
description:
Got it! Here's the fully rewritten job posting:



Customer Experience Representative (Bilingual French/English) – Fully Remote

Job Type: Full-Time | 40 hours per week

Location: Remote (Philippines-based candidates welcome)

Timezone: Eastern Standard Time (EST)



About Spray-Net

At Spray-Net, we provide a unique, professional painting service for house exteriors and kitchen cabinets across North America. Our passionate and talented team is dedicated to delivering the best personalized painting service in the industry.

We offer homeowners a cost-effective renovation solution that enhances property value and makes them fall in love with their home again. With our in-house manufacturing of industrial-strength coatings and our team's expertise, we offer an unrivaled painting experience and a permanent alternative to replacement.

As Canada's fastest-growing home-improvement franchise, Spray-Net thrives in a fast-paced, dynamic environment. Our head office is located in Boucherville, Quebec, serving as the communication hub for operations across Canada and the U.S.



About the Role

We're looking for a dedicated, bilingual Customer Experience Representative to join our remote team. This is a fully remote, full-time position supporting our North American customer base. You will be working EST hours, so the ability to work a consistent North American schedule is required.

This is a customer service role — not commission-based or sales-focused.



Responsibilities



Deliver exceptional customer service by promptly and professionally handling inquiries and resolving issues via phone,
, and chat

Communicate clearly and effectively in both French and English

Apply strong phone etiquette to create a positive customer experience and build long-term loyalty

Assess customer needs and offer tailored solutions to enhance their experience

Perform accurate data entry to keep customer records up-to-date

Collaborate with tea
mbers to share insights and continuously improve service delivery

Stay informed on product offerings, promotions, and company policies to provide accurate, timely information





Qualifications



Fluency in both French and English is required (spoken and written)

Spanish proficiency is a plus but not required

Previous customer service experience is essential

Self-motivated, outgoing, resourceful, and coachable

Must have a laptop or desktop computer with a minimum internet speed of 35 Mbps and a quiet home office environment

Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook) is an asset

Students and recent graduates are encouraged to apply





What We Offer



Fully remote work — work from the comfort of your home

Stable full-time hours (40 hrs/week)

Opportunity to grow with one of Canada's fastest-growing franchise companies

A young, dynamic, and supportive team culture





How to Apply

Submit your application and then send us a message including the address of Spray-Net's Canadian headquarters. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Business Development Specialist
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

Elite Strategies Consulting Group (ESCG) is a scaling real estate education and personal development company. We operate across multiple verticals, move fast, and hold our team to a high standard of execution. We're looking for a Business Development Specialist to own lead engagement, CRM pipeline hygiene, and outbound/inbound outreach activity — and to do it consistently, every single day.



WORKING HOURS & PRESENCE REQUIREMENTS — READ BEFORE APPLYING

This is a fully remote role. Working hours are Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM Eastern Time (US EST). You are required to be present in our Zoom meeting rooms with your camera on from the start to the end of your shift. This is a non-negotiable condition of employment. If this does not work for you, please do not apply.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

Lead Engagement & Outreach

Execute outbound and inbound lead follow-ups daily across Company-approved channels (phone,
, DM, SMS)

Respond to prospect inquiries and nurture leads through defined pipeline stages

Support appointment setting and consistent pipeline progression



CRM & Pipeline Management (Go High Level)

* Maintain accurate, up-to-date records in Go High Level (GHL) — lead status, activity logs, tags, and notes

* Ensure pipeline stages and data fields are current and audit-ready at all times

* Support leadership reporting accuracy through clean, consistent CRM hygiene



Sales Operations Support

* Execute non-commission sales support activities: direct messaging, data entry, follow-up coordination

* Support handoffs between marketing, sales, and leadership

* Assist with internal tracking, documentation, and activity reporting



QUALIFICATIONS

Required

* Prior experience in sales support, business development, outbound prospecting, or lead generation

* Strong written and verbal English communication skills

* Comfortable working with AI tools and incorporating them into your daily workflow — this is a requirement, not a bonus

* Disciplined follow-up habits, high attention to detail, and consistency with repetitive outreach tasks

* Professional conduct in all prospect-facing interactions

* Available and present Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST — no exceptions

* Must be able to maintain camera on in Zoom for the full duration of your shift — this is non-negotiable

* Own and maintain your own computer, high-speed internet, and a professional remote work setup (Company does not    provide hardware or equipment)



Preferred (Not Required)

* Go High Level (GHL) experience — training will be provided for the right candidate

* Reporting and data analysis skills — ability to read pipeline data, flag trends, and summarize activity

Spanish language proficiency



SCOPE & LIMITATIONS

This role operates in a sales support capacity. The Business Development Specialist does not have authority to negotiate pricing, close contracts, or modify commercial terms unless expressly authorized in writing by Company leadership.





ABOUT ELITE STRATEGIES CONSULTING GROUP

ESCG is a scaling real estate education and personal development company operating across multiple verticals including real estate education, private investment, and personal brand development. We expect team members to show up, execute with precision, and grow with us.



HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, submit your application and include a brief response to the following question:



"Describe how you currently use AI tools in your daily work. Be specific."



Applications that do not answer this question will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Social Media Manager (Men’s Hair Products)
description:
We are seeking a seasoned, highly creative Social Media Manager to lead content strategy and execution for a men’s beauty and hair product brand. This role is hands-on and execution-driven, with a strong emphasis on short-form video, Reels, and performance-ready social content. The ideal candidate is both a conceptual thinker and a skilled editor who can take an idea from concept to final deployment across social platforms.



This is not a Canva-based design role. We are looking for someone with professional video editing capabilities and a proven portfolio of short-form video content that performs.



Key Responsibilities

• Develop and execute a monthly social media content calendar aligned with brand, product launches, and campaigns

• Conceptualize, script, shoot (where applicable), and edit high-quality short-form video content (Reels, Shorts, TikTok-style formats)

• Own the full content lifecycle: ideation, editing, optimization, posting, and iteration

• Edit professional-grade videos using industry-standard tools (e.g., Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve, etc.)

• Create visually compelling, on-brand content tailored for men’s grooming, hair, and lifestyle audiences

• Stay current on platform trends, audio, hooks, pacing, and best practices for short-form video

• Ensure consistent brand voice, visual identity, and storytelling across all social channels

• Collaborate with internal teams on product messaging, campaigns, and growth initiatives



Required Qualifications

• 3–5+ years of experience managing social media for consumer brands, preferably in beauty, grooming, fashion, or lifestyle

• Strong short-form video editing skills with a clear portfolio of Reels and social video content

• Ability to independently develop creative concepts and execute them at a professional level

• Fluent in English (written and verbal)

• Deep understanding of Instagram, TikTok, and other short-form social platforms

• Experience creating content that is performance-focused, not just aesthetically pleasing

• Strong time management skills and ability to execute consistently on a monthly calendar

• Portfolio Requirements (Mandatory)



Applicants must provide:

• Examples of short-form video content (Reels, TikToks, Shorts) they have personally edited

• Clear indication of their role in concept development and execution

• Links to live social accounts or performance examples (if available)



What We’re Looking For

• A creative who understands men’s grooming culture and visual storytelling

• Someone who can move fast without sacrificing quality

• A professional who can take ownership of social content from idea to publication

• A strong editor who goes well beyond basic templates and Canva designs



Nice to Have

• Experience working with product-based or e-commerce brands

• Familiarity with UGC-style content and founder-led storytelling

• Understanding of paid social creative best practices

title: Tester – GitHub Pipelines & Test Automation (Remote)
description:
Join one of Australia’s leading database development companies and work on real world systems used by well known international clients.



At DB Gurus, you’ll build high quality, scalable database driven applications while continuing to grow your skills in modern technologies such as AWS and AI assisted development tools—all within a supportive, fully remote team.



About DB Gurus

DB Gurus is a specialist database development company with over 16 years’ experience delivering reliable, easy to use solutions for clients across multiple industries worldwide.



At DB Gurus, you’ll help ensure the quality of scalable, database driven applications while expanding your experience with modern testing tools, GitHub Pipelines, and emerging technologies such as AWS and AI assisted tools—within a supportive, fully remote team.



The Role

We’re looking for a Tester with strong experience in GitHub Pipelines and test automation who takes pride in delivering high?quality, well?tested software and enjoys working closely with developers and project teams. 

As a Tester, you will be responsible for validating software functionality, reliability, and performance across multiple projects. You’ll work closely with developers, QA, and project managers to ensure testing is embedded throughout the development lifecycle.



This role suits someone who is detail oriented, proactive, and comfortable working in a structured, process driven environment.



Rate: AUD $6 – $7 per hour (based on experience)



What We Offer

• Fully remote, work from home role

• Flexible working arrangements

• Stable, long term contract

• Supportive and approachable management

• Opportunity to work on real world, production systems

• Collaborative team environment with developers and QA support



Key Responsibilities

• Review requirements and specifications to design clear, comprehensive test cases

• Create, manage, and execute test cases using GitHub Pipelines

• Perform manual and automated testing across applications and systems

• Design and maintain automated test scripts to improve test coverage and efficiency

• Identify, document, and track defects, working closely with developers to validate fixes

• Participate in test planning, estimation, and status reporting

• Contribute to the continuous improvement of testing processes, frameworks, and standards



Requirements



Essential:

• Proven experience as a Tester / QA Engineer or similar role

• Strong hands on experience with GitHub Pipelines

• Experience with test automation tools and frameworks (e.g. Selenium, Appium, or similar)

• Solid understanding of SDLC and testing methodologies

• Strong attention to detail and commitment to high quality outcomes

• Clear communication skills and ability to work collaboratively with remote teams

• Honest, reliable, and able to follow standards and specifications



Nice to have:

• Familiarity with C# 
 based applications

•  Copilot CLI experience

• AI Agent experience

• Experience testing database driven systems



Availability:

• Preferably available for at least 6 hours between 9:00 am and 5:00 pm (GMT+10)



How to Apply

If you wish to apply, please send your application starting with:

“Ref: Tester”

and include three of your key strengths.



Please note: we only hire individuals. Recruitment agencies need not apply.

title: Graphic Design Assistant - Multiple Job Openings
description:
Hi there! We are SuperPOD - a small virtual team with a focus on ecommerce and Print-On-Demand products. We are looking for 1 or 2  highly organized Graphic Design Assistants to join our growing e-commerce team.



Role 1 - Design Production Assistant

Role 2 - Technical Design Assistant



>> Important: These two roles are more focused on production work NOT creative design. We do occasionally hire for creative graphic design roles, but it is important for you to understand the types of projects you will be working on before you apply. If you are looking for more creative tshirt design type projects, you can submit your portfolio, but we are not hiring for this role right now. 



Please check out this link to see example projects (you may need to cut and paste into your browser): 



Requirements

-Active Adobe Creative Cloud subscription (Photoshop + Illustrator required)

-Proficiency in Photoshop and Illustrator (production work, file prep, mockups)

-Exceptional attention to detail and organization skills

-Ability to follow instructions and maintain consistency across multiple brands



Responsibilities

-Create and modify product assets such as size charts, color charts, and template files

-Prepare product mockups for listings (Etsy, Amazon, and other marketplaces)

-Manage and maintain brand consistency for files across multiple shops

-Handle file organization and version control to keep assets tidy and accessible





Role Details

-Freelance position, approx. 10-20 hours per week to start. This could grow very quickly to full time if you are a good fit for our team

-Flexible schedule, but must meet deadlines and communicate clearly

-Pay: depends on which role you apply for and your experience



Screening Questions



1.Which role are you applying for? (we're hiring for two roles, please be specific)

2. Are you seeking full time or part time work?

3. What is your current availability (hours per week)?

4. Are you currently working with other freelance clients? If so, how many hours per week?

5. What is your desired hourly rate?

6. How many years of experience do you have using Adobe Photoshop and Adobe Illustrator?

7. Do you typically organize and label layers within Photoshop and Illustrator?

8. Are you comfortable with file organization and version control for project with many versions?

9. Do you have experience using Google Drive (for file sharing) and WhatsApp (for communication)?

10. Do you have any additional skills or anything else we should know about? (e.g. illustration skills, video editing, web design)

. Please reply within OnlineJobs.ph

title: AI Creative & Paid Media Execution Specialist
description:
Jennings Social Media & MarTech (JSMM) is hiring a high-performance AI Growth Operator to lead the next evolution of paid media and creative execution.



This is not a traditional media buyer role.



You will own the full system:

creative ? launch ? analysis ? optimization ? scale



We are looking for someone who can operate like a growth engine, using AI, creative instinct, and performance data to drive measurable results across paid channels.



What You’ll Own

Creative Performance (End-to-End)

Develop and execute high-performing ad concepts across Meta, Instagram, YouTube and Google

Write hooks, scripts and messaging angles based on audience behavior and platform trends

Create or direct short-form video and static ad creative (UGC style, founder-led, product-focused, etc.)

Produce multiple variations of creative for testing (10–30 per campaign)



Paid Media Execution

Launch, manage and optimize campaigns across:

Meta Ads (primary)

Google Ads / YouTube (secondary)

Own budget allocation, scaling decisions and performance improvements

Continuously test new audiences, placements and campaign structures



AI-Driven Analysis & Optimization

Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to analyze ad performance and identify patterns

Translate data into clear actions:

What messaging is converting

What creative formats are winning

Where performance is breaking down

Build weekly testing roadmaps based on insights



Creative Testing & Iteration Loop

Operate a rapid testing cycle:

Launch ? analyze ? iterate ? relaunch (weekly)

Kill underperforming creatives quickly and scale winners aggressively

Continuously improve CTR, CPA and overall campaign efficiency



Trend & Platform Intelligence

Monitor real-time trends across:

TikTok

Instagram Reels

Meta Ad Library

Rapidly translate trends into ad concepts within 24–72 hours

Ensure all creative is platform-native and current



What Success Looks Like

Consistent increase in CTR and conversion rates

Decreasing CPA across campaigns

High volume of creative testing and iteration

Clear weekly insights and performance direction

Faster speed to launch and optimization across accounts



Required Skill Set

Creative + Performance Hybrid

Strong understanding of what makes ads convert (hooks, pacing, messaging)

Ability to create or direct short-form video and static creative

Experience with UGC-style, founder-led and performance-driven content



Paid Media Expertise

Hands-on experience managing Meta Ads campaigns (required)

Working knowledge of Google Ads / YouTube

Strong understanding of funnel strategy and conversion tracking



AI-Native Workflow

Daily use of AI tools for:

ad analysis

creative generation

testing frameworks

Ability to build prompts and systems that improve performance



Speed & Ownership

Moves fast and tests aggressively

Comfortable making decisions without waiting for direction

Operates with accountability to performance metrics, not activity



Experience Requirements

4–8+ years in paid media, growth marketing or performance creative

Proven track record improving campaign performance (CTR, CPA, ROAS)

Experience working with multiple clients or brands preferred



Role Structure

Part-time contractor to start (20–25 hours per week)

Fully remote

Opportunity to grow into a larger leadership role



Compensation

$12–$18/hour based on experience and performance

Performance-based upside opportunities available



Who This Is NOT For

Traditional media buyers who rely on creative teams

Social media managers without paid media experience

Candidates who are not actively using AI in their workflow



Who This Is For

Builders who want to own outcomes

Operators who move fast and test constantly

Marketers who understand that creative is the new targeting

Individuals excited to push the edge of AI-driven marketing



How to Apply



Please include:



Portfolio of ad creative and campaigns

Examples of performance improvements (CTR, CPA, ROAS)

Brief explanation of how you currently use AI in your workflow

Your hourly rate and availability

title: Real Estate Sales!
description:
Hey Future employees!

My name is Julian and I am the founder of Skyline RAI Holdings LLC, a real estate investing company focused on acquiring off-market and underperforming properties in California. We are growing fast and need a sharp, motivated Disposition Manager to build and maintain our investor buyer network.



Your job is simple: cold call real estate investors, build genuine relationships, understand what they buy, and make sure we always have the right buyer ready when we get a property under contract. This is a relationship-building role, not a transaction role.



What You Will Do:



- Cold call real estate investors in the Bay Area and San Diego markets

- Identify investor buying criteria — areas, property types, price ranges, condition

- Build and maintain a strong investor database (our buyer's list)

- Follow up consistently to keep relationships warm

- Present properties to investors when we have deals under contract

- Communicate clearly and professionally via phone,
, and text

- Report daily activity and results to the owner





Who We Are Looking For:



- Excellent phone presence and communication skills

- Comfortable making 50+ cold calls per day

- Self-motivated and able to work independently

- Organized — can manage a large contact list without dropping the ball

- Prior experience in sales, real estate, or cold calling preferred

- Knowledge of real estate investing terms is a plus (ARV, wholesale, fix & flip)

- Reliable internet connection and available during US business hours





Compensation/Schedule:



Monday-Friday 10am-4pm PST

$7/hr base pay

$250 flat fee commission on every deal we successfully close together

*I am flexible based on experience and skills!*





How to Apply:



Send your application with the subject line: "Dispo Manager [Your Name]"

Include a short voice recording (60 seconds) introducing yourself and explaining why you would be great at this role. Applications without the voice recording will not be considered.

title: MLM CRM Developer (Remote)
description:
Location: Remote (Preferably Philippines, Vietnam or Hong Kong)

Employment Type: Freelance/Contract or Full-time by extension

Project Duration: 3-6 months with potential for extension

Budget: negotiable



About the Project

We are a startup MLM (Multi-Level Marketing) company seeking a skilled MLM CRM Developer

to build and customize a CRM system tailored to our network marketing business. The ideal

candidate will have experience with MLM-specific features such as genealogy tracking, commission

calculations, downline management, integration with payment gateways such as Stripe.

He/she also must build a website and app dev that integrates the CRM. The purpose is that members

can track their downline on the app and subscribe new members online on the website.

CRM Developer and website/app builder is 1 person or can be 2 persons.



Key Responsibilities

• Develop and customize a CRM system for MLM operations, including:

o Genealogy tracking (visualizing and managing distributor networks)

o Commission and bonus calculations (automated payouts based on MLM plans)

o Downline communication tools (notifications, team collaboration features)

o Integration with payment gateways, e-commerce platforms, and marketing tools

• Ensure the CRM is scalable, user-friendly, and compliant with data protection regulations.

• Collaborate with our team to gather requirements and provide ongoing support.

• Test, debug, and optimize the CRM for performance and reliability.

• Develop a website and app (downline and pay out) based on the CRM/MLM program.



Required Skills & Experience

• Proven experience developing CRM systems for MLM or direct selling companies.

• Proficiency in PHP, JavaScript, Python, or similar backend languages and frameworks

(e.g., Laravel, Django, Node.js).

• Experience with database design (MySQL, PostgreSQL) and API integrations.

• Familiarity with MLM software platforms (e.g., Naxum, Exigo, Infinite MLM, or custom

solutions).

• Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently in a remote setting.

• Excellent communication skills in English.

• Good at working in/with a team.



Nice-to-Have

• Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure) and DevOps practices.

• Experience with Upwork or Salesforce.

• Knowledge of marketing automation tools (e.g., HubSpot, Keap, Zoho CRM).

• Understanding of compliance requirements for MLM businesses in Europe/USA/Asia.



How to Apply

Please submit:

1. Your resume/portfolio with relevant MLM/CRM projects.

2. A brief cover letter explaining your experience with MLM systems.

3. Examples of past work (GitHub, live demos, or case studies).

4. Your availability and proposed rate.

5. Send to mail: 

Contact: Marc Van Geyte – director – location Belgium and Philippines Davao City

Company: Digital Data Solutions Ltd based in Kowloon, Hong Kong.

MLM project name: “2friends” website: 

Timeframe: target starting date: 01 July 2026 – deadline starting date: 01 January 2027



Why Work With Us?

• Opportunity to shape a cutting-edge MLM CRM from the ground up.

• Flexible remote work environment.

• Potential for long-term collaboration as we scale.

• Unique MLM project with sales of an IT-solution (1 product)

• Create a significant secondary income while becoming a network member

title: Junior Publishing Operations Manager
description:
We are an independent non-fiction publishing house based in Europe, publishing practical books for educated adults. We operate across multiple series and pen names, with a growing catalogue on Amazon KDP.



We are looking for a sharp, organised, and self-directed individual to grow into a full publishing operations role. You will start with structured, well-documented tasks and take on more responsibility as you demonstrate competence and judgement.



This is a long-term position. We invest in the right person.



What You Will Do

- Administrative support across our Notion-based project management system

- ARC and review outreach via
 and
 Messenger

As you develop:

- Niche and keyword research using Helium 10

-
 Ads and Amazon Ads management

- AI-assisted writing and editing support

- Liaison with editors and contractors

- Cover design and formatting support for straightforward projects



What We Are Looking For

- Exceptional written English — C2 level, non-negotiable

- Curious about books, publishing, and the business behind writing

Publishing experience is a plus but not required. 

Intelligence and work ethic matter more than a specific CV.



Practical Details

- Full-time, 8 hours per day

- Remote, working with an operator across European time zones

- Start date: flexible, Q2 or Q3 2026



How to Apply



Send a short message — no more than three paragraphs — explaining why this role interests you and what in your background is most relevant. Include one specific example of a time you followed a complex written process or learned a new system independently.



Applications that do not answer the question will not be considered.

title: Experienced Real Estate/Social Media Videographer

As we expand into new regions and services, we’re looking to bring on a skilled video editor to help elevate our video offering.

title: Part-Time Remote Bookkeeping Assistant (Real Estate & Business Clients)
description:
I own a bookkeeping firm and am currently looking for an assistant to join my team.



I am looking for someone who is available approximately 10:00 AM – 4:00 PM EST on an ongoing basis. You will work between 2–6 hours per day depending on workload. I will train you on each client, but you must already have actual job experience in bookkeeping—specifically with STRs, LTRs, and general businesses. I will not be teaching basic bookkeeping skills such as identifying transactions or categorizing them.



You will be working with software such as QuickBooks Online (QBO), Buildium, AppFolio, and other bookkeeping platforms.

Starting pay is $5/hour (USD), with the opportunity for an increase after 6 months based on proven work ethic, timeliness, organization, and communication.



I stay very busy and also work other jobs, so I need someone who can follow instructions exactly as given and ask questions when something is unclear. Honesty and clear communication are extremely important to me.

A strong and reliable internet connection is required. I have previously had assistants who were unavailable due to internet issues multiple times a week, and that will not work for this position.



At times, you will be asked to work live with me via screen share. These sessions may be scheduled without advance notice, and I will review your work during that time to ensure accuracy and efficiency. I am very familiar with how long tasks should take, so timeliness is expected. If delays come up, I will expect an explanation.



At this time, I am specifically looking for a female assistant with prior bookkeeping experience. Please do not apply if you do not have relevant experience. There will be a questionnaire as part of the process.



If you apply, as proof of your attention to detail, please include one thing about yourself in your application.

title: Short-Form Content Creator & Editor (Faith-Based Brand)
description:
About the Brand



Prayer Scarves is a Christian brand creating scripture-inspired scarves designed to encourage intimacy with God through His Word. Each design is rooted in prayer, study, and spiritual intention. Our scarves are used, and often gifted, to uplift, encourage, and equip believers in seasons of waiting, worship, and growth.



--------------------------------------



Role & Responsibilities



I’m looking for someone who can help keep our social media active and meaningful by working with existing content and helping shape how it’s shared moving forward.



A large part of this role involves:



 - going through existing content (blog posts, devotionals, customer reviews, past social media, videos, and messages)

 - identifying meaningful 
nts within that content

 - repurposing it into short-form content across multiple platforms



You will also:



 - help turn new content into short-form videos

 - suggest content ideas based on what is currently working on social media

 - bring awareness of trends and formats, while keeping the message grounded and aligned

 - help create a steady rhythm of posting (approximately 5–7 posts per week)



Most of the content will be:



 - scripture-centered

 - encouraging

 - reflective

 - sometimes lighthearted or relatable

 - occasionally reposted (from past content or other creators that align with the brand)



This is a product-based brand, but the content is primarily message-first, not product-first.



Over time, I’d like you to:



 - develop an understanding of our audience

 - recognize what resonates and what doesn’t

 - make thoughtful suggestions for content, edits, and ideas

 - occasionally suggest what I should record or create



--------------------------------------



What I’m Looking For



 - Experience creating or editing short-form content

 - Strong sense of pacing, storytelling, and emotional tone

 - Ability to identify what is meaningful, engaging, and worth sharing

 - Understands that different platforms require different approaches

 - Comfortable working with scripture-centered / faith-based content

 - Resourceful and able to find inspiration or direction when needed



This role will feel most natural for someone who:



 - enjoys social media and naturally pays attention to what works

 - has experience creating content that gets engagement

 - is thoughtful about how content is received



Someone who is a believer and finds meaning in this type of content will likely connect deeply with the work.

However, strong storytelling ability, emotional intelligence, and respect for the message are just as important.



 --------------------------------------



How to Apply



Please include:



Samples of your work

A short intro about you and your experience

Your availability

Your hourly rate



And please answer this:



Rewrite this sentence in your own words:

“God sees you, even when you feel unseen.”

title: AU Senior Paraplanner
description:
Company Overview



BE SmartAdmin Services Pty Ltd (BESAS) is a bespoke Australian start-up company providing administrative, paraplanning, and bookkeeping services to a diverse range of clients, including financial planning, property, mortgage lending, and creative industries. While most of our team is based in the Philippines, our services are fully Australian-focused, and we pride ourselves on delivering tailored, high-quality solutions for each client.



At BESAS, we value excellence in our work and in our interactions with clients, while also recognising that well-being and work-life balance matter. Our culture encourages innovation, collaboration, and results, and we are looking for someone who can make an impact, demonstrate a can-do attitude, and thrive in a dynamic start-up environment.



Role Overview



As a Senior Paraplanner, you will play a pivotal role in our paraplanning team. You will:



- Manage SOA/ROA/research/modelling requests from advisers and allocate them to the paraplanning team, while also personally preparing SOA/ROA/research/modelling work.

- Review the SOA/ROA/research/modelling prepared by the paraplanning team before submission to the adviser.

- Lead, coordinate, and support the paraplanning team to ensure advice documents meet adviser requirements and AFSL compliance standards.

- Learn to prepare UK Pension SOAs and confidently review them.



This is a hands-on role requiring both active production and team guidance, with opportunities to make a tangible impact on our clients and team.



Key Responsibilities



Personal SOA Production



- Prepare a minimum of 1 SOA per day (approx. 4–5 hours) according to adviser instructions.

- Ensure all personal advice documents (SOA/ROA) meet AFSL compliance and adviser-specific preferences.

- Master UK Pension SOA preparation to support both production and review responsibilities.



Paraplanning Team Support



- Support paraplanning operations and workflow management.

- Liaise directly with advisers (mainly via
) for SOA requests.

- Manage adviser expectations with clear updates on timelines, scope, and required information.

- Review SOA requests and adviser strategies for completeness, accuracy, and feasibility before assigning tasks.

- Coordinate the schedule and workload of part-time paraplanners, ensuring a 3–5 business day SOA turnaround.

- Provide guidance and upskilling to paraplanners on correct SOA clauses to include/exclude.

- Review and approve SOAs prepared by paraplanners, ensuring adherence to AFSL templates.

- Implement revision requests from the AFSL compliance team and provide constructive feedback to improve accuracy, compliance, and adviser satisfaction.

- Contribute to team growth through recruitment input, training, and process improvement initiatives.



Quality Control & Adviser Liaison



- Coordinate with advisers and paraplanners for revisions as needed.

- Personally make final amendments to meet adviser deadlines.

- Be willing to conduct weekend SOA reviews in special cases (e.g., payroll cut-off deadlines) to ensure billing is included in the correct period.



Who Could Be an Ideal Candidate



You could be our ideal candidate if you are someone who:



- Has a strong background in paraplanning (5+ years) within the Australian financial planning industry.

- Can balance multiple advisers or practices while maintaining high accuracy and attention to detail.

-  Is proactive, solutions-oriented, and has a can-do attitude.

- Thrives in a start-up environment where your contributions directly impact the team and clients.

- Values excellence in work and client service while maintaining work-life balance.

- Possesses leadership or mentoring experience, capable of guiding part-time paraplanners effectively.

- Is keen to learn and grow, including mastering complex advice types such as UK Pensions and LRBA.

- Is proficient in Xplan, including SuperSolver/WealthSolver, Risk Researcher, and XTOOLS+ Calm (retirement modelling). Familiarity with other tools (ProductRex, Omnium/OmniLife, RetireMap, Fin365) is a plus.



Qualifications



- Minimum 5 years’ experience as a paraplanner in or for the Australian financial planning industry.

- Proven experience managing workflow or supporting multiple paraplanners.

- Strong knowledge of superannuation, personal insurance, retirement planning, and investment strategies.

- Strong written and verbal English communication skills.

- Ability to work autonomously while supporting and developing a small team.

- High proficiency in Microsoft Word and Excel.

- Exceptional attention to detail and ability to interpret technical information.



Reporting



This position reports directly to the Operations Manager.



Home Office Requirements



- Power & Internet: Stable power supply and minimum 20 Mbps internet.

- Equipment: Computer/laptop with at least 8GB RAM and Microsoft Office installed.

- Environment: Quiet home office suitable for client calls and tea
etings.



Working Hours



- Schedule: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM, Monday to Friday (Philippine Standard Time), including 1-hour unpaid lunch.

- Time Tracking: Use Clockify to track all work hours (excluding lunch) with task-level granularity.

- Breaks: Short tea breaks up to 15 minutes (max. 2/day) with supervisor notification.



Compensation & Benefits



Rates & Salary



- PHP 700/hour – Premium billable work (SOA/ROA prep, research, adviser communication).

- PHP 300/hour – Base rate for non-billable time (idle periods, tea breaks, etc.).

- Monthly salary range: PHP 107,467 (80% billable) – PHP 121,333 (100% billable).

- Independent contractor arrangement, inclusive of 13th month and government contributions (SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG).



Leave & Incentives



- 6-month probation: Hourly rate may be reviewed based on performance.

- 1st anniversary: 10 workdays of paid leave annually, prorated in the first year.

- Mandatory 10-day Christmas break (dates advised annually).

- Performance bonuses are discretionary, based on quality, consistency, and turnaround expectations.

title: Email Marketing Specialist
description:
Remote
 Marketing Specialist (Multi-Brand EDMs)



About The Role



We’re looking for a hands-on
 Marketing Specialist to take ownership of
 campaigns across a portfolio of digital marketing projects and multiple brands.



This role is ideal for someone who has real execution experience, not just coordination—someone who has built, launched, and optimised campaigns themselves, and can confidently manage multiple accounts, audiences, and campaign  calendars at once. You’ll play a key role in both strategy and execution, helping drive lead generation, engagement, and conversions through high-performing
 marketing.



Key Responsibilities

- Plan, build, and execute end-to-end EDM campaigns across multiple accounts (B2B & B2C)

- Manage
 campaign calendars, automations, and nurture sequences

- Develop and refine
 strategies focused on lead generation and conversion

- Segment databases and implement personalisation strategies

- Write and optimise high-converting
 copy, including subject lines and CTAs

- Collaborate with design/content teams to produce polished, effective campaigns

- Monitor performance (open rate, CTR, conversions) and continuously optimise

- Maintain list health, deliverability, and compliance with relevant regulations

- Report on campaign performance and provide actionable insights



What We’re Looking For

- 5+ years’ hands-on
 marketing experience

- Proven ability to manage multiple accounts or projects simultaneously

- Strong experience with platforms such as Klaviyo, Mailchimp, or similar ESPs

- Demonstrated results in lead generation, nurturing, and conversion via

- Ability to take campaigns from strategy through to execution and optimisation

- Strong copywriting skills with a performance focus

- Highly organised with excellent time management

- Analytical mindset with confidence using data to improve results



Nice to Have

- Experience in education, training, or service-based industries

- Familiarity with CRM systems and marketing automation workflows

- Understanding of broader digital funnels (landing pages, paid traffic, etc.)



Why Join Us?

Fully remote role with flexibility

Work across diverse campaigns and audiences

Opportunity to contribute to strategy, not just execution

Be part of a results-driven, fast-paced marketing environment



How to Apply

Please include:

- The
 platforms you’ve used

- How many accounts/projects you’ve managed at once

- A brief example of a campaign or automation you’ve personally built and optimised



If you feel like this is the job for you and you're ready to make a meaningful impact and help drive our lead generation strategies through successful
 campaigns, we would love to hear from you! Please hit apply with your resume and a cover letter.

title: Technical phone screener
description:
We're looking for someone to conduct short screening calls (under 15 minutes) with engineering candidates. You'll be the first point of contact with candidates and help us quickly assess fit before they move to the next round.



What you'll do:

- Conduct 1–5 screening calls per day over the phone.

- Get a sense of the candidate's engineering experience AND customer-management experience.

- Understand what the candidate is looking for in their next role, and confirm the role aligns with their expectations.

- Assess the candidate's professionalism and excitement.

- Submit a brief summary/scorecard after each call to us.



Requirements:

- Fluent, professional English.

- Direct experience with screening calls for hiring. Technical screening call experience strongly preferred.

- Ability to call candidates during 9am-6pm Pacific Time.

title: Video Editor (Luxury Fragrance Brand – New York)
description:
Overview



We are a New York–based luxury fragrance brand seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Video Editor to join our team.



This role is critical in shaping how our brand is perceived across digital platforms. The ideal candidate understands not only how to edit compelling video content, but also how to maintain a refined, aspirational brand voice that reflects the elegance and sophistication of a luxury product.



Key Responsibilities



Edit high-quality video content for social media platforms (Instagram, TikTok,
, etc.)

Develop engaging short-form and long-form content aligned with brand identity

Write compelling captions that reflect a luxury tone and drive engagement

Implement social media retention strategies (hooks, pacing, storytelling, trends) while preserving brand integrity

Collaborate with the creative and marketing teams to execute content strategies

Ensure all content maintains consistency in brand voice, visual identity, and overall perception

Stay up to date with social media trends and adapt them appropriately for a luxury audience

Optimize videos for performance (formatting, timing, platform-specific best practices)



Requirements



Proven experience in video editing (portfolio required)

Strong proficiency in editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, CapCut, or similar)

Experience in content creation and social media marketing

Ability to write high-quality, on-brand captions in fluent English

Strong understanding of audience retention strategies and social media algorithms

A refined creative eye with an understanding of luxury aesthetics

High attention to detail and consistency

Ability to follow brand guidelines strictly and protect brand identity



Preferred Qualifications



Experience working with luxury, beauty, or lifestyle brands

Understanding of branding, storytelling, and visual composition

Experience creating viral or high-performing content while maintaining brand integrity



Important Note



This role requires a deep understanding of brand positioning.

All content must elevate and protect the perception of a luxury fragrance brand. Creativity is encouraged, but never at the expense of brand identity.



Work Setup



Remote position

Full-time / Part-time (to be discussed)



How to Apply



Submit your portfolio (video samples required)

Include a short introduction about your experience

Provide links to any social media content you have created or managed

title: Creative video editor for talking head online course content
description:
Hi! I’m looking for a creative short-form video editor to help bring my
 marketing online course content to life. Most of the students taking this course are women in their 20's and 30's, so I'd love to work with someone who is up on modern, creative video trends. 



What you’ll be working on:

I’ll be providing recorded talking-head videos (mistakes already edited out), and you’ll be responsible for enhancing the watching experience through editing. There are approximately 50 videos, each around 5–15 minutes long. 



The goal:

These aren’t YouTube videos created for entertainment purposes, they’re educational. So the editing should:

-support learning and comprehension

-highlight key ideas

-keep things visually engaging without being distracting

(And still feel fun to watch)





Scope of Work

Visual Enhancements

-Text + graphic overlays to reinforce key concepts

-Light motion graphics or callouts where helpful

-Static zooms and subtle movement to keep things dynamic

-Occasional GIFs or visuals where they genuinely add value

-Clean transitions (nothing overly flashy)

-Sound balancing and light sound design (sound effects + intro and outro music) where appropriate



Overall, think:creative, fun, thoughtful, personality-focused, not stiff or formal. 



Required Skills

-Proficiency in tools like CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, or similar

-Strong sense of pacing and storytelling (even in educational content)

-Ability to make judgment calls on when to add visuals vs keep it simple

-Clear communication for feedback and revisions



Portfolio

Please include examples of:

-Talking-head content

-YouTube-style or educational/course content



Timeline

Start date: April 2026

Project timeline: ~1–2 months

(I’ll provide videos in batches each week to keep things manageable)



Additional Notes

This is a one-time project for now, but there’s a strong possibility for ongoing work if it’s a good fit!



If this sounds like something you’d enjoy working on, I’d love to see your work and hear more about your editing style.

Thanks so much, I appreciate your time!



Hollie :)
