title: Instagram VA
description:
ROLE: Instagram Outreach Assistant (Fitness Coaching Business)



About the Role:

I’m an online fitness coach helping expats in the UAE lose fat, build muscle, and take control of their lifestyle.



I’m looking for a detail-oriented and personable Virtual Assistant to manage daily Instagram outreach, start conversations with potential clients and (ideally) be able to edit some of my content for me. 



This is NOT a spa
ssaging role. High level of written and spoken ENGLISH is essential.



Your job is to build genuine conversations that lead to trust, engagement, and eventually booked calls.



Daily Responsibilities (2-4 hours per day, there is the potential to go full time): 



Follow 30 targeted Instagram accounts (UAE-based individuals)

Unfollow 30 non-followers

Start 40–60 natural conversations via DMs

Reply to Instagram story posts

Engage with new followers and story watchers / post likers

Maintain a conversational, human tone in all messages



What You’ll Be Doing:



Speaking to potential clients as if you’re messaging a friend

Asking simple questions to understand their fitness goals

Building rapport and keeping conversations flowing

Identifying potential leads and flagging them



Who This Is Perfect For:



Someone experienced with Instagram (DMs, stories, engagement)

Strong written English (casual, natural tone)

Understands gym/fitness culture (preferred)

Comfortable having conversations (not just sending scripts)

Reliable, consistent, and coachable



Important:



No robotic copy-paste messaging

No spam tactics

Quality conversations > quantity



Training & Support:



You will receive:

A simple DM framework

Examples of conversations

Ongoing feedback and support



Hours & Pay:



2 hours per day (scope for this to be higher)

Remote role

Long-term opportunity for the right person



To Apply:



Please answer the following:



1. Do you have experience managing Instagram accounts or DMs?

2. Are you interested in health and fitness? 

3. How will you ensure that the people you are speaking to are suitable clients to work with us?

title: Customer Support Assistant (Remote)
description:
Customer Support Assistant (Remote) – Swedish E-Commerce Company



IMPORTANT

Salary for this position is 1 SEK per hour.

If you are not comfortable with this rate, please do not apply.



We are a Swedish company looking for a reliable and dedicated Customer Support Assistant to help us manage customer
s for several different brands.



We currently have a team of 11 people, and everyone is working well together. We are now looking to add one more person to the team.



This is a long-term position. If you do a great job, we want you to stay with us for a long time. There will also be opportunities to learn new tasks and grow into other roles in the company.



Most customer questions will be related to:



Order status (“Where is my delivery?”)

Orders not received

Products not as expected

Returns and exchanges

General questions about the brand



You will work closely with our agents in China who handle packaging and shipping, as well as directly with our payment providers to resolve customer issues without needing our constant assistance.



What We Expect From You



A fast learner who is driven, organized, and detail-oriented

Someone who is willing to work consistently every day

A patient and polite communicator, even with difficult customers

A problem solver who always tries to fix issues before asking for help

Someone who always finishes what they start

Someone who is technical, consistent, hardworking, and always looking to improve

Strong English speaking and writing skills

Experience with
 customer support and Shopify



Work Schedule



8 hours per day

5 days per week (option to work 6 or 7 days if you want more hours)

You can choose your working hours, but you must work the same schedule every day

Your shift must be completed in one continuous 8-hour block



Future Opportunities



You should be willing and excited to learn new skills. Soon, you may also take on tasks such as:



Finding viral products

Searching for ad videos

Editing ad creatives

Writing ad copy

Building simple websites

Creating product descriptions

Communicating with UGC creators and influencers



Experience in these areas is a plus, but not required—we will train you to do them well.



Salary



1 SEK per hour

Paid for all hours worked



How to Apply



Please send a message with the headline " CUSTOMER SUPPORT LONGTERM "



Please share:



A brief introduction about yourself

What you are currently doing

Your ambitions

Your relevant experience



We are looking for someone serious, long-term, and ready to grow with us.

title: Event Admin
description:
About Us

Event Strategies produces and owns a portfolio of B2B event properties across multiple industry sectors in Ireland and the UK. From flagship corporate conferences to curated industry gatherings, we deliver events that matter to the communities they serve. As we scale, we're looking for a sharp, organised Event Admin Executive who strives for the best to keep our event engine running smoothly behind the scenes.



The Role

You'll be the operational backbone of our event delivery team — managing the details that make the difference between a good event and a great one. Working closely with our Event Leads, you'll handle everything from entry processing and attendee coordination to post-event reporting, ensuring every programme runs without a hitch.

This is a remote role suited to someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, takes ownership of their work, and genuinely cares about getting things right.



What You'll Do

Event & Administrative Support

- Process entries, manage data, and maintain accurate records, including attendee lists and finalist databases

- Handle incoming event-related enquiries and communications professionally and promptly

- Proof and quality-check event materials before they go out



Attendee Services

- Manage guestlists and assist with registration processes

- Provide responsive online support to attendees and handle special requests



Team Coordination

- Report to Senior/Junior Event Leads and support the wider team as needed

- Liaise with Event Leads to coordinate the production of promotional materials

- Support the integration of multimedia elements into event presentations



Post-Event

- Gather feedback from attendees and vendors

- Assist in compiling post-event reports and performance analysis





What We're Looking For

- Experience in event coordination, administration, or a similar support role (a plus, not a must)

- Highly organised with strong multitasking ability

- Clear, confident communicator — written and verbal

- Comfortable with Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, and event management tools

- Calm under pressure with a sharp eye for detail

- A self-starter who can manage their workload independently in a remote setting





What's on Offer

- Fully remote, full-time position

- Varied and engaging work across a diverse range of industry events

- A collaborative, supportive team environment, where attention to detail is valued above all else — if you've read this far, mention the word I love Events at the start of your

- Real opportunities to grow within the organisation





How to Apply

Send your CV and a brief cover letter outlining your relevant experience to 
 and 
 with the subject line "Event Admin Executive Application".

Event Strategies is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to building a diverse and inclusive team.

title: Video Editor + VA for SaaS Tutorial Videos
description:
We are looking for a highly organized Filipino VA who can take finished scripts and turn them into polished tutorial videos for MyDonorIQ, a software platform that helps nonprofits and ministries communicate better with donors.



This is more than basic editing. We need someone who can own the full process and deliver clean, professional videos with minimal supervision.



Your main tasks:



record screen tutorials inside our software

create AI voiceovers from provided scripts

edit videos so they are clean, easy to follow, and professional

add simple highlights, zooms, cursor emphasis, and callouts where needed

export finished MP4 files in 1080p

upload and organize videos on YouTube as unlisted

keep files organized in Google Drive

follow naming and publishing instructions carefully



You are a great fit if you:



have experience editing tutorial, training, or screen-recorded videos

are strong in English comprehension

are detail-oriented and reliable

can work fast without being sloppy

can follow directions exactly

can communicate clearly and give progress updates

take initiative when something is unclear



Tools you may use:

Loom, OBS, CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro, Descript, ElevenLabs, or similar.



Project details:



about 18 tutorial videos

part-time freelance/contract

remote

Philippines preferred



To apply, send ALL of the following:



A short intro about yourself

Links to 2-3 sample videos you edited

The editing and AI voice tools you use

Your rate per video

Your internet speed

The word DONORIQ at the top of your application so I know you read this carefully



Bonus if you have:



experience editing SaaS tutorials

experience publishing and organizing YouTube training videos

experience working with U.S.-based founders or teams



We are looking for someone dependable, sharp, and easy to work with for ongoing projects if this goes well.

title: Full-Time PPC & SEO Expert (Google Ads + Revenue Growth Specialist)
description:
NO AI RESPONSES PLEASE - LOOKING FOR GENUINE CONNECTIONS ( honesty goes a long way!)



High-Reward Role · Performance-Based Salary · Long-Term Position · Serious Applicants Only



We are seeking a highly experienced, full-time PPC & SEO expert to manage and scale our Google Ads and other major advertising platforms on a monthly basis.



This is a results-driven role.

The more revenue you bring in, the higher your salary will be.



There is no waiting months for raises. Your compensation is directly tied to the value you bring and the performance you deliver. If you produce results fast, you get rewarded fast.



This is a lucrative, long-term opportunity for a skilled PPC & SEO professional who understands performance marketing, scaling profitable campaigns, and optimising for ROI — and who wants to grow with a fast-scaling brand.



?



???? If your plan is to “set and forget” campaigns, rely on guesswork, or use AI blindly without strategy — this is NOT the role for you.



We want a real performance marketer who understands data, intent, optimisation, and revenue.



?



???? Compensation & Growth



Base Salary: $350–$600/month (depending on experience and skill level)

Performance-Based Growth: $1,000–$2,000+/month based on results

 • Salary increases are tied solely to performance and revenue impact

 • No probation delays, no waiting periods

 • High performers are rewarded immediately

 • No earning ceiling — your results define your income



???? If you bring results in Month 1, you get rewarded in Month 1.



?



???? What You Will Be Responsible For

 • Managing, optimising, and scaling Google Ads campaigns

 • Managing paid campaigns across other major platforms if applicable

 • Monitoring daily performance metrics (ROAS, CPA, conversions, revenue)

 • Cutting wasted spend and scaling profitable campaigns

 • Implementing advanced strategies to improve ROI

 • Conducting in-depth keyword research and competitor analysis

 • Supporting SEO strategy to improve organic performance

 • Improving landing page alignment with ads and intent

 • Collaborating on ad copy, creatives, and funnel strategy

 • Continuously testing, optimising, and refining campaign structure

 • Reporting clearly on performance, insights, and next actions



?



???? Ideal Candidate

 • Proven experience running profitable Google Ads campaigns

 • Strong understanding of PPC scaling and optimisation

 • Solid SEO knowledge (keyword research, on-page, technical basics)

 • Data-driven, analytical, and performance-obsessed

 • Comfortable working toward clear revenue targets

 • Proactive, solution-oriented, and detail-focused

 • Treats this role as a full-time career, not a side project

 • Hungry to earn more by delivering real, measurable results



?



???? What Makes This Opportunity Unique

 • Work with a fast-scaling international brand

 • Direct impact on revenue and growth

 • Performance-based pay with immediate upside

 • Long-term stability with strong infrastructure already in place

 • Freedom to implement what works — no micromanagement

 • Opportunity to become our go-to paid media & growth expert

 • A team that values results, ownership, and accountability



We already have strong foundations — now we want someone who can push performance to the next level.



?



? Deliverables

 • Manage and optimise Google Ads campaigns

title: E-commerce Customer Support Team Lead – QA & Escalations
description:
Job Description

We are looking for an experienced and process-driven E-commerce Customer Support Team Lead to oversee agent performance, maintain quality standards, and handle escalated customer concerns. This role is critical in ensuring our support team operates efficiently, consistently, and in alignment with company policies.



Key Responsibilities

* QA & Performance Management

* Monitor and review daily and weekly agent performance metrics, including ticket handle time, resolution time, and tickets handled per hour

* Conduct regular ticket audits to evaluate each agent's accuracy, clarity, policy adherence, proper Google Forms updates, correct ticket merging, and overall communication quality

* Select 5–10 tickets per agent for structured QA scoring

* Complete and update QA scorecards based on ticket reviews

* Upload completed QA scorecards to the performance dashboard

* Provide weekly feedback summaries per agent and use findings to drive coaching and performance improvement

* Escalations & Agent Support

* Serve as the primary escalation point for complex customer issues raised by agents

* Assist agents in real time via general chat and Tondo Fulfillment chat

* Handle sensitive customer requests including order cancellations, order creation and exchanges, order edits, refund processing, and returns management

* Shopify Order Monitoring

* Monitor unfulfilled orders in Shopify and identify those that have remained unfulfilled for an extended period

* Take appropriate follow-up actions to resolve fulfillment delays



What We're Looking For

* Prior experience in e-commerce customer support, ideally in a senior or lead capacity

* Strong attention to detail and ability to evaluate communication quality objectively

* Proficiency with Shopify, Richpanel, and Google Forms

* Confident handling escalated, sensitive, or complex customer scenarios

* Strong coaching mindset with the ability to deliver constructive, actionable feedback

title: Master Google Ads Manager
description:
We are a U.S.-based digital advertising agency seeking a highly experienced Google Ads specialist to lead strategy, execution, and optimization for performance-driven campaigns.



This is not an entry-level role. We are looking for a true operator. Someone who understands how to drive measurable results, optimize at a granular level, and take ownership of campaign performance.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:

• Plan, launch, and manage high-budget Google Ads campaigns across Shopping, Search, Display, and Performance Max

• Build and optimize conversion tracking systems using Google Tag Manager and GA4

• Develop data-driven campaign strategies tailored to each client’s industry, audience, and goals

• Continuously optimize campaigns through:

• Bid strategy adjustments (manual + automated)

• Keyword refinement and expansion

• Audience segmentation

• Ad creative testing

• Analyze performance data and make strategic decisions based on real metrics—not assumptions

• Create projections, forecast performance, and contribute to budget planning

• Collaborate on landing page and funnel optimization to improve conversion rates

• Deliver clear, actionable reports using Looker Studio (Google Data Studio)



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

• 5–10+ years of hands-on experience managing Google Ads campaigns



Proven experience with:

• Google Tag Manager implementation

• Conversion tracking (form fills, calls, events, etc.)

• GA4 setup and analysis



Strong understanding of:

• Lead generation funnels

• Landing page optimization (CRO principles)

• Keyword research and audience targeting

• Experience managing significant ad budgets with accountability for ROI

• Comfortable making manual optimizations and detailed adjustments

• Ability to interpret historical data and apply it to future strategy



Proficiency with:

• Google Ads

• Google Analytics (GA4)

• Google Tag Manager

• Looker Studio

• Google Search Console

• Google Business Profile

• Google Merchant Center



What We’re Looking For:

• Someone who cares deeply about results, not just execution

• Analytical thinker with strong decision-making skills

• Detail-oriented and process-driven

• Strategic mindset with the ability to test, iterate, and scale

• Comfortable working independently and taking ownership of outcomes



To Be Considered

You must provide:

• Examples of past campaigns or accounts you’ve managed

• Specific performance metrics (CPL, ROAS, conversion rate improvements, etc.)

• Brief explanation of your role in those results



Applications without proven experience and performance data will not be considered.



Why This Role:

• Work with a performance-focused agency that values results over vanity metrics

• Opportunity to manage meaningful budgets and make a real impact

• Long-term opportunity for the right candidate



If you’re someone who knows how to turn ad spend into predictable, scalable results, we want to talk.

title: Meta Ads Execution Specialist (Part-Time)
description:
About Us



How To Apply



Please reply to this job post with the following:

1. A brief summary of your Meta Ads experience, including typical monthly budgets.

2. Screenshots or summaries of 2 to 3 campaigns you have managed (goal, budget, structure, and results).

3. One paragraph on how you normally set up tracking (pixel, events, CAPI) for a lead gen funnel.

4. Your part-time hourly rate and full-time monthly rate, respectively.



We’re a programming education company that helps experienced software engineers build real-world Rust projects and land Rust roles. We run a high-ticket, cohort-based accelerator plus self-paced training, and reach engineers through YouTube,
, and partnerships.



Role Overview

We are looking for a part-time Meta Ads Operator to implement and maintain our
 and Instagram campaigns. This is an execution-focused role: you will take clear targeting and creative direction from the founder and marketing team, then handle setup, tracking, and ongoing optimizations inside Meta Ads Manager.



Ideal for someone who enjoys clean accounts, accurate tracking, and making data-driven tweaks, not sitting in branding meetings.



Key Responsibilities

1. Implement and maintain Meta Pixel and Conversion API across our funnels (waitlist, applications, bookings, purchases).

2. Set up campaigns, ad sets, and ads according to provided specs (objectives, budgets, audiences, and creatives).

3. Create and manage custom and lookalike audiences from our traffic,
 list, and engaged users.

4. Monitor performance daily on weekdays and execute simple rules: pause obvious losers, keep winners within defined guardrails, and flag issues quickly.

5. Run basic A/B tests on creatives and audiences following our testing framework.

6. Ensure tracking events fire correctly on all key steps and troubleshoot when they do not.

7. Produce a concise weekly report (spend, cost per waitlist opt-in, cost per application, cost per call, cost per student) with 2 to 3 clear recommendations.



You Are A Good Fit If

1. You have 1 to 3 years of hands-on experience running Meta Ads (lead gen or info/education experience is a plus).

2. You are comfortable with Meta Ads Manager, Pixel, standard events, and basic CAPI.

3. You can read numbers and make simple performance-based decisions without drama.

4. You are organized, responsive, and document what you do so others can follow it.

5. You can overlap at least 2 to 3 hours per day with US time zones.

6. You’re currently freelancing or working part time and want a long term core client, not just a one-off project.



This Role Is Not

1. Not a creative director or copywriter (we have a content and
 team).

2. Not a CMO or growth strategist d
 offers, funnels, or pricing.

3. Not a general social media manager (no organic posting, community management, or influencer work).



Scope & Engagement

1. Part-time contractor.

2. We’ll start at 5–10 hours/week for the first 60–90 days while we validate and scale Meta.

3. We guarantee a minimum of 20 hours/month, paid monthly, so your time is predictable.

4. If performance is strong and we scale ad spend, this role can grow into 15–20+ hours/week and potentially a full-time PH position.

5. Remote, flexible schedule as long as SLAs are met and campaigns are monitored on weekdays.



How To Apply



Please reply to this job post with the following:

1. A brief summary of your Meta Ads experience, including typical monthly budgets.

2. Screenshots or summaries of 2 to 3 campaigns you have managed (goal, budget, structure, and results).

3. One paragraph on how you normally set up tracking (pixel, events, CAPI) for a lead gen funnel.

4. Your part-time hourly rate and full-time monthly rate, respectively.

title: Architect (Multi-Residential Experience Required) | Advanced Revit | Brisbane-Based Architecture Firm
description:
Advanced Revit | Full-Time | Brisbane Projects



Location: Remote – Philippines

Employment Type: Full-Time (40 Hours Per Week)

Projects: Brisbane & South East Queensland, Australia



About the Opportunity



Paul Group Virtual is recruiting on behalf of a well-established and highly reputable Architecture Firm based in Brisbane, Queensland.



The firm specialises in multi-residential and mixed-use developments across South East Queensland and is seeking a Licensed Architect with strong multi-residential experience to join their team in a full-time offshore capacity.



This is a long-term position supporting Australian projects and working directly with senior architects and project directors.





Mandatory Requirements - READ CAREFULLY!!

* Licensed Architect

* Proven Australian project experience

* Minimum 5+ years professional experience

* Strong multi-residential background

* Advanced Revit proficiency (non-negotiable)

* Experience producing full construction documentation packages

* Ability to work full-time (40 hours per week)

* Experience producing multi-residential documentation sets





Project Scope

You will be involved in:

- Medium to high-density apartment developments

- Mixed-use residential buildings

- Townhouse projects

- Design development through to construction documentation



You must be confident delivering accurate, buildable documentation aligned with Australian standards.



Key Responsibilities

* Produce high-quality documentation using Revit

* Develop compliant design models

* Coordinate consultant documentation (structural, hydraulic, services)

* Ensure compliance with NCC/BCA and relevant codes

* Maintain documentation accuracy and meet project deadlines

* Participate in online coordination meetings







Technical Requirements

* 4–5+ years advanced Revit experience

* Strong construction detailing knowledge

* Understanding of Australian compliance frameworks

* Ability to work independently and manage deadlines

* Stable high-speed internet connection







Employment Details

* Long-term secure engagement

* Direct collaboration with senior architects in Brisbane

* Competitive hourly rate (AUD, based on experience)

* Paid weekly







Application Requirements

Applications will only be considered if you meet ALL of the following:



1. Short video or Loom introduction - answering these questions below:

      - Are you a Licensed Architect? Where are you registered?

      - How many years of Australian project experience do you have?

      - Describe your multi-residential experience.

      - Have you produced full construction documentation sets?

      - Confirmation of years of Revit experience



2. Submit a Multi-residential drawing samples (PDF) - HIGHLY RECOMMENDED

3. Submit yout Resume (Ensure it is accessible)

4. What is your requested hourly rate (AUD)?

5. Are you available full-time (40 hours per week)?





Submit a complete and serious application — this role can lead to long-term work and career growth with a trusted Australian firm.

title: Appointment setter
description:
Are you a persuasive communicator who speaks fluent English? Do you thrive in a fast-paced environment where your effort directly impacts your paycheck?



At USA WINDOWS & DOORS , we don't just sell windows and doors—we provide peace of mind and home security through premium impact-resistant solutions. We are looking for a high-energy Bilingual Appointment Setter to join our growth engine and turn potential leads into thriving opportunities.



The Mission

As our Appointment Setter, you are the first point of contact for our future customers. Your goal is to spark interest, qualify homeowners, and schedule high-quality consultations for our expert sales team.



What You’ll Do:

Drive Outreach: Make 120+ outbound calls per day to homeowners from our provided lead lists.



Qualify & Connect: Identify customer needs and educate them on the value of impact-resistant upgrades.



Manage Your Pipeline: Schedule appointments, follow up via text/email, and keep our CRM (Customer Relationship Management) system updated and organized.



Crush Targets: Meet and exceed daily/weekly booking goals to maximize your earning potential.



Who You Are:

Sales-Minded: You have previous experience in telemarketing, sales, or appointment setting.

Persuasive & Professional: You have a confident phone presence and can turn a "maybe" into a "yes."

Goal-Oriented: You aren't intimidated by high-volume calling; you see every call as a new chance to win.

Tech-Savvy: Comfortable using CRMs and basic computer tools.



What’s In It For You?

Guaranteed Base: $400 USD Monthly Base Salary.

Uncapped Potential: Competitive commission structure—the more you book, the more you earn.

Stability: Join a booming industry with high demand year-round.

Growth: We value talent and provide a supportive environment where you can sharpen your sales skills.



Ready to join a winning team?

If you have the drive and the voice to lead the way, we want to talk to you.



Apply now and let’s start protecting homes together!

We’re growing quickly and are looking for a Web Designer who can deliver high-quality creative work while contributing to a strong, efficient delivery team.



ABOUT YOU



The ideal person wants to grow with us, take ownership of design quality, and contribute to a high-performing creative team.



You are:

• Highly creative with a strong eye for modern, conversion-focused design.  

• Confident using Figma for web layouts, wireframing, and UI/UX design.  

• Experienced in WordPress and Elementor, capable of building and updating high-quality websites.  

• Strong in Adobe Photoshop (Illustrator is a plus) and comfortable using Canva for fast execution.  

• Able to take a brief and turn it into clean, well-structured, high-performing designs.  

• Proactive—bringing ideas, not just execution.  

• Organised, detail-oriented, and reliable with deadlines.  

• A problem solver who can think through UX, layout, and usability challenges.  

• A clear communicator who works well with designers, developers, and marketers.  

• Committed to continuous improvement in both design and systems.  



Experience Requirements:  

• Minimum 2 years experience working in a digital agency environment (required).  

• Proven experience working across multiple client projects and industries.  



 AI + DESIGN CAPABILITY (IMPORTANT)



We’re looking for a designer who understands both traditional design fundamentals and AI-assisted workflows.



You should:

• Have strong design skills without relying on AI tools.  

• Be experienced in using AI (e.g. ChatGPT or similar tools) in a professional setting to support ideation, copy structuring, wireframing support, and workflow efficiency.  

• Know how to refine and improve AI-generated outputs to meet high design standards.  

• Understand when to use AI—and when manual design thinking is required.  



If you rely entirely on AI to produce your work without understanding design principles, this role is not a fit.



 ABOUT THE ROLE



This role reports directly to the founder and works closely with the delivery and operations team.



You will:

• Design website layouts, UI elements, and digital assets using Figma.  

• Build and execute high-quality websites in WordPress (Elementor).  

• Create supporting assets such as
 creatives, banners, and social media graphics.  

• Support branding projects and assist in developing visual identities.  

• Handle WordPress updates, content changes, and visual improvements.  

• Maintain clean and organised design systems across Figma, Adobe, and Canva.  

• Contribute ideas in team discussions and project planning.  

• Ensure all design output is accurate, on-brand, and delivered on time.  



 WORK SETUP



This is a remote role, ideally suited to someone who can work within or close to Australian (Brisbane) business hours.



We’re looking for someone who wants to be part of a growing agency and contribute meaningfully to client success—not just complete tasks.



It needs to be a genuine yes from both sides.



WHAT YOU’LL GET



A supportive, growth-focused environment where your creativity and ideas genuinely matter.



• A collaborative and professional team culture  

• Clear systems and expectations to support high-quality work  

• Training and onboarding to help you succeed in the role  

• Opportunities to grow your skills in design, UX/UI, and digital strategy  

• Exposure to a wide range of industries and creative projects  

• Flexibility and trust in how you manage your work  



We believe great design drives real business results—for our clients and our team.



HOW TO APPLY



If this role sounds like a strong fit, we’d love to hear from you.



• Include the word “Stardust” creatively in your application  

• Attach your portfolio and resume  

• Include at least 3 professional references in your resume  



If you know someone who would be a great fit, feel free to pass this opportunity along.



We look forward to meeting the Web Designer who will help elevate our clients’ brands and digital presence.

title: Finance Administrator
description:
Finance Administrator



Hey! We’re Dilate, a result driven digital marketing agency with an impressive, diverse client list and a world-class, global team.

It’s our mission to do great marketing, for great businesses, ethically and in a way that benefits us all. We want our clients to win, their customers to win, and our employees to win.



We’ve got pretty ambitious growth plans and we’re looking for a Finance Administrator to join our team.



We are looking for someone highly detail-oriented, organised, and confident working with financial data. You’ll play a key role in keeping our financial operations running smoothly, with a strong focus on accuracy, compliance, and reporting.

This opportunity is part-time, 4 hours per day, 9am–1pm AWST, on a 6-month contract working with a team based in Perth, Western Australia.



So, the job.



* Perform regular and accurate Xero reconciliations, ensuring all transactions are correctly recorded and discrepancies are resolved.

* Manage sales invoicing and bill processing, including cross-checking retainers, payment terms, GST, and account codes.

* Maintain clean, organised, and up-to-date financial records for easy access and reporting.

* Prepare financial reports including cash flow, income statements, and balance sheets to support decision-making.

* Analyse financial data to identify trends, improvements, and cost-saving opportunities.

* Ensure compliance with financial regulations, company policies, and industry standards.

* Assist with audits and financial reviews, providing required documentation and support.

* Manage the finance inbox, ensuring timely responses and escalation where required.



Your skills.

* Proven experience as a Finance Administrator or similar role.

* Strong proficiency in Xero and Google Sheets (essential).

* Experience with Ignition and HubSpot (preferred).

* Solid understanding of financial principles and reporting.

* Excellent attention to detail and accuracy in data management.

* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

* Ability to work independently and meet deadlines efficiently.

* Effective communication skills and ability to collaborate across teams.

* Knowledge of financial regulations and compliance standards.



This is a great opportunity to play a key role in the financial health of a fast-growing agency.



If you feel that this is the job for you, we would love to hear from you!



Thanks for your time,

The Dilate Digital Team

title: Legal Secretary
description:
Legal Assistant (Remote – International Applicants Welcome)

Location: Remote (International)

Position Type: Full-Time

Language Requirement: Fluent English required;

Experience Level: Legal assistant / paralegal experience preferred

 

About the Firm

We are a California-based law firm focused on consumer rights, employment law, personal injury, and civil litigation. Our practice is fast-paced, detail-oriented, and client-centered. We are seeking a reliable, highly organized Legal Assistant to support case management and administrative operations so our managing attorney can focus on strategy, advocacy, and firm growth.

This role is ideal for someone who is proactive, organized, and comfortable working remotely with U.S. court systems and deadlines.

 

Key Responsibilities

Client Intake & Communication

• Answer incoming phone calls and
s from clients, potential clients, and opposing counsel

• Screen new client inquiries and conduct initial intake calls using firm-provided scripts

• Monitor website intakes and promptly follow up to schedule intake or consultation calls

• Maintain regular communication with clients regarding case status and next steps

• Follow up with clients to obtain missing information or documents

• Maintain professionalism and confidentiality in all communications

Calendaring & Case Management

• Calendar court deadlines, hearings, mediations, depositions, and internal reminders

• Monitor upcoming deadlines and proactively flag urgent matters

• Maintain accurate case notes, task lists, and updates in the case management system



Client Onboarding & Engagement

• Prepare and send representation agreements using firm templates

• Prepare intake forms and ensure proper execution by clients

• Open new matters and organize digital client files

• Collect, organize, and label client documents (IDs, police reports, contracts, statements, etc.)

Drafting & Legal Support

• Draft simple pleadings, notices, and correspondence using firm templates

• Draft basic discovery (form discovery, RFAs, RFPs, simple interrogatories) under attorney direction

• Prepare service documents and coordinate service of process

• Draft and file proofs of service

Filing & Court Support

• E-file and mail-file documents in California state and U.S. federal courts

• Confirm filings are accepted and properly docketed

• Ensure compliance with court formatting and procedural rules

Mail & Service

• Send correspondence and legal documents via 
 and similar services

• Track outgoing mail and service completion

• Coordinate with process servers and follow up as necessary

Administrative Case Closure & Compliance

• Prepare end-of-representation and disengagement letters using firm templates

• Prepare settlement closing correspondence to clients

• Prepare and file voluntary dismissals (state and federal), including notices and stipulations, under attorney direction

• Calendar dismissal deadlines and confirm filings

• Update case status and properly close and archive files

Administrative & Operational Support

• Maintain organized digital files and naming conventions

• Track signed agreements and outstanding intakes

• Assist with records requests and document gathering

• Prepare basic weekly or bi-weekly case status reports

• Assist with file maintenance, audits, and administrative projects as needed

 

Required Qualifications

• Fluency in English (written and spoken)

• Strong organizational and time-management skills

• Ability to manage multiple deadlines and tasks simultaneously

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills

• High attention to detail and accuracy

• Reliable internet connection and ability to work independently in a remote setting

 

Preferred Qualifications

• Prior experience as a legal assistant or paralegal

• Familiarity with California state courts and U.S. federal courts

• Experience with Microsoft Word, Excel, and Adobe Acrobat

• Experience in consumer law, personal injury, or employment law

• Additional language skills (Armenian or Russian a plus)

 

Important Notes

• This position does not provide legal advice

• All work is performed under attorney supervision

• All legal documents are prepared using firm templates and finalized only after attorney review and approval

• Strict confidentiality and data security are required

 

What We Offer

• Fully remote position

• Long-term opportunity with a growing firm

• Clear systems, templates, and training

• Supportive work environment with direct attorney access

title: Operations Director
description:
OPERATIONS DIRECTOR ROLE



Employee Retention Benefits, Inc. (ERB)



1. POSITION INFORMATION



Position Title: Operations Director 



Department: Operations / Client Experience 



Reports To: Integrator 



Location: Remote / Offshore (Philippines or equivalent) 







2. PURPOSE OF THE ROLE

The Operations Director is responsible for building, leading, and stabilizing ERB’s operational engine, with a primary focus on Client Service execution, internal workflows, and operational scalability.



This role ensures that all internal processes are structured, efficient, and consistently executed to support company growth.



The Operations Director owns how work gets done, ensuring that service delivery is predictable, scalable, and free from operational friction.



This is a builder and stabilizer role, not a maintenance role.



3. ROLE DEFINITION



Operations Director



Role Purpose 

The Operations Director owns Client Service (CST) execution, QA & Audit oversight (Public Sector), and internal workflow design. This role ensures that all operational processes are standardized, documented, and scalable.



The role is responsible for aligning execution across departments and ensuring that internal delivery meets company standards for accuracy, timeliness, and efficiency.



4. CORE AREAS OF OWNERSHIP



Client Service (CST execution & workflow) 

QA & Audit (Public Sector only) 

Operational capacity planning 

SOPs, systems, and documentation 

Cross-department delivery alignment 





5. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



A. Operational Strategy & Execution



Design and own end-to-end operational workflows across Client Service and internal processes 

Translate leadership priorities into structured, executable workflows 

Ensure operational readiness to support company growth and increasing demand 

Identify inefficiencies, bottlenecks, and breakdowns — and implement permanent solutions 

B. QA & Audit Oversight (Public Sector Only)



Establish and enforce QA standards and audit checkpoints 

Own: 

defect prevention 

error tracking 

root-cause resolution 

Ensure compliance with internal SOPs and data accuracy standards 

Provide QA reporting and trend analysis to leadership 

Note: QA & Audit for Private Sector accounts remains under Account Director.



C. Client Service (CST) Execution Oversight



Own CST workflow structure and execution standards 

Ensure CST workflows align with account and enrollment requirements 

Maintain: 

SLA performance

service quality standards

escalation workflows

Drive process discipline and documentation standards

Eliminate recurring service issues through systemic fixes

Current Structure: CST and Operations function as a single execution team until further organizational scaling requires separation.







D. Team Build-Out & Leadership



Hire, onboard, and develop operational support roles 

Apply EOS LMA (Lead, Manage, Accountable) principles 

Define: 

clear role accountability 

KPIs and scorecards 

Coach tea
mbers to take ownership of outcomes 

E. Systems, SOPs & Scalability



Build and maintain SOPs in ConnecTeam and operational systems 

Standardize workflows for consistency and repeatability 

Ensure adoption and proper use of: 

CRM systems 

tracking tools 

reporting platforms 

Implement operational dashboards and scorecards 





F. Cross-Functional Alignment 



Partner with Finance to support: 

billing accuracy

payroll timing

operational capacity planning

Ensure smooth operational handoffs between departments 

Align internal workflows with business needs without creating friction 





Click here to apply:

title: Senior AWS DevOps Engineer – AWS Cost Optimization & Kubernetes
description:
Job Description:

About the Role

We're a blockchain/DeFi company running production infrastructure that's bleeding money unnecessarily. Our AWS bill is sitting at $4,500/month – and we know it shouldn't be anywhere near that. We need someone who can come in, audit the whole setup, and actually fix it. Not just give us a report that sits in a folder.



We've already been through a few candidates who talked a big game but couldn't execute. We're done with that. If you're the type who needs handholding or can't work independently, this isn't for you.





What You'll Actually Do

- Audit our entire AWS infrastructure and identify exactly where we're wasting money (we expect significant savings)

- Optimize our Kubernetes clusters – right-size nodes, fix resource requests/limits, implement autoscaling that actually works

- Implement cost controls: Reserved Instances, Savings Plans, spot instances where appropriate, and cleanup of orphaned resources

- Set up monitoring and alerts so costs don't creep back up without us knowing

- Document everything you do so the team can maintain it





Hard Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

- 3+ years hands-on Kubernetes experience in production environments – EKS specifically preferred

- Deep AWS knowledge: EC2, EKS, RDS, S3, CloudWatch, Cost Explorer, Trusted Advisor

- Proven track record of actually reducing AWS costs (be ready to share numbers/percentages)

- Strong scripting skills (Python, Bash) for automation

- Infrastructure as Code: Terraform or CloudFormation (Terraform preferred)

- Self-starter who can take ownership and execute without constant oversight





!!!!CRITICAL: This Role Requires Surgical Precision

This is production infrastructure running live systems. Think of this like surgery – one wrong move can take everything down.

- NO cowboy moves. You don't delete, modify, or remove anything without a clear plan first.

- Every change must be planned out, documented, and confirmed with the CEO before execution.

- Extreme attention to detail. You double-check and triple-check before touching anything.

- If you're not 100% sure what something does, you ask first. You don't assume.

- Methodical execution only. We value careful and correct over fast and reckless.





Strong Plus

- Experience with blockchain/Web3 infrastructure

- Karpenter, Cluster Autoscaler, or KEDA experience

-  AWS certifications (Solutions Architect, DevOps Engineer)

- Experience with FinOps tools (Kubecost, CloudHealth, 
)





What We Need In Your Application

Don't send a generic application. We will ignore it. Include:

- Specific examples of AWS cost optimization you've done – what was the setup, what did you change, what % did you save?

- Your Kubernetes experience – cluster sizes you've managed, scaling strategies you've implemented

- Your availability and timezone (we need someone who can overlap with US business hours for some calls)





Compensation & Structure

- $20-25/hour based on experience and proven results

- 20 hours/week to start – potential for more hours for the right person

- Fully remote

- Initial project: Comprehensive audit + implementation plan with clear cost reduction targets





If you're someone who can actually deliver results and not just talk about them – we want to hear from you. Show us what you've done.

title: Remote Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED AS AN APPLICANT, PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR MOST UP-TO-DATE RESUME AND A VIDEO INTRODUCTION TAILORED TO THIS JOB POSTING!******



Remote Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Sunday to Thursday, 2:00 PM-10:30 PM PST (30-minute unpaid break) - Subject to client requirements

Salary: $1,200 per month



Job Overview:

We are seeking a highly skilled Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler to join our team. This role focuses on designing and detailing multi-level storage buildings, which require a unique structural approach due to their heavy load-bearing systems and specialized construction methods.

The ideal candidate is not only a strong structural engineer but also a super expert in Revit modeling, capable of creating precise, complex models with minimal supervision.



Key Responsibilities:

Design and model heavy, multi-level storage buildings using Revit.

Perform structural analysis and detailing specific to high-load industrial and storage facilities.

Develop accurate construction documents and shop drawings.

Collaborate with the engineering and design team to ensure models meet structural and architectural requirements.

Identify and solve design challenges with a focus on constructability and safety.

Maintain accuracy and consistency across all Revit models and related documentation.

Coordinate with project managers and other disciplines to ensure seamless project delivery.



Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Structural Engineering, Civil Engineering, or related field.

Industrial and commercial engineering experience preferred, particularly with heavy load-bearing structures.

Proven expertise as a Revit Modeler, with advanced knowledge of large-scale modeling.

Strong understanding of structural systems, especially for multi-level and heavy storage buildings.

Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

Excellent attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

Strong communication and collaboration abilities in a remote team environment.



Preferred Skills:

Experience with Steel Structures, Concrete Structures, Masonry Construction, Light and Gauge Steel Structures

Familiarity with BIM coordination and clash detection.

Knowledge of U.S. building codes and standards is a plus.

Knowledge of ETABS and SAFE is a plus.



Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Experienced GHL Specialist – Build Scalable Systems & Automations
description:
Milkyway Is Hiring



Are you the systems-driven GHL Specialist we’re looking for?



Are you highly organised, technically confident in GoHighLevel, and obsessed with building systems that actually work—not just look good on the surface?



Do you enjoy designing clean automations, optimising customer journeys, and turning messy processes into scalable systems?

If you’re someone who can combine structured thinking, technical execution, and smart use of AI to improve performance—not just speed—this could be the role for you.



About Milkyway

Milkyway is a digital agency helping businesses grow through strategy, branding, websites, content, and performance marketing.

Behind every high-performing campaign is a well-built system—and that’s where you come in.

We’re growing quickly and are now looking for a dedicated GHL (GoHighLevel) Specialist to join our team.



ABOUT YOU

The ideal person takes ownership of systems, thinks beyond tasks, and builds automation that supports real business outcomes—not just technical completion.



You are:

• Highly experienced with GoHighLevel (GHL). (Do not apply if you are a beginner.)  

• Confident building workflows, automations, funnels, campaigns, and dashboards end-to-end.  

• Strong in mapping and improving customer journeys across marketing and sales pipelines.  

• Exceptionally organised and detail-oriented.  

• Comfortable troubleshooting system, automation, and data issues independently.  

• Process-driven with strong logical thinking.  

• Proactive in identifying inefficiencies and improving systems before issues arise.  

• Calm under pressure and solutions-focused.  

• A clear communicator who can explain systems in simple, practical terms.  

• Accountable, reliable, and consistent in execution.  

• A fast learner who stays up to date with GHL updates and best practices.  

• At least 2 years of experience working in an agency environment.



AI + SYSTEMS CAPABILITY

We’re looking for someone who understands both traditional system building and modern AI-powered workflows.

You should:

• Be able to design and build systems without relying on AI.  

• Know how to use AI tools inside and outside GHL to enhance workflows, speed, and insights.  

• Have experience working with GHL AI features (including AI agents and voice agents).  

• Be able to refine, structure, and validate AI outputs—not just deploy them.  

• Understand where AI improves efficiency—and where manual logic and control are still required.  

If you rely on AI without understanding the underlying system logic, this role is not a fit.



ABOUT THE ROLE

The GHL Specialist reports directly to the CEO and works closely with the wider team across marketing, sales, and client delivery. You will:

• Build, manage, and optimise CRM systems inside GoHighLevel.  

• Create and maintain workflows, triggers, and automations.  

• Build and manage SMS and
 campaigns.  

• Create and optimise funnels and landing pages within GHL.  

• Manage integrations between GHL and third-party tools.  

• Monitor system performance and proactively troubleshoot issues.  

• Maintain clean pipelines, accurate contact data, and reporting dashboards.  

• Build and optimise GHL AI agents and voice agents.  

• Support onboarding of new clients into structured GHL systems.  

• Document processes and ensure systems are scalable and repeatable.  

• Create and maintain snapshots based on validated systems and workflows.  



WORK SETUP

This is a remote role, ideally suited to someone working within or close to Australian business hours.

We’re looking for someone who wants to be an integral part of a growing agency—not just complete tasks, but help build the systems behind our growth.

It needs to be a genuine yes from both sides.



WHAT YOU’LL GET

A supportive, growth-focused environment where your systems expertise makes a real impact.



• A collaborative and professional team culture  

• Clear ownership over systems and automation  

• Structured onboarding and training aligned with our standards  

• Opportunities to deepen your expertise in automation and CRM strategy  

• Exposure to a wide range of client accounts and use cases  

• Flexibility and trust in how you manage your work  

We believe strong systems are the foundation of sustainable growth—for our clients and our team.



HOW TO APPLY

If this role sounds like a strong fit, we’d love to hear from you.



Send an
 to apply and Include the word “Stardust” creatively in your application so we know you’ve read this in full.  

Add a link to your portfolio and resume. Make sure to include 3 professional references in your resume. 



If you know someone who would be a great fit, feel free to pass this opportunity along.

We look forward to meeting the GHL Specialist who will help power the systems behind our growth.

title: Content Specialist -Help Scale Brands Through High-Impact Content
description:

Are you a strong writer who can turn ideas into clear, compelling content that actually performs and not just reads well? Do you enjoy blending strategy, data, and creativity to drive real business results?



If you take pride in your craft, think beyond just writing, and know how to use both traditional content skills and modern AI tools to produce better outcomes, this could be the role for you.



About Milkyway

Milkyway is a digital agency helping businesses grow through strategy, branding, websites, content, and digital marketing. We work closely with our clients to bring clarity to their messaging and consistency to how they show up online.



We’re growing quickly and are now looking for a Content Specialist to join our team.



ABOUT YOU

The ideal person wants to grow with us, take ownership of content quality, and elevate how our clients communicate.

You are:

• A confident writer with strong attention to detail and structure.  

• Comfortable creating content across websites, social media,
 marketing, SEO, and ads.

AI + Content Capability

• Knows how to use AI tools (e.g. ChatGPT or similar on a professional set-up) to enhance speed, research, ideation, and optimisation—not replace thinking.  

• Can refine, edit, and elevate AI-generated outputs into high-quality, on-brand content.  

• Understands when to use AI—and when not to.  



If you rely entirely on AI to write for you, this role is not a fit. If you know how to leverage AI as a tool while maintaining quality and originality, you’ll thrive here.



ABOUT THE ROLE

The Content Specialist reports directly to the CEO and works closely with the wider team to support marketing and growth initiatives you will:

• Create high-quality website content, blog posts, landing pages, and SEO content.

• Analyse content performance and provide insights and recommendations.  

• Support campaign launches with coordinated content across channels.  

• Collaborate with designers, web developers, and marketing specialists.  



WORK SETUP

This is a remote role, ideally suited to someone who can work within or close to Australian business hours.

We’re looking for someone who wants to be part of a growing agency and contribute meaningfully to client success. It needs to be a genuine yes from both sides.



WHAT YOU’LL GET

A supportive, growth-focused environment where your writing and ideas genuinely matter.

• A collaborative and professional team culture  

• Clear systems and processes to support high-quality work  

• Training and onboarding to help you succeed in the role  

• Opportunities to develop your skills across content, SEO, and strategy  

• Exposure to a wide range of industries and content types  

• Flexibility and trust in how you manage your work  

We believe great content drives great outcomes—for our clients and our team.



HOW TO APPLY

If this role sounds like a strong fit, we’d love to hear from you.



Include the word “Stardust” creatively in your application so we know you’ve read this in full.  

Add a link to your portfolio and resume. Make sure to include 3 professional references in your resume. 



If you know someone who would be a great fit, feel free to pass this opportunity along.

We look forward to meeting the Content Specialist who will help take our clients’ messaging and performance to the next level.

title: Sales Manager (Remote - Part Time)
description:
Sales Manager (Remote – Part Time, Inbound Sales Focus)



Position Overview



You own sales performance from first contact through signed work.



Your job is to take inbound leads generated by our marketing 
, social media, Houzz, phone calls,
), respond quickly, qualify the right opportunities, move deals forward, and close profitable projects.



This is a sales role focused on closing and pipeline management. This is NOT a marketing role.



You are responsible for turning inbound demand into signed work while protecting company standards, capacity, and client experience.



This role starts part time with the opportunity to grow into a full-time position based on results.



What Success Looks Like



*All inbound leads are responded to quickly and professionally

*Qualified opportunities move steadily through the pipeline

*Close rate stays at 25%+ on qualified leads

*The pipeline stays organized, active, and up to date

*Signed work matches the type of projects we want more of



Key Responsibilities

Inbound Lead Management and Qualification



*Own all inbound leads from
, social media, Houzz, phone calls, and

*Respond quickly and move each lead into the next step

*Qualify prospects on budget, timeline, project type, and readiness

*Disqualify poor-fit leads to protect time and resources

*Ensure no lead is ignored, lost, or left without follow-up



Sales Process and Closing



*Own the sales process from first conversation to signed agreement

*Lead discovery calls, consultations, and follow-ups

*Handle objections and guide prospects toward decisions

*Keep deals moving and do not let opportunities go cold

*Clearly communicate scope, pricing, and next steps

*Ask for the sale and close qualified opportunities



Proposal and Deal Management



*Coordinate with the Owner on pricing and scope

*Present proposals clearly and confidently

*Capture objections, changes, and decision factors

*Ensure clients understand what is included and what is not



Pipeline Ownership



*Track every opportunity and its next step

*Keep pipeline updated daily

*Re-engage stalled opportunities

*Maintain full visibility on deal status at all times



Handoff to Production



*Hand off sold projects with complete notes and expectations

*Ensure alignment between what was sold and what will be delivered

*Communicate client priorities, timeline, and concerns clearly



Daily / Weekly Expectations

Daily



*Respond to new inbound leads

*Follow up with active prospects

*Move deals forward

*Update pipeline

*Communicate key updates to Owner



Weekly



*Review pipeline and deal stages

*Report on lead volume, conversions, and signed work

*Re-engage stalled opportunities

*Confirm next steps for all active deals



Please answer this form to officially apply:

title: Advanced Media Specialist (Adobe Suite) Graphic / Web / Print / Motion
description:
PLEASE READ THE JOB DESCRIPTION FULLY WE'RE LOOKING FOR A VERY SPECIFIC SKILL SET ... LET'S NOT WASTE EACH OTHER'S TIME



-



Role Summary:

We’re on the lookout for a highly skilled graphic designer with advanced proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and Premiere. After Effects experience is a plus. We value strong composition and typography skills, and we also give bonus points if you’re comfortable with HTML/CSS and have at least intermediate knowledge of WordPress for web-related projects.



We also encourage candidates to be prepared to discuss how they integrate AI tools into their design workflow to boost productivity and efficiency.





---



Key Responsibilities



Design & Creative Development: Create visually compelling assets for digital and web media, including video elements and social content.



Web & Interactive Design: Apply your HTML/CSS knowledge to support web design tasks and implement designs on WordPress-based sites.



---



QUALIFICATIONS



Software Proficiency: Advanced skills in Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere; familiarity with After Effects is a plus. Bonus points for HTML/CSS and intermediate WordPress knowledge.



Designing For Web -- Must have a strong understanding of responsive web design principles and considerations.



Design Expertise: Strong design principles, especially in composition, color theory, and typography.



AI Integration: Be prepared to share insights on how you incorporate AI tools into your workflow to streamline repetitive tasks and enhance creative output.



!

title: Client Success Manager (Coaching & Feedback) – $1,100/month
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term Role



Start at $935 per month base.

With bonuses, most earn around $1,100 per month.

Top performers grow to $1,800–$2,500 within 6–12 months.



Paid every two weeks via Wise. Always on time.



This is not a short-term job.

We build long-term careers.



You’ll have clear systems, call scripts, training, and daily team support.

You won’t be guessing what to do.



About Us



Young Publisher - 



We are an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.

We have hired Filipino professionals for over 5 years.

We focus on stability, structure, and growth.



What You’ll Gain



- Full-time stable income

- Monday to Friday schedule

- Flexible hours (one daily meeting required)

- No graveyard shifts

- Reliable payments via Wise every two weeks.

- Performance bonuses

- Clear path to increase your income

- All tools provided

- If you perform well, your income grows.



What You’ll Do



- Manage 40–50 clients

- Run onboarding calls (script provided)

- Review client content and give clear feedback

- Reply to messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 sessions

- Track client progress and update reports

- Join daily team check-ins

- Your role is to help clients succeed and stay long-term.



What We’re Looking For



- Strong English (written and spoken)

- Confident on Zoom calls

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet

- Quiet workspace

- Consistent and accountable



Bonus if you have experience with short-form content, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or AI tools like ChatGPT and CapCut.



How to Apply



Send a message with “CSM” as the subject line.



Include ONLY:



#1: Your CV

#2: Years of short-form content experience

#3: Years of client management experience

#4: One sentence explaining why you are a strong fit

#5: Your portfolio



Applications that do not follow this format will not be reviewed.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

 campaigns, and following up with leads through text,
, and phone calls to help convert inquiries into booked appointments.

• Create social media graphics using Canva aligned with brand aesthetic

• Assist with
 marketing (campaigns, newsletters, promotions)

• Follow up with new leads via text,
, and phone calls

• Help manage and organize incoming inquiries

• Maintain clear communication and timely responses

• Must be available to work PST hours

• Social media content planning/scheduling experience

title: Funnelish funnel builder/copywriter
description:
Hey there,



We are looking for a new tea
mber to join our fast-growing 6-figure eCommerce business.



We run multiple online stores across Europe and are scaling quickly. Because of this, we are expanding our team.



We are looking for someone responsible for one of the most important parts of our business:



Building high-converting sales funnels.



You will take products and turn them into full, branded offers that are ready to launch and convert.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



This includes:



- Product naming

- Logo creation

- Improving and refining copy

- Creating images that support the copywriting

- Structuring and building the full funnel

- Delivering a funnel that is ready to launch and convert



You will receive competitor funnels and ready-made templates as a base.



Your role is to take these and turn them into clean, well-structured, high-quality funnels that fit our standards.



This role requires speed, creativity, and strong attention to detail.



Meeting deadlines is extremely important.



4R MODEL - FUNNEL BUILDER



ROLE



- You are responsible for building complete, branded sales funnels

- You receive competitor funnels as inspiration and ready-made templates, then:

- Adapt them to our structure

- Refine and improve the copy where needed

- Create branding and visuals

- Deliver a polished funnel ready to launch



Your work directly supports our testing and scaling process.



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Work with competitor funnels as a starting point

- Adapt structure and copy to fit our templates and brand style

- Improve copywriting where needed to ensure clarity and flow

- Create a unique brand name and logo for each product

- Create images that support and strengthen the messaging

- Meet deadlines consistently

- Track working hours using our time tracking tool



RESULTS

- Funnels that meet our quality standards and KPIs

- Clean, professional branding that builds trust

- Clear, structured pages with strong flow

- Copy that supports conversions

- Consistent and reliable delivery

- Smooth collaboration with the team



REQUIREMENTS

- Experience with Funnelish or similar page builders

- Basic graphic design skills such as logo creation and image editing

- Ability to work with and adapt existing content

- Fluent in English

- Able to work independently with minimal supervision

- Organized, reliable, and deadline-driven

- Proactive communicator

- Plus: Experience in eCommerce or direct-response marketing



WHAT WE OFFER

- Full-time position, Monday to Friday, weekends off

- Excellent hourly pay 

- Bonus system linked to KPIs

- Time tracking for accurate payment

- Long-term role with growth opportunities

- Clear SOPs, templates, and competitor examples

- Fast-paced environment with strong learning opportunities



READY TO GROW WITH US?



If you enjoy structured creative work and want to be part of a fast-growing eCommerce team, we want to hear from you.



Please send:



Your resume

Samples of your work

title: IT Specialist (Microsoft 365 & End-User Support)
description:
IT SPECIALIST ROLE 



Employee Retention Benefits, Inc. (ERB) 



1. POSITION INFORMATION 



Position Title: IT Specialist (Microsoft 365 & End-User Support)  



Department: Technology / Operations Support  



Reports To: Integrator (or Operations Director, if delegated)  



Location: Remote / Offshore  



 



2. PURPOSE OF THE ROLE 



The IT Specialist is responsible for maintaining reliable day-to-day technology operations across ERB, ensuring that all users have secure, uninterrupted access to systems, tools, and platforms required to perform their roles. 



This role owns end-user support, Microsoft 365 administration, and endpoint/security management, ensuring that the organization operates efficiently, securely, and without unnecessary technical disruption. 



The IT Specialist acts as both a technical support function and a systems enabler, minimizing downtime and improving the overall employee technology experience. 



 



3. ROLE DEFINITION 



IT Specialist (Microsoft 365 & End-User Support) 



Role Purpose 

The IT Specialist provides hands-on technical support and manages core IT systems, with a focus on Microsoft 365, user lifecycle management, and endpoint security. 



This role ensures that all users are properly onboarded, supported, secured, and equipped with the tools needed to operate effectively in a remote environment. 



 



4. CORE AREAS OF OWNERSHIP 



End-user IT support (hardware, software, access)  



Microsoft 365 administration and environment management  



User onboarding and offboarding lifecycle  



Security and endpoint management (Intune, Defender, MFA)  



IT systems documentation and support processes  



 



5. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES 



A. End-User IT Support 



Provide daily technical support across:  



hardware and devices  



software and applications  



 and access-related issues  



Troubleshoot and resolve issues across:  



Windows  



macOS  



Support Microsoft Office and common business tools  



Assist users with Microsoft 365 applications:  



Outlook  



Teams  



OneDrive  



SharePoint  



Deliver timely remote support to minimize user downtime  



 



B. Microsoft 365 Environment Management 



Administer Microsoft 365 users, licenses, and access controls  



Configure and maintain:  



Exchange Online  



Microsoft Teams  



OneDrive  



SharePoint  



Manage:  



mailboxes  



permissions  



security settings  



Monitor Microsoft 365 service health and respond to issues  



Optimize license allocation to ensure cost efficiency  



 



C. User Onboarding & Offboarding 



Create and configure new user accounts  



Assign appropriate system access and licenses  



Set up:  



 accounts  



multi-factor authentication (MFA)  



required applications  



Support device setup and user configuration  



Execute secure offboarding:  



deactivate accounts  



revoke access  



ensure data security compliance  



 



D. Security & Endpoint Management 



Implement and maintain security controls, including:  



MFA  



Conditional Access policies  



password policies  



Monitor sign-in activity and respond to risk alerts  



Manage and configure:  



Microsoft Intune (device compliance, app deployment)  



Microsoft Defender for Endpoint (threat detection and response)  



Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policies  



Assist in investigation and remediation of suspicious or high-risk activity  



 



E. Systems Documentation & Process Support 



Maintain IT documentation, SOPs, and troubleshooting guides  



Standardize onboarding/offboarding processes  



Support internal teams with system access and tool configuration  



Ensure consistency in IT support workflows and resolution standards  



 



6. REPORTING & ALIGNMENT STRUCTURE 



Direct Report 



Integrator (or Operations Director if IT is nested under Operations)  



Works Closely With 



Operations Director (workflow and system alignment)  



HR (onboarding/offboarding coordination)  



Finance (license cost control and system access governance)  



All departments (end-user support)  



 



7. AUTHORITY & BOUNDARIES 



? Authority 



Owns end-user IT support and issue resolution  



Owns Microsoft 365 environment administration  



Owns user access, permissions, and system configurations  



Owns enforcement of endpoint and identity security policies  



 



? Boundaries 



Does not own business systems strategy (defined by leadership)  



Does not implement major system changes without approval  



Does not override department-specific workflows or tool ownership  



Does not act as a software engineering or development role  



 



8. KPIs & SCORECARD (EOS-ALIGNED) 



The IT Specialist is measured on: 



Average response and resolution time for IT support tickets  



System uptime and availability (Microsoft 365 and core tools)  



User onboarding/offboarding completion accuracy and timeliness  



Security compliance (MFA, device compliance, access control)  



Number of recurring IT issues (trend reduction)  



License utilization efficiency and cost optimization  



 



9. WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE 



Users experience minimal downtime and fast issue resolution  



Onboarding and offboarding processes are seamless and secure  



Microsoft 365 environment is stable, organized, and optimized  



Security risks are proactively managed and minimized  



IT issues are resolved systematically, not repeatedly  



Employees have confidence in IT support and systems reliability  



 



10. SUPPORT MODEL & EXPECTATIONS 



Full-time, remote IT support role  



Availability during standard business hours  



Responsible for both:  



reactive support (issue resolution)  



proactive support (system monitoring and improvements)  



 



11. IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE 



Proven experience in IT support or systems administration  



Strong knowledge of Microsoft 365 administration  



Experience supporting Windows and macOS environments  



Familiarity with:  



Microsoft Intune  



Microsoft Defender

title: Pay-Per-Call Partner Recruiter — Debt Settlement
description:
I run a pay-per-call operation in the debt settlement vertical. My tracking software (Ringba) and buyer relationship are fully set up. The only thing I need is someone to find the people who already produce debt settlement phone calls and get them sending calls to my tracking number.



You are not generating leads. You are not making calls to consumers. You are not running a dialer or buying data.

Your job is B2B sales. You are recruiting call partners.



There are call centers, media buyers, and telemarketers around the world who ALREADY produce debt settlement warm transfer calls every day. They already have agents, data, dialers, and consumers on the phone. Right now they sell those calls for $15–$20 each. I will pay them $25–$30 per approved call — more than they're getting now.



Your job is to find those companies, pitch them my offer, close the partnership, and hand them a tracking number. When they say yes and start sending calls, you monitor quality and keep recruiting more.



Where you find them: 
, AffLift forum, pay-per-call
 groups, Upwork, 
, and cold outreach to call center operators.



Day-to-day: Send 20+ outreach messages per day. Follow up on conversations. Onboard new partners when they agree. Monitor call quality. Keep the pipeline growing.



This is a long-term role with growth potential. You start with one vertical (debt settlement). As we scale, you'll recruit partners for additional verticals — insurance, home services, solar, legal — using the exact same playbook.



Ideal background: BPO operations, affiliate marketing, performance marketing, outbound B2B sales, or partnership recruitment. If you've worked at a pay-per-call network, CPA network, or managed affiliate/publisher relationships, you're exactly who I'm looking for.



To apply, answer this one question in your message: "If I asked you to find 5 call centers that produce debt settlement warm transfers and pitch them a $25/call offer, where would you look first and what would you say?"



Wage/Salary: $700/month + $50 bonus per partner onboarded who produces approved calls



Desired No. of Hours Per Week: 20



Business or Contact Name: Ben Horch



Skills: Select Telemarketing, Lead Generation, and Outbound Sales if those options are available.





I will eventually raise the salary to $5,000 a month once I find the right person.

title: Long-Form YouTube Video Editor (Geopolitics Niche)
description:
We’re hiring skilled long-form YouTube video editors for a fast-growing geopolitics channel. You will receive raw footage and are expected to turn it into a high-retention, engaging long-form YouTube video by adding relevant B-roll, clean pacing, and strong storytelling edits.



What You’ll Do:



- Edit long-form YouTube videos in the geopolitics niche (typically 20 minutes)

- Work from raw footage and create a clean, engaging final edit

-Add relevant B-roll (news clips, photos, news screenshots, historical footage, supporting visuals)

- Add basic motion elements when needed (zoom/crop, simple titles, emphasis text)

- Clean up pacing, remove dead air, tighten delivery, and improve flow

- Ensure high-quality audio levels and overall polish



Required Skills:



- High-level English

- Fast communication

- Proven experience editing long-form YouTube videos

- Ability to independently choose and place relevant B-roll to support narration

- Experience in Adobe Premiere Pro OR CapCut (either is fine)



Editing Style Example (Reference)



This is the style we want you to match:

(Example video)



youtu.be/yVG1Xg8zBM0?si=NnFiQRJQ9Bh2OYJ0



If you do not think you can edit the above video, do not apply.



Pay + Work Volume:



- $40 USD per video delivered + bonuses for performance

- We can provide up to 1 video per day

- Expected turnaround time: 24–48 hours per video

- Monthly workload: 10–30 videos per month depending on your speed and quality



Trial Edit (Required - will be 60 seconds in length)



To apply, you will be given a 1-minute intro editing trial.



If your edit matches the style and quality we want, you’ll be selected for ongoing work.



How to Apply (Important)



- Start your application with the word: blueberry. This is to confirm you fully read the job post.



We are looking for long-term editors we can rely on. If you’re fast, detail-oriented, and can make geopolitics content engaging, this will be consistent work.

title: Backend Developer (Automation & AI Chatbots – n8n Specialist)
description:

We are seeking a highly skilled Backend Developer with deep expertise in n8n to design, build, and maintain scalable workflow automations and intelligent chatbot systems. This role is ideal for someone who thrives at the intersection of backend engineering, automation, and AI-driven solutions.

You will be responsible for developing robust backend services, integrating APIs, and creating advanced automation pipelines that power conversational bots, internal tools, and client-facing systems. You’ll play a key role in transforming business processes into efficient, scalable, and intelligent workflows.



Key Responsibilities

 Design, develop, and maintain complex n8n workflows and automation pipelines
