 Develop and optimize AI-powered chatbots and conversational automation systems 

 Integrate and connect third-party platforms (CRMs, messaging apps, databases, SaaS tools) 

 Implement and manage API integrations (REST APIs, webhooks, OAuth authentication) 

 Create automation solutions using n8n, Zapier, and other integration tools

 Work with WordPress environments, including API integrations and automation workflows 

 Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize existing automation systems for performance and scalability 

 Collaborate with product managers, designers, and engineers to deliver reliable backend solutions 

 Ensure high availability, security, and performance of backend systems 



Required Qualifications

 Strong hands-on experience with n8n workflow automation (advanced node usage, custom nodes, complex integrations) 

 Solid backend development experience with Node.js and JavaScript

 Proven experience building or integrating chatbots or conversational AI systems

 Strong understanding of API design and integrations (REST, webhooks, OAuth) 

 Experience with Zapier or similar automation platforms 

 Experience working with WordPress, including backend integrations and automation 

 Familiarity with databases (SQL/NoSQL) and scalable backend architectures 

 Experience with cloud platforms and deployment environments 

 Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently 

 Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate in a remote team 

 Availability to work during US standard business hours (Monday–Friday)



Nice to Have

 Familiarity with messaging platforms like Slack, 
, WhatsApp, or

 
 experience (CI/CD pipelines, containerization, cloud infrastructure)

What We’re Looking For

 A proactive developer who can take ownership of automation systems end-to-end 

 Someone passionate about efficiency, automation, and AI-driven solutions

 A builder who enjoys solving complex problems with scalable architecture 

 A team player who can also operate independently in a fast-paced environment

title: Risk Associate
description:
AJG Transport is a safety focused trucking company committed to running safe, compliant, and efficient operations across the U.S. We are looking for a Risk & Operations Associate to help monitor trucking operations, ensure compliance, and support smooth coordination between drivers and dispatch. This role is ideal for someone detail oriented, responsible, and comfortable working in a fast paced and structured logistics environment.



Role Overview

As a Risk & Operations Associate, you will monitor real time trucking operations to ensure safety, compliance, and continuity by preventing HOS violations, identifying and escalating risks early, maintaining accurate documentation, and supporting either day or night shifts based on business needs.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Monitor safety in trucking operations in real time

• Track Hours of Service (HOS) and ELD compliance

• Identify drivers nearing violations and take proactive action

• Respond to and escalate issues such as delays, a
, equipment concerns, or policy violations

• Conduct basic i
 documentation and reporting

• Log repairs and upload invoices into Loadstop

• Generate simple compliance and audit reports

• Communicate with dispatch, drivers, and leadership as needed

• Ensure clean shift handoffs and clear documentation



What We’re Looking For

• Have experience in US trucking, dispatch, fleet operations, safety, or compliance

• Understand HOS, ELD systems, and FMCSA/DOT standards (strong plus)

• Are comfortable monitoring multiple drivers and assets at once

• Stay calm and organized in a fast paced environment

• Communicate clearly via chat,
, and i
 reports

• Follow SOPs consistently

• Type at least 50 WPM

• Follows instructions consistently and executes with precision

• Team oriented, coachable, and open to feedback without ego



Schedule & Work Setup

• Full Time | Sunday – Thursday 11 PM - 9 AM CDT & Tuesday – Saturday 3 PM - 1 AM CDT

• Must work U.S. business hours

• Collaborative Zoom based work environment (with camera open)

• Time tracking software used for accountability and performance support



Why Join AJG Transport?

• Stable full time opportunity

• Clear responsibilities and structured workflows

• Training and leadership support

• Growth opportunities within operations and safety

• Work directly with US trucking operations



If you’re dependable, detail oriented, and understand the importance of having a safety and monitoring team in a logistics company, recognizing that proactive risk management protects drivers, ensures compliance, and prevents costly disruptions, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Paid Media and Client Success Coordinator
description:
We are an established Australian digital marketing agency looking for a smart, reliable, client-focused Paid Media and Client Success Coordinator based in the Philippines.



This is a junior-to-mid-level role, ideal for someone who enjoys both people and performance marketing.



You do not need to be the final strategist for every account. Our leadership team will handle much of the higher-level strategy. What we need is someone who can help manage campaigns well, communicate confidently with clients, work closely with our team, and embrace modern tools, including AI, to improve speed and quality.



If you love being part of a team, building strong client relationships, learning new platforms, and using technology to work smarter, we would love to hear from you.



About the role



You will help manage paid media accounts, support client communication, and work with our internal team to keep campaigns moving smoothly.



You will also be expected to use modern tools, including AI, as part of your workflow. We are looking for someone who is curious, adaptable, and excited by where digital marketing is heading.



What you will be doing



• Support campaign management across Google Ads, Meta Ads, and other platforms where relevant

• Assist with launches, optimisation, audience targeting, creative testing, reporting, and account QA

• Join client calls and communicate with clients in a clear, friendly, confident way

• Build strong relationships with clients and help them feel supported

• Work with our team to action campaign tasks and keep projects organised

• Use AI tools and workflow tools to improve research, execution, reporting, and delivery

• Help manage AI supported implementation workflows, including tools such as Manus and ChatGPT

• Review tracking, conversion actions, landing pages, and campaign structure for accuracy

• Stay open to learning new platforms, systems, and processes as we grow



Platforms you may work across



• Google Ads

• Meta Ads

• LinkedIn Ads

• TikTok Ads

• YouTube

• Microsoft Ads

• Other paid media platforms as needed



You do not need to be an expert in every platform already, but you must have solid paid media fundamentals and be willing to learn.



What we are looking for



• Excellent written and spoken English

• Strong client communication skills

• Friendly, professional, and confident in meetings

• Organised, detail oriented, and reliable

• Comfortable working as part of a team

• Open to feedback, coaching, and continuous improvement

• Comfortable with AI, automation, and modern technology

• Understanding of paid media fundamentals, including objectives, targeting, budgets, tracking, creative testing, and reporting

• Hands on experience with Google Ads and Meta Ads

• Reliable internet, a quiet workspace, and the ability to attend video meetings



This role is a great fit if you are



• Client focused and genuinely enjoy building relationships

• Curious about new technology and excited to use AI well

• Coachable and happy to grow with a team

• Proactive, calm, and solutions focused

• Interested in long term career growth in digital marketing



This role is not a fit if you



• Resist new technology or refuse to use AI tools

• Dislike speaking with clients

• Need constant direction for every task

• Struggle to adapt when platforms and processes change



Why join us



• Long term opportunity with room to grow

• Supportive team environment

• Clear strategic direction from leadership

• Exposure to multiple paid media platforms

• Opportunity to work closely with clients and make a real impact

• Modern, forward thinking agency environment



How to apply



Please send the following:



• A short introduction about yourself

• Your experience with Google Ads, Meta Ads, and any other paid media platforms

• A brief summary of the types of clients or campaigns you have worked on

• A short voice note or video introduction

• Your expected monthly salary in PHP

• Your available work hours

• The words AI Ready at the top of your application so we know you read the full ad



Please also answer these questions:



What paid media platforms have you worked on directly?

What do you enjoy more, client communication, campaign management, or a mix of both?

How have you used AI or automation tools in your work so far?

Tell us about a time you helped improve a client relationship or solved a campaign issue

What interests you about working with a team like ours?



Do not send a generic application. We are looking for someone thoughtful, switched on, and genuinely excited to grow with us.

title: Operations Executive / Dispatch Operations Manager (Build & Lead a Dispatch Company)
description:
About Us



We are a U.S.-based towing company operating within the AAA Northeast network as an Independent Service Provider (ISP). Our company handles roadside assistance and towing services and has built a strong reputation for reliability and performance.



We are now launching a dispatching company that will support towing companies and roadside providers across the United States.



We are looking for a high-level operations professional who wants to help build and lead this operation from the ground up.



This is not just a job — this is a long-term leadership opportunity for someone who wants to grow with a fast-scaling company.



Your Role



The first phase of this position will involve learning how our dispatching systems and workflows operate.



Once trained, you will help manage our dispatch operations and oversee a team of dispatchers based in the Philippines.



Over time, you will help build systems, train staff, improve efficiency, and scale the company.



Key Responsibilities



• Learn and master dispatch operations for roadside and towing services

• Assist with managing daily dispatch workflow

• Oversee a team of remote dispatchers in the Philippines

• Monitor response times, service quality, and call handling

• Build dispatch procedures and standard operating systems

• Assist with hiring and training dispatch staff

• Improve operational efficiency and scalability



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who thinks like an operator and problem-solver, not just an employee.



Ideal traits:



• Strong leadership and organizational skills

• Excellent English communication (written and spoken)

• Experience managing remote teams

• Ability to build systems and processes

• Highly reliable and detail-oriented

• Comfortable learning new software platforms



Experience in any of the following is a major advantage:



• Dispatching

• Logistics operations

• Customer service leadership

• Transportation or roadside assistance industries

• Operations management



Work Setup



• Full-time remote position

• Long-term opportunity

• Work directly with the U.S. company owner

• Opportunity to grow into a senior leadership role



Compensation:

Starting salary $640 to $1500 USD

Competitive salary depending on experience, with potential performance bonuses as the company grows.



How to Apply



To apply, please include:

A short introduction about yourself (send 1 min intro video)

Your experience managing operations or teams

A short description of a system or process you helped improve

Your expected monthly salary



We are looking for someone who wants to build something meaningful and grow with the company long term.

title: Ads Strategist for E Commerce Brands
description:
We’re an e commerce team testing multiple products every month and we’re looking for an ads strategist to join us long term.



Your role is to build the marketing and advertising strategy behind each product before launch and during scale. We are not looking for someone who only runs ads. We need someone who understands how to find the right angle, build the right campaign structure, guide creatives, and make decisions from data.



Main tasks:

• Research the product, market, competitors, and target audience

• Find strong marketing angles, hooks, desires, pain points, and positioning

• Build the ad strategy for each product launch

• Define campaign structure, audience testing, budget distribution, and scaling plan

• Give clear ad directions to the creative team for statics, videos, and UGC

• Write briefs for creatives, hooks, offers, and messaging angles

• Analyze ad performance and identify what to cut, improve, retest, or scale

• Improve CPA, CTR, conversion rate, and overall profitability

• Work with the team to constantly test new ideas and new products



What we need from you:

• Strong experience with e commerce paid ads

• Good understanding of Meta ads, testing strategy, and scaling logic

• Strong marketing sense, not just technical ad manager skills

• Ability to read data and turn it into clear action

• Someone proactive, sharp, and serious about performance



Work style:

We test many products every month, so this is long term work with constant volume for the right person.

title: Track & Trace Assistant – Quality Assurance
description:
GH Logistics is a growing freight brokerage and asset based logistics company specializing in dry van and reefer freight. Our team is built on strong systems, clear communication, and reliable execution. As we continue to scale nationally, we are looking for a Track & Trace Assistant – Quality Assurance to help ensure that every load is verified, compliant, and properly tracked before it moves. If you’re someone who notices the small details, enjoys organized processes, and takes pride in preventing problems before they happen this role may be a great fit.



Role Overview

Your work directly prevents missed pickups, tracking gaps, compliance issues, and communication breakdowns while collaborating closely with Operations, Sales, and Management to ensure loads move smoothly and safely with clear SOPs, structured workflows, and strong team support to help you succeed.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Review next day loads before execution

• Verify driver details (name, phone number, reachability)

• Confirm CDL validity and compliance

• Assign and confirm active tracking (FourKites and/or Samsara)

• Call drivers to confirm pickup and delivery details, appointment times, and equipment requirements

• Download and upload customer tenders when applicable

• Ensure load information is accurate in the TMS and QA trackers

• Document findings clearly and consistently

• Escalate issues when something does not meet standards

• Maintain organized records and support process improvements



What Success Looks Like

• All next day loads are reviewed before execution

• Tracking is active and confirmed

• Potential issues are caught early

• Documentation is clear and organized

• Escalations are timely and professional



Who We’re Looking For

• Have experience in US. logistics, freight, tracking, quality assurance, or operational audit

• Are comfortable auditing details and verifying information

• Understand that small details prevent big operational problems

• Follow SOPs consistently

• Communicate clearly with drivers and internal teams

• Stay organized while handling multiple tasks

• Work well independently in a structured remote environment

• Are open to feedback and continuous improvement

• Have strong written and verbal English skills

• Type at least 50 WPM



Work Setup & Schedule

• Full Time | 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST or 3 PM - 1 AM CST (San Antonio time)

• Must work U.S. business hours

• Collaborative Zoom based work environment (open camera & unmute mic)

• Time tracking tools used to support accountability



Why Join GH Logistics?

• Clear processes and defined expectations

• Structured systems and documented SOPs

• Supportive team collaboration

• Performance based growth opportunities

• Critical role that directly impacts operational success



If you take pride in doing things right and preventing issues before they happen, we’d love to hear from you.



Apply Here

title: Media Specialist
description:
Job Title: Media Specialist

Location: Remote (Working Hours: 9 AM – 6 PM PST Monday to Friday)



Position Summary

We’re expanding our media team and looking for experienced, results-driven individuals ready to thrive in a fast-paced and dynamic environment. This is a unique opportunity to work closely with our in-house U.S. marketing team and support digital campaigns for some of the biggest car manufacturers in the world.



As a Media Specialist, you will play a key role in executing, monitoring, and optimizing paid media campaigns across Google, Meta 
/Instagram), TikTok, and more. This position offers hands-on exposure to high-budget accounts, advanced campaign strategies, and collaboration with a top-tier team.

We are seeking candidates with at least 3 years of paid media experience who are detail-oriented, accountable, and eager to contribute to a collaborative team.



Key Responsibilities

? Manage and optimize paid media campaigns across platforms (Google, Meta, TikTok, etc.)

? Pull, analyze, and update daily campaign performance reports

? Monitor budgets, pacing, and bidding strategies to ensure efficiency and strong ROI

? Support A/B testing and creative optimization to improve campaign results

? Collaborate with U.S.-based marketing and creative teams

? Follow established workflows and ensure quality assurance in campaign execution



Requirements

? Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience managing paid media campaigns across Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, TikTok Ads, etc.

? Strong attention to detail and ability to follow directions precisely

? Analytical skills with the ability to interpret data and optimize accordingly

? Proficiency in Google Sheets/Excel for tracking and reporting

? Familiarity with ad tracking (UTM parameters, Meta Pixel, GA4, etc.)

? Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional workspace

? Must be available to work 9 AM – 6 PM PST, Monday to Friday



What We Offer

? Opportunity for overtime work and performance-based bonuses

? Training on internal tools, reporting processes, and workflow systems

? Work with a highly experienced U.S. marketing team and major global brands

? Clear path for career growth and skill development within a fast-growing company

Ready to join a high-performing digital media team?

Apply today and bring your skills to an exciting, fast-moving industry.

title: Healthcare Intake & QA Coordinator
description:
DO NOT APPLY IF you do not meet the qualifications listed below.



Position Summary



We are seeking a highly organized and service-oriented Virtual On-Call Support Specialist to provide remote administrative and coordination support during after-hours, evenings, and weekends.

This role supports intake operations, scheduling follow-up, patient call management, customer service, care coordination assistance, QA support, and EMR documentation tasks.

The ideal candidate has prior healthcare experience, strong computer proficiency, excellent English communication skills (oral and written), and the ability to remain calm and professional during urgent situations.



Key Responsibilities



Intake & Administrative Support



• Assist with intake processing and referral coordination

• Upload and track physician orders in EMR

• Upload and monitor endorsement reports

• Ensure timely documentation processing and electronic filing

• Maintain organized and accurate digital records



Scheduling & Care Coordination



• Schedule and confirm follow-up visits

• Support communication between field clinicians and office staff

• Assist with care coordination activities

• Escalate urgent or clinical matters to appropriate leadership



Patient & Customer Service Support



• Answer and triage incoming patient and caregiver calls

• Provide professional, courteous, and compassionate customer service

• Accurately document all calls in EMR

• Route concerns appropriately and promptly



Quality Assurance (QA) Support



• Assist with documentation tracking and follow-up

• Support compliance monitoring processes

• Help ensure required documents are uploaded and complete

• Maintain organized electronic QA files



Qualifications & Requirements



Required



• Prior healthcare experience (home health, hospice, clinic, hospital, or medical office)

• Strong English language proficiency (oral and written)

• Excellent customer service skills

• Highly organized with strong attention to detail

• Strong computer skills and proficiency in Microsoft Office

• Ability to multitask and work independently

• Ability to work after-hours, evenings, and weekends (U.S. Pacific Time)

• Reliable high-speed internet and professional work environment



Preferred



• Home Health experience preferred

• EMR experience preferred

• Medical background (RN, LVN, Medical Assistant, or allied health) preferred

• Clinical licensure preferred





How to Apply



• Please send a short cover letter highlighting your experience relevant to the role you are applying for, and include your answers to the questions below:

1. Please describe your healthcare experience in detail. Include the setting (home health, hospice, clinic, hospital, etc.), your role, how long you worked there, and the specific administrative or coordination tasks you handled.

2. How many years of experience do you have specifically in Home Health?

3. How many years of experience do you have within Home Health?

4. How many years of experience do you have scheduling Home Health clinicians?

5. What Home Health EMR systems have you used (e.g., Kinnser/WellSky, Homecare Homebase, Axxess, etc.)?

6. Describe your experience handling intake and patient calls in Home Health.

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) – High-Volume Cold Calling (B2G)
description:
Remote / Work From Home | Company based in California

Full-Time | Remote | CST Hours



About Us

Bi-Rite Global is a certified small business and a trusted retailer that supplies a wide range of products to government agencies — including federal, state, and education sectors. Based in California, we are rapidly expanding and focused on delivering quality products, competitive pricing, and reliable service to our government partners.



Role Summary

We are looking for a Sales Development Representative (SDR) – High-Volume Cold Calling (B2G) that is responsible for initiating outbound calls to federal, state, and local government agencies to identify contracting opportunities, introduce company services, and qualify decision-makers involved in procurement. The role supports the business development pipeline by generating leads, setting capability briefings, and gathering intelligence on upcoming bids and purchasing needs.



Key Responsibilities

• Conduct high-volume outbound calls to government agency front desks and effectively navigate phone trees to reach relevant departments

• Ask targeted, strategic questions to identify key procurement or purchasing decision-makers (by name and role)

• Introduce company capabilities and differentiate services

• Qualify opportunities based on agency needs, budgets, and timelines

• Schedule capability briefings or discovery meetings for sales/business development teams

• Gather information on upcoming solicitations, RFPs, and purchasing cycles

• Accurately capture and log contact details (name, title,
, direct phone line) into a CRM or tracking spreadsheet

• Professionally handle gatekeepers and objections, including situations where information is not readily disclosed

• Maintain organized and up-to-date contact lists to support ongoing outreach efforts

• Track targets such as contacts reached, meetings set, and opportunities generated



Role Focus

• This position is primarily focused on contact discovery and list building, not full-cycle sales or closing.



Qualifications 

• Professional phone presence and clear communication skills

• Persistent and comfortable with high-volume outbound calling and rejection

• Strong research skills to identify government decision-makers

• Organized with accurate CRM documentation and time management

• Understanding of B2G (Business to Government) sales or ability to learn quickly

• Experience in lead generation, appointment setting, telemarketing, or inside sales

• Exposure to government procurement or public-sector contracting preferred

• Familiarity with RFP/RFQ processes, vendor registrations, and contract vehicles is an advantage

• Able to clearly present company capabilities and services



Work Environment

• 100% Remote (must have reliable work-from-home setup)

• Structured schedule aligned with business hours of government agencies

• Use of approved scripts and compliance-focused communication

• Calls primarily to public offices, vendors, or registered partners

• Performance tracked by call quality, accuracy, and documentation — not aggressive contracting

• Collaboration with compliance, procurement, and contracts teams

• Strict adherence to data privacy, confidentiality, and record-keeping standards

• Professional and formal communication style required

• This is a full time position



Technical Requirements

• Stable internet (minimum 50 Mbps download/upload on fiber connection)

• Backup internet (LTE mobile data or pocket Wi-Fi)

• Laptop or desktop with Intel i5 equivalent or higher, 8GB RAM

• Quality headset with noise-canceling microphone

• Functional webcam



What’s Next

Send your application with the subject line:  “I want this job – SDR”



Include:

1. A 2-minute introduction Loom video about yourself and your cold calling experience.

2. Attach your Loom URL, resume, and any relevant experience samples in this form (
). 



Important: Only candidates who follow instructions will be considered.

title: E-commerce Operations Rockstar – Online Gaming Retailer
description:
Want to be part of the future of gaming retail?

Are you highly self-motivated, detail-oriented, and a bit of a tech detective? We are looking for a Product & Operations VA to join our team at our online gaming retail shop. This isn't just "typing data": it’s about managing the pulse of our online stores across WooCommerce, Amazon, Shopee, Lazada, Carousell and TikTok.



The Mission:

We are a growing gaming retail company. Your work will involve everything from hunting down product specs for the latest ASUS gear to managing price health and keeping our social media buzzing.



What You’ll Be Doing:

- The Hunt: Source product data/images from Amazon, Play-Asia, GameFly, and manufacturer sites. No links provided, you find the best info!

- Store Management: Data entry, content verification and data migration between platforms.

- Pricing & Stock Ninja: If a supplier drops a price by $30, you're the one updating our store to stay competitive. If they restock, you're reactivating our listings.

- AI-Powered Socials: Use AI tools to write and schedule engagement-triggering posts.

- Problem Solving: Handling "Listing Errors" (e.g., if TikTok rejects a brand, you find the workaround)

- Operations: Order processing and occasional customer service when needed.



The "Tech-Forward" Catch:

We are obsessed with efficiency. To help us build better tools for you, you will live-stream your screen via a private YouTube link during your shift. This helps us identify bottlenecks and eventually build automation that makes your job easier and more focused on high-level verification rather than manual typing.



What You Need:

- The Beast: A PC with at least 16GB RAM (Non-negotiable).

- The Connection: Fast Fiber + 5G Backup for when the power/internet dips.

- The Brain: Self-motivated, meticulous, and an independent learner. Gaming interest is a HUGE plus.

- The Commitment: 48 hours/week. Monday to Saturday.



Salary: $450 USD / Month (Fixed), no 13th month. Paid bi-weekly via Wise.



How to Apply: I do not check DMs. Please apply strictly via this Google Form: gms.hm/vahire26

title: Commercial Property Operations Coordinator
description:

Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM Pacific Time, with a 1-hour break

Salary: $1100 per month



Job Overview:

We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly organized Commercial Property Operations Coordinator to support a commercial real estate portfolio of retail and office properties by overseeing maintenance tracking, vendor coordination, compliance monitoring, lease administration support, and day-to-day operational follow-ups. This role works closely with the onshore property management team to ensure tasks are properly tracked, vendors are consistently followed up with, timelines are met, and nothing falls through the cracks during high-volume periods. Spanish-speaking ability is required to effectively communicate with Spanish-speaking vendors.



Key Responsibilities:



* Maintenance & Work Order Tracking

Maintain a master log of maintenance and repair items across commercial properties

Track work orders from scheduling through completion and invoicing

Follow up with vendors and onsite staff to confirm timelines and status

Flag delays, non-responses, or repeat issues for escalation

Maintain clear status categories (requested, scheduled, in progress, completed, invoiced)



* Vendor Coordination & Follow-Up

Send bid requests and RFPs using approved templates

Track incoming proposals and follow up on outstanding bids

Coordinate vendor scheduling and access after vendor selection

Collect close-out documentation (photos, completion confirmation, invoices)

Assist with vendor onboarding documentation (W-9s, COIs, licenses)



* Administrative & Compliance Support

Answer office phone

Track routine inspections, testing, and compliance items (fire/life safety, elevator, backflow, etc.)

Assist with COI tracking for tenants and vendors

Support documentation requests from tenants, vendors, lenders, and internal team

Maintain organized digital files and trackers for commercial properties

Assist with utility account transfers and service changes as directed



* Lease & Property Administration (Non-Legal)

Maintain lease abstract summaries (critical dates, options, notice deadlines)

Track upcoming renewals, options, and notice requirements

Prepare routine notices using approved templates for review

Maintain updated tenant contact lists and
 distribution lists.



* Task Tracking & Operational Support

Track open items and ensure follow-up

Send reminders and status updates to keep projects moving

Support multiple concurrent projects by maintaining timelines and next steps

Provide weekly status summaries of open items and priorities



Required Skills & Qualifications:



2–4 years of experience supporting commercial property management or real estate operations

Spanish language proficiency (spoken) is preferred to support vendor coordination

Familiarity with maintenance workflows, vendor coordination, and property documentation

Strong organizational and follow-up skills

Excellent written English and professional communication skills

Comfortable working with spreadsheets, trackers, and task management tools

Detail-oriented, reliable, and comfortable working behind the scenes

Able to manage multiple tasks and follow up consistently without dropping items



Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Data Entry Specialist (AI/Data Analytics Background Preferred)

We are growing and hence looking for new highly motivated new team members who would like to join a supportive team that cares about making a real difference to our customers' lives.



About the role

We are looking for a Metro Manila based, experienced Data Entry Specialist whose primary role will be to support the fatsecret Content Team in data entry and management of ongoing projects.



Things you’ll work on:

- Collect and prepare food and nutrition data for computer entry by compiling and sorting information

- Sound written and verbal communication skills

- Time management skills

- Strong work ethic

- Computer literacy and familiarity with various computer programs

Background or experience in the following is considered an advantage:

- Nutrition, dietetics, or health-related fields

- Experience building AI solutions for real-world environments (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude or others)

Why work with us?

- Quarterly in person gatherings

- Long term career potential to grow your skills and leadership qualifications

Working Hours:

9am - 5pm AEST



How to Apply:

1. Links to your uploaded resume and a 1-minute self-introduction video describing your working style (Kindly ensure the files are accessible.)

I.MOVE. Health and Performance is a healthcare and movement-focused brand driven by a passion for helping people move better, feel better, and live better. We're growing fast and looking for a creative, driven, and self-motivated Marketing Assistant to join our remote team and support our social media presence on Instagram.

We strongly believe that life is about building relationships and continuing to evolve into the best versions of ourselves. We prioritize instilling optimism in an environment that promotes continuous learning with a growth mindset.

title: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Sales Manager
description:
Role purpose: Identify, qualify, and progress new business opportunities for Microsoft Dynamics 365 solutions within legal services, education, and healthcare markets, generating qualified leads and supporting the sales cycle through to signed agreements in collaboration with our internal marketing, sales and technical teams.



Key Tasks & Responsibilities



Lead generation & prospecting: Source new opportunities via your network, outbound outreach, events/webinars, LinkedIn, partner channels, and market research.

Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) targeting: Focus on legal services, education, and healthcare organisations that align to agreed ICP criteria (size, geography, current systems, buying triggers).

Discovery & qualification: Run initial discovery calls to understand business objectives, pain points, current platforms, timeline, budget range, and stakeholders; qualify using agreed criteria (e.g., BANT/MEDDICC-style).

Stakeholder mapping: Identify decision makers, influencers, procurement, and technical contacts; maintain an engagement plan to progress the opportunity.

Solution positioning: Articulate the value of Microsoft Dynamics 365 (CRM/Customer Service/Sales/Marketing/Field Service and related Power Platform capabilities) in industry-relevant terms.

Appointment setting & handover: Book qualified meetings for internal sales/solution specialists; provide a complete handover pack (account background, needs, stakeholders, qualification notes, next steps).

Pipeline progression support: Stay engaged through the sales cycle—support follow-ups, coordinate stakeholders, and help remove blockers to keep momentum.

Pre-sales coordination: Coordinate demonstrations, workshops, and scoping sessions with internal resources; ensure the prospect is prepared and the agenda is outcome-focused.

Basic requirements capture: Capture high-level functional requirements and success measures; contribute to initial solution fit assessment (without delivering detailed technical design).

Commercial awareness: Support development of deal scope and commercial assumptions by sharing prospect context and services expectations; assist with proposal/Q&A coordination as needed.

CRM administration: Maintain accurate, timely updates in Dynamics 365 CRM (leads, contacts, accounts, activities, notes, stage, forecast, and next actions).

Reporting: Provide weekly activity and pipeline reporting, including lead sources, conversion rates, and expected close dates.

Compliance & confidentiality: Handle prospect and customer information responsibly; comply with applicable privacy, anti-bribery, and ethical selling requirements.

Continuous improvement: Share market feedback (competitors, pricing expectations, objections, feature requests) to improve messaging and go-to-market approach.



Expected Outputs



A consistent flow of qualified leads aligned to agreed criteria.

Completed discovery/qualification notes and stakeholder maps for each progressed opportunity.

Booked and attended introductory meetings with internal sales/technical teams as required.

Up-to-date CRM records and weekly activity/pipeline reporting.

title: DM Setter/Appointment Setter via Social Media
description:
NOW HIRING — Instagram DM Setter (Virtual Assistant) | Coaching & Mentorship

Remote | Full-Time | Philippines-Based | Performance Bonuses



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are a fast-growing coaching and mentorship company helping individuals unlock their full potential and expand their professional opportunities. We are looking for a driven, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to serve as our Instagram DM Setter — the first point of contact for potential clients and the bridge between our audience and our coaching team.

This is not a copy-paste spam role. We are looking for someone who is genuinely curious, emotionally intelligent, and skilled at having natural conversations that uncover whether someone is the right fit for what we offer.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Your primary responsibility is to initiate and manage Instagram DM conversations that identify qualified leads — individuals who could genuinely benefit from our coaching program.



Reach out to and engage with target prospects on Instagram daily

Build genuine rapport through natural, thoughtful conversation

Ask strategic questions to identify and confirm the Big 3 qualifiers (see below)

Book qualified leads onto the calendar for a strategy call with our team

Track all outreach, conversations, and bookings in our CRM / tracking sheet

Follow up with warm leads who haven't yet booked

Report daily metrics and conversation updates to the team

Maintain a professional, consistent tone that reflects our brand voice





THE "BIG 3" QUALIFIER FRAMEWORK



A lead is only considered a QUALIFIED CALL when all three of the following qualifiers are confirmed within the DM conversation. Each qualified call earns you a $10 bonus — paid in addition to your base monthly salary, with no cap on how many you can earn.

QUALIFIER #1 — Age & Eligibility

The prospect must be a high school student or older. Our target market is 16–22 years of age. This ensures they are at a stage in life where our coaching can make a meaningful and lasting impact.

QUALIFIER #2 — Belief in Untapped Potential

The prospect must have expressed, in some form, that they believe their current results don't reflect what they're truly capable of. This can sound like: "I feel like I have more in me," "I know my velocity could be better," "I'm not operating at my ceiling," or anything of similar nature.

QUALIFIER #3 — Expressed Frustration or Motivation to Improve

The prospect must have clearly expressed a desire or frustration tied to improving their situation — whether that's career, income, performance, mindset, or overall opportunities. They want more, and they're ready to do something about it.

All three qualifiers must be confirmed before booking. A call that does not meet all Big 3 criteria will not count as a qualified call and will not earn the $10 per-call bonus. Quality over quantity — every bonus you earn should be one you're proud of.



KPIs & PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS



DMs Sent Per Day — Minimum: 80+ | Top Performer: 120+

Response Rate — Minimum: 20%+ | Top Performer: 35%+

Qualified Calls Booked Per Month — Minimum: 25 | Top Performer: 40+

Lead-to-Call Conversion Rate — Minimum: 5%+ | Top Performer: 10%+

Response Time During Shift — Minimum: Under 10 min | Top Performer: Under 5 min

KPI reviews occur at 30, 60, and 90 days. Consistent underperformance on core metrics will be addressed with a performance improvement plan before any further action.



SCHEDULE & HOURS





Full-time position: 40 hour weeks, shifts listed below under "Typical shift".

Hours: Central Standard Time (CST) — our target audience is most active in the afternoon and evening

Typical shift: 4:00 PM – 10:00 PM CST Monday-Friday, 2:00 PM - 10 PM CST Saturday (40 hours a week). Morning hours see little to no engagement as our target audience (student-athletes) is in class and not active on Instagram during these times

You are expected to be online, responsive, and active during your full shift

Weekend coverage may be requested occasionally and will be compensated accordingly

We actively monitor activity during your shift. If hours are missed without prior notice, pay will be reduced accordingly for that time. In the event of a power outage, internet issue, or other circumstance outside your control, we are not responsible for pay during that lost time — however, you are welcome to make up those hours over the weekend to retain your full weekly pay





COMPENSATION & PAY SCALE



Starting Rate — $450/month base | $7 bonus per qualified call

30-Day Review (25+ qualified calls) — $475/month base | $10 bonus per qualified call

60-Day Review (25+ calls/month consistently) — $500/month base | $10 bonus per qualified call

Top Performer / 90-Day Review — $500/month base | $12 bonus per qualified call

HOW BONUSES WORK:

You earn $10 for every qualified call booked from day one. After your 30-day review, if you have consistently booked 25 or more qualified calls per month, your bonus scales to $12 per call. Top Performers who reach the 90-day milestone earn $15 per booked call. Bonuses are tracked weekly and paid out monthly alongside your base pay. There is no cap on the number of bonuses you can earn.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR





Excellent written English communication skills — natural, warm, and professional

Experience with Instagram and social media engagement (DM outreach experience is a strong plus)

Comfortable having real conversations — not just copy-pasting scripts

Detail-oriented with strong follow-through — you track everything

Self-motivated with the ability to work independently during your shift

Reliable internet connection and a distraction-free work environment

Familiarity with Google Sheets, CRMs, or any tracking tools is a plus

Previous experience as a VA, appointment setter, or sales support role preferred





HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, please do ALL of the following when submitting your application:



Write "I read the full job description" at the top of your message.

Briefly describe (2–3 sentences) why you'd be a great DM setter

Share any relevant experience with Instagram outreach, appointment setting, or sales support

Include your availability and confirm you can work CST hours (2:00 PM – 10:00 PM)

Attach your resume or relevant portfolio



IMPORTANT: Write "I read the full job description" at the top of your message. We will not respond to messages that miss this request as an organization. This is our first test of attention to detail — a non-negotiable skill for this role.



We look forward to finding our next great DM Setter. If you're hungry, consistent, and love connecting with people — this role is for you.

title: Client Outreach and Appointment Coordinator
description:
Client Outreach and Appointment Coordinator



Remote, Philippines

Full Time, Long Term

Supporting Ottawa, Canada Automotive Operations



About the Role



We are hiring a results driven Client Outreach and Appointment Coordinator to support a busy automotive service operation based in Ottawa, Canada.



This is a performance focused role within the automotive industry. The primary objective is to generate and secure appointment volume through proactive outbound communication and disciplined CRM management.



You will play a key role in maintaining a steady flow of booked vehicles, supporting seasonal campaigns, protecting scheduling integrity, and ensuring strong customer follow up.



This is a long term, full time opportunity aligned with Eastern Standard Time business hours.



Work Schedule



• Full time, 40 hours per week

• Eastern Standard Time schedule

• Typical hours are 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM EST

• May start as early as 8:00 AM EST or extend to 6:00 PM EST depending on operational needs

• Fully remote role based in the Philippines

• Reports directly to the Canadian management team



Performance Expectations



This is an activity based and target driven role.



• Minimum average of 12 vehicles booked per day

• High daily outbound call volume

• Strong sense of urgency in all communication

• Accurate and complete CRM documentation

• Professional and confident English communication



Key Responsibilities

1. Appointment Booking and Confirmation



• Book a minimum average of 12 vehicles per day

• Promote preferred booking structure, 8:00 AM drop off and end of day pickup

• Confirm all next day appointments

• Reduce no shows through proactive confirmation calls

• Protect scheduling structure and revenue flow



2. Seasonal and Campaign Based Outbound Calling



• Execute winter and summer tire change campaigns

• Conduct air conditioning inspection campaigns

• Follow up on deferred repair recommendations

• Offer no charge multipoint inspections when appropriate

• Reactivate inactive customers



3. Tire Storage Customer Management



• Contact customers with stored tires to schedule seasonal changeovers

• Prioritize off peak booking to protect peak season capacity

• Align scheduling with revenue and capacity strategy



4. Database Clean Up and Lead Mining



• Verify and update customer contact information

• Clean incomplete or outdated CRM records

• Identify and mine new booking opportunities from the database

• Maintain organized and detailed CRM notes



5. Post Appointment Follow Up



• Call customers after completed appointments

• Collect structured and objective feedback

• Document feedback in Excel

• Categorize trends and identify recurring themes

• Report insights to management to improve service quality



Required Qualifications



• Fluent in English, spoken and written

• Experience in outbound calling, appointment setting, telesales, or customer outreach

• Comfortable working with daily targets and measurable performance metrics

• Strong organization and time management skills

• Proficient in Excel and CRM systems

• Reliable high speed internet connection

• Professional home workspace

• Available to work Eastern Standard Time hours



Ideal Candidate Profile



• Confident and persuasive communicator

• Highly disciplined and activity focused

• Comfortable making a high volume of outbound calls daily

• Detail oriented with strong documentation habits

• Results driven and accountable

• Able to work independently with minimal supervision

title: SHORT-FORM VFX ARTIST & EDITOR ROLE WITH HIGH EARNING POTENTIAL + BONUSES (Work on Ads Seen by Millions)
description:
SHORT-FORM VFX ARTIST & EDITOR - 

LONG-TERM ROLE WITH PERFORMANCE BONUSES (Work on Content Seen by Millions)



Are you a fast, creative VFX artist who can make scroll-stopping effects look effortless?

We're hiring a skilled short-form VFX artist and editor to join our in-house team at VFX Creators. 



You'll start with a paid trial, and if it's a great fit, this grows into a stable part-time role with real earning potential through performance bonuses.

We teach tens of thousands of creators and entrepreneurs how to make professional VFX content using their phones. Our content reaches millions. We need someone who can bring those effects to life for our marketing, tutorials, and social media pages.



YOUR ROLE



You'll create short-form VFX videos for three main areas: marketing hooks and ads, visual effects content for our social media pages, and tutorial edits that teach our audience how to recreate effects. Output will vary week to week - some weeks more, some less - but as we find our rhythm together, we scale up.



REQUIREMENTS



Must be proficient in Adobe After Effects, Premiere Pro, Photoshop, and CapCut. These are non-negotiable.

Beyond tools, we need someone who works fast under pressure and finds shortcuts without sacrificing quality. We are not looking for perfectionists. We want someone who can move quickly, make decisions, and deliver. You must be organized, detail-oriented, coachable, and 100% fluent in English.



THE TRIAL



Before anything becomes official, we run a paid one-week trial. You will complete four VFX hooks and one tutorial edit. Pay is $200 USD for the week.

Here is the twist: before you start, you will submit time estimates for each deliverable. We will compare those estimates to your actual time. 

This is not a trap. It is how we find people who know themselves, communicate clearly, and can work efficiently under real conditions. 

If you fall behind, we want to know about it before the deadline, not after.



COMPENSATION



Monthly retainer of $600 USD for part-time work (approx. 5hrs/day, with potential to grow into full-time. Performance bonuses on top of base pay: $100 when a full ad hook and body starts scaling, $30 when a new hook enters our testing rotation. If your work performs, you get paid more. Simple.



WHO THIS IS NOT FOR



People who need step-by-step instructions for every task. People who obsess over perfection at the expense of speed. People looking for short-term freelance gigs. People who go quiet when they hit a problem instead of communicating. 



HOW TO APPLY



You must do all three of these or your application will not be reviewed.

Send a short video introduction telling us who you are, what experience you have, and why this role excites you. Include a link to your portfolio or best past VFX work. Use the phrase "Go VFX" somewhere in your application.

We review applications on a rolling basis and will close this once we find the right person. 

Apply now.

title: Patient Support VA

The Patient Support VA position plays a crucial role in providing exceptional customer service to our patients. The ideal candidate is a highly motivated and empathetic individual with excellent communication and problem-solving skills. This role requires a strong understanding of customer service principles and the ability to effectively handle patient inquiries, resolve issues, and ensure a positive patient experience.





Responsibilities



- Respond promptly and professionally to patient inquiries via phone,
, and chat.

- Handle patient inquiries related to account access, scheduling, billing, and technical issues.

- Resolve patient issues efficiently and effectively, ensuring customer satisfaction.

- Escalate complex issues to higher-level support when necessary.

- Document all patient interactions accurately and completely in the EMR and Zendesk systems.

- Actively participate in tea
etings and contribute to process improvement initiatives.

- Foster a positive and collaborative team environment.





Qualifications



- 1-2 years of experience in customer service or a related field.

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills.

- Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

- Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.

- Proficiency in using computers and customer service tools (e.g., EMR and Zendesk).

- Ability to work flexible hours, including graveyard shifts, weekends and holidays.

- Experience with healthcare or telehealth (preferred, but not required).

title: Motion Graphics Video Editor
description:
Company: Nebula

Location: Remote

Timezone Requirement: Must overlap 9am–5pm Pacific Time by at least 6 hours

Start Date: ASAP



About Nebula

Nebula is building AI-powered tools that help people automate their work. We're scaling our content operation and need a motion graphics designer who can create polished animations, product UI demos, social video assets, and visual effects for our YouTube, X/Twitter, and marketing channels.



What You'll Do

Design and animate short-form video assets for X/Twitter, TikTok, and Instagram Reels

Create motion graphics and animated explainers for YouTube videos (intros, transitions, lower thirds, callouts, data visualizations)

Animate product UI demos and feature walkthroughs — making screen recordings feel cinematic

Build reusable templates and motion systems (intro/outro packages, branded transitions, text animations)

Create logo reveals, product launch videos, and announcement animations

Collaborate daily with our video editor and creative lead via Slack

Turn around assets within 24–48 hours; revisions same-day



Requirements

2+ years of professional motion graphics / animation experience

Expert in After Effects — this is non-negotiable. You should dream in keyframes.

Strong knowledge of Premiere Pro (for integration with video editing pipeline)

Clean, modern aesthetic — think Apple product videos, Linear changelogs, Stripe animations

Understanding of typography, color theory, and visual hierarchy in motion

Experience animating UI/product screenshots (app demos, website walkthroughs)

Fluent English (written — verbal is a plus but not required)

Reliable internet (50+ Mbps) and a machine that handles After Effects smoothly

Available during Pacific Time business hours (at least 6-hour overlap)



Nice to Have

Cinema 4D, Blender, or other 3D tools

Lottie animations for web

Figma proficiency (our design tool)

Experience with Remotion or code-based animation

Rive or SVG animation experience

Previous work with tech/SaaS brands

Illustration or character animation skills



Portfolio Requirements

Your portfolio MUST include:

At least 2 product/UI animation pieces

At least 1 explainer or motion graphics reel

Bonus: social media video assets you've created



We care more about quality and style fit than quantity. If your work looks like it could be on Nebula's channels, you're in.



How to Apply

Subject line: "Motion Graphics Application - [Your Name]"

Your portfolio/reel — Behance, Dribbble, Vimeo, or personal site

Your timezone and confirm your overlap with Pacific Time

Availability — when can you start?



EXAMPLES OF GOOD CONTENT / WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR - if your work matches this bar, or is close, then apply:

title: Clinician Support
description:
About the job



Clinician Support VA serves as a crucial liaison between healthcare clinicians and pharmacies, ensuring seamless communication and resolution of concerns related to patient treatment plans. This position primarily addresses inquiries or issues regarding clinicians’ prescribed treatments, offering timely assistance to clarify and facilitate proper implementation. Additionally, the role involves providing pharmacies with the necessary information and support to ensure accurate dispensing and adherence to the prescribed regimen, assisting clinicians as necessary for the treatment of patients, including appointment rescheduling. By maintaining clear communication and efficient problem-solving, the Clinician Support Team enhances the overall coordination of care for patients.





Responsibilities



Towards the Clinicians: These VAs help healthcare clinicians by streamlining administrative tasks, improving communication, and ensuring a smoother patient care process.

- Scheduling and managing appointments for clinicians.

- Coordinating clinicians' calendars to minimize scheduling conflicts.

- Confirming clinicians’ in-person schedule.

- Handling
 and communication with patients, pharmacies, and clinicians.

- Assisting patients with insurance queries or eligibility checks and endorsing it to the dedicated team for processing.

- Troubleshooting minor technical issues related to telehealth platforms and patient portals.

- Addressing clinicians requests and collaborating with the concerned team(s).



Towards the pharmacies: These VAs focus on supporting pharmacy operations, assisting pharmacists, and ensuring patients receive their medications promptly and correctly.

- Manage prescription refill requests, cancellations, and approvals.

- Verifying prescription details with clinicians when needed.

- Coordinate with the insurance team for prior authorization fulfillment.

- Managing communication between the pharmacy, clinicians, and patients.





Qualifications



- Good communication and organizational skills.

- Familiarity with healthcare or pharmacy software (e.g., EMRs, telehealth tools, or pharmacy management platforms).

- Knowledge of HIPAA regulations and confidentiality protocols.

- Comfortable speaking with medical staff

- Good problem-solving skills

- Attention to detail for managing sensitive patient information and compliance requirements

- With Medical Background preferred

title: Ad Creator & Video Editor (Affiliate Marketing – Short Form Ads) Platform
description:
About Us

We are a lean affiliate marketing team producing high-converting ad creatives across multiple verticals, including online gaming, financial technology, supplements, and software. We move fast, test aggressively, and prioritize performance-driven media.

We are looking for a skilled ad creator and video editor who understands how to craft sales-focused content that converts.



Role Overview

You will create short-form video ads designed to drive conversions. This includes review-style ads, high-energy TikTok-style edits, viral formats, and strong CTA-driven creatives.

You must understand how to structure ads that hook attention quickly and push viewers toward action.



Responsibilities

Create short-form video ads (primarily 15–60 seconds)

Edit engaging, flashy, fast-paced TikTok-style content

Produce review-style and talking head ads

Integrate current social media trends and popular culture into creatives

Use AI tools to generate UGC-style content and commentary

Deliver multiple variations for testing

Optimize edits based on performance feedback

Maintain clean, error-free English in all on-screen text and voice content



Required Skills

Strong video editing skills

Experience creating direct-response ads

Ability to craft compelling hooks and strong CTAs

Understanding of what makes ads convert

Excellent English (impeccable grammar required)

Resourceful and self-sufficient

Ability to follow briefs and deliver quickly



Preferred Skills

Experience with CapCut

Experience with AI video creation tools

Experience creating AI-generated UGC content

Background in affiliate marketing ads

Experience in online gaming, fintech, supplements, or software verticals



Performance & Pay

$2 per approved short-form video

Payment is based on approved deliverables

Strong performers may receive extended contracts or full-time offers



How to Apply

Send the following:

Video portfolio (required – direct links only)

Examples of performance-focused ad creatives

List of tools you use (especially AI tools and CapCut experience)

Weekly availability



Applications without a video portfolio will not be considered. Only applicants with strong English and demonstrated ad experience will be reviewed.

title: Video Creator & Editor (Music Artist – Short Form Content)
description:
About Us

We are a fast-moving creative team building visual content for a growing music artist. Our focus is on producing engaging, visually striking short-form videos that amplify the artist’s sound, aesthetic, and brand presence across social platforms.

We prioritize originality, strong visual identity, and content that feels native to TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



Role Overview

You will create short-form videos designed to elevate the artist’s music and grow audience engagement. This includes beat-synced edits, visually compelling performance cuts, stylized lyric videos, aesthetic-driven visuals, and trend-adapted short-form formats.

You must understand how to hook attention within the first 1–3 seconds and maintain visual energy through strong pacing, transitions, and sound alignment.



Responsibilities

Create short-form music videos (15–60 seconds)

Edit engaging, beat-synced, visually dynamic content

Develop creative visual looks aligned with the artist’s brand

Produce performance-style edits, aesthetic reels, and stylized lyric clips

Integrate current social trends while maintaining artistic identity

Use AI tools when appropriate to generate visuals, effects, or stylized elements

Deliver multiple variations for testing (different hooks, cuts, captions)

Maintain clean, polished on-screen text with correct English



Required Skills

Strong video editing skills

Excellent sense of rhythm and beat synchronization

Ability to create visually interesting, aesthetic-driven edits

Understanding of short-form attention mechanics

Strong English for captions and on-screen text

Resourceful and able to work independently

Ability to execute creative briefs efficiently



Preferred Skills

Experience with CapCut

Experience with AI video tools (Runway, Pika, Midjourney, etc.)

Experience editing music content or artist pages

Background in visual storytelling for musicians

Strong understanding of TikTok and Reels editing styles

Performance & Pay

$2 per approved short-form video

Payment based on approved deliverables

High performers may receive extended contracts or full-time opportunities



How to Apply

Send the following:

Video portfolio (required – direct links only)

Examples of music-focused or beat-synced edits

List of tools you use (especially AI tools and CapCut experience)

Weekly availability



Applications without a video portfolio will not be considered. Only applicants with strong editing skills and demonstrated creative ability will be reviewed.

title: Long-Form Technical Video Creator
description:
Company: Nebula



Type: Full-time, Remote



Start Date: Immediate

About Nebula

Nebula is an AI-powered agent platform that helps people automate their work. We're growing fast and need a dedicated video creator to own our YouTube channel and produce high-quality, technical long-form content.



The Role

You'll be the primary creator behind our YouTube presence — scripting, filming/screen-recording, editing, and publishing 2-3 long-form videos per week. Content ranges from product tutorials and AI tool walkthroughs to developer-focused explainers and demo videos.

This is NOT a generic editing role. You need to understand the AI/tech space well enough to create content that resonates with developers, founders, and power users.



What You'll Do

Script and storyboard 2-3 long-form YouTube videos per week (8-20 min each)

Record screen captures, voiceovers, and/or talking-head segments

Edit with motion graphics, annotations, and clean pacing

Optimize titles, thumbnails, descriptions, and tags for YouTube SEO

Analyze video performance and iterate on what works

Collaborate with the founding team on content strategy



Requirements

Portfolio required — share 3-5 YouTube videos you've created (tech/AI content strongly preferred)

Proficiency in video editing software (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro)

Strong screen recording and tutorial production skills

Comfortable with AI/tech terminology and concepts

Excellent English (written and spoken) — scripts must be clear and engaging

Ability to work independently and hit deadlines in a fast-paced startup

Reliable internet and a quiet recording environment



Nice to Have

Experience with motion graphics (After Effects)

Thumbnail design skills (Photoshop/Figma)

Familiarity with YouTube Analytics and SEO tools (TubeBuddy, vidIQ)

Personal YouTube channel with tech content

Experience with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, etc.)



How to Apply

Subject line: "Video Creator Application - [Your Name]"

Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.

title: Project Manager
description:
**VIDEO PRODUCTION PROJECT MANAGER**

Position Description & Performance Framework



---



**MISSION**



To drive client satisfaction and revenue retention by orchestrating seamless video production workflows that deliver high-quality content on time and within scope, ensuring every project exceeds client expectations while maximizing team efficiency and output quality.



---



**OUTCOMES & KPIs**



**1. 100% On-Time Delivery · 95% Client Satisfaction Rate**

a. Coordinate and schedule filming sessions within 48 hours of project kickoff

b. Ensure all filming crew and videographers are briefed and equipped with detailed scripts and creative direction before each shoot

c. Complete footage review and AI-assisted clip organization within 24 hours of filming completion

d. Deliver final edited content to clients within agreed timeline (typically 5–7 business days from filming)

e. Achieve first-draft approval rate of 80% or higher, minimizing revision cycles



**2. Efficient Team Coordination & Quality Control**

a. Maintain relationships with 3–5 reliable filming crews/videographers for consistent availability

b. Create comprehensive creative briefs for editors that result in 90?herence to brand guidelines

c. Monitor editor performance metrics including turnaround time and revision requests

d. Establish quality checkpoints at footage review, first edit, and final delivery stages

e. Coordinate with social media team for Instagram and LinkedIn posting within 24 hours of client approval



**3. Revenue Protection Through Client Retention & Project Expansion**

a. Maintain client retention rate of 90% or higher through exceptional project management

b. Identify and propose additional video formats or content opportunities during project execution

c. Document and share client feedback to improve future project outcomes

d. Ensure all deliverables meet or exceed contracted specifications



**4. Daily Administrative & Team Coordination**

a. Daily check-ins with active filming crews and editors via Slack or project management tools

b. Weekly project status reports to leadership team

c. Maintain updated project timelines and deliverable tracking in CRM/project management system

d. End-of-day project status updates and next-day preparation



---



**COMPETENCIES**



- **Project Management Excellence** — Juggle multiple projects simultaneously while maintaining attention to detail and meeting all deadlines consistently.

- **Communication Skills** — Strong verbal and written communication to brief crews, manage client expectations, and coordinate between stakeholders.

- **Creative Vision** — Understanding of video production processes, formats, and quality standards to provide meaningful direction to filming crews and editors.

- **Problem-Solving** — Proactive approach to identifying potential issues before they impact timelines and developing solutions quickly.

- **Quality Assurance** — Keen eye for detail to ensure all footage and final deliverables meet professional standards and client specifications.

- **Technology Proficiency** — Comfortable using AI tools for footage organization, project management software, and various communication platforms.

- **Client Relations** — Manage client expectations, handle feedback professionally, and maintain positive relationships throughout the project lifecycle.

- **Leadership** — Guide and motivate external contractors and tea
mbers to deliver their best work consistently.



---



**TIME & SCHEDULE**



- Freedom to make your own schedule while ensuring all project deadlines are consistently met

- Available during standard business hours (9 AM – 6 PM) in your timezone for client communication and team coordination

- Approximately 30–35 hours per week depending on active project volume

- Must be available for filming day coordination, which may occasionally fall on weekends

- Remote with occasional on-location presence required for complex shoots



---



**COMPENSATION**



- Base salary: $1,500 – $3,000/month based on experience and performance

- Performance bonus: $200 per project delivered on time with zero revisions

- Retention bonus: $500 quarterly for maintaining 90%+ client satisfaction scores

- Paid monthly via Stripe or preferred payment method



---



**WORK ENVIRONMENT**



- Remote with access to project management tools (Notion, Slack or similar)

- Must have reliable internet and professional communication setup

- Access to video review software and AI tools for footage organization

- Regular communication via Slack,
, and video calls with clients and tea
mbers

title: Short-Form TECHNICAL X/Twitter/LinkedIn Writer
description:
Company: Nebula



Type: Full-time, Remote



Start Date: Immediate

About Nebula

Nebula is an AI agent platform that helps people automate their work using natural language. We're building our brand presence on X/Twitter and need someone who lives and breathes the platform.



The Role

You'll own Nebula's X/Twitter presence — writing daily posts, threads, and replies that grow our following and establish us as a voice in the AI/developer tools space. You need to understand the culture of tech
: the #buildinpublic community, dev humor, AI discourse, and what makes posts go viral in this niche.



This is a writing-heavy role. You're not scheduling posts someone else wrote — you're the voice.



What You'll Do

Write and publish 3-5 original posts per day across Nebula's X account

Create 2-3 threads per week (product updates, AI insights, behind-the-scenes)

Engage with replies, quote tweets, and relevant conversations in the AI/dev community

Monitor trending topics in AI/tech and newsjack when relevant

Write copy for product launches, feature announcements, and campaigns

Track engagement metrics and double down on what performs

Collaborate with the team on content calendar and brand voice



Requirements

Writing samples required — share your X/Twitter profile or 5-10 sample tweets/threads in the AI/tech voice

Native or near-native English writing skills

Deep familiarity with X/Twitter culture, especially tech/AI/startup communities

Understanding of AI tools and developer workflows (you should know what an API, LLM, and AI agent are)

Ability to distill complex technical concepts into punchy, engaging tweets

Self-starter who can generate ideas without constant direction

Available to post during US business hours (Pacific Time overlap preferred)



Nice to Have

Personal X/Twitter account with 
+ followers in tech/AI niche

Experience with #buildinpublic or startup content

Familiarity with
 
 tools

Basic graphic design for tweet images (Canva/Figma)

Experience managing brand accounts (not just personal)

Knowledge of AI agent platforms, coding assistants, or automation tools



Voice & Tone Guide

Our
 voice is:

Sharp, not corporate — "We just shipped something wild" not "We're excited to announce"

Technical but accessible — developers should nod, non-devs should still get it

Opinionated — we have takes on AI, not just announcements

Community-first — we reply, we engage, we're in the conversation

Sample Task (Include in Your Application)



Write 5 sample tweets as if you were running Nebula's account today. Include:

1 product-focused tweet (check nebula.gg for context)

1 industry hot take about AI agents

1 engagement/question tweet to spark replies

1 thread opener (first tweet of a thread)

1 reply to a hypothetical user who says "what even is an AI agent?"



How to Apply

Subject line: 
 Writer Application - [Your Name]"

Writing samples: Your X profile link OR 5-10 sample tweets/threads

Brief intro: Who you are, your timezone, and your relationship with tech

The 5 sample tweets described above



Availability: When you can start

Applications without writing samples will not be reviewed.

title: Operations & Admin Coordinator (CRM, Lead Intake, Payroll & KPI Tracking)

We are a roofing and solar company based in Vancouver, Canada looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Operations & Admin Coordinator to support our daily operations.



This is a key role in the company. You will be responsible for handling incoming leads, maintaining our CRM system, assisting with invoicing and payroll, and tracking company and employee KPIs.



Accuracy, organization, and consistency are extremely important in this role.



Responsibilities:

Answer incoming calls (approx. 2–10 per day)

Collect accurate customer information (name, phone, address, job details)

Enter all leads into the CRM immediately

Ensure no leads are missed or incomplete

Communicate clearly and professionally with customers



2. CRM Management



Maintain accurate and organized customer/job records

Update job statuses and assign leads

Ensure all data is complete and up to date



3. Invoicing & Payments



Create and send invoices (QuickBooks or similar)

Track payments and update records

Follow up on unpaid invoices



4. Payroll Support



Prepare payroll data (hours, tracking, coordination)

Ensure accuracy before processing

Maintain organized payroll records



5. KPI Tracking & Reporting



Track company KPIs (leads, sales, job performance)

Track employee KPIs (production, efficiency, performance)

Maintain simple daily/weekly reports



6. General Admin



Fill out forms and documents

Keep systems organized and up to date

Requirements:

Strong attention to detail

Highly organized and reliable

Good spoken and written English

Experience with CRM systems

Experience with invoicing (QuickBooks or similar)

Basic understanding of payroll processes

Comfortable using Excel or Google Sheets

Work Schedule:

Monday to Friday

8:00 AM – 4:00 PM Vancouver, Canada time

Night shift in the Philippines

Must be available during these hours consistently

Compensation:

$800 – $1,000 USD per month (depending on experience)

Up to $100/month performance bonus based on:

Accurate lead handling (no missed or incomplete leads)

Clean and organized CRM

Accurate invoicing and payroll support

Timely KPI tracking and reporting

To Apply:



Please include:



Your experience with CRM systems

Your experience with invoicing and payroll

What tools you’ve used for tracking data

Answer this question:

“What steps would you take when answering a call from a new customer?”
