title: Senior Specialist, Graphic & Web Design
description:
About Truegenics:

Truegenics Pte Ltd is a leading e-commerce company based in Singapore with a track record of over US$218M in online product sales. We specialize in e-retailing our own brand of health supplements to a global audience.

We strive to create value and make a positive difference in the world, one life at a time. We believe that even the smallest action can define one’s destiny, and we are committed to creating products that enhance the lives of our consumers.



Why This Role Matters:

We are looking for a Senior Graphic & Web Designer who is passionate about creating meaningful brand experiences. Someone who combines creativity with technical precision and takes full ownership of their work.

You will be the visual voice of our brands, shaping how our products look, feel, and perform across packaging and web experiences. This is a fully remote role, so clear communication, strong collaboration, and accountability are key to your success.

You will partner closely with the marketing, copywriting, and sales teams to create designs that not only look exceptional but also deliver measurable results, driving conversions, strengthening brand reputation, and deepening customer loyalty.



Mission of the Role:

To elevate Truegenics’ visual identity across all touchpoints by ensuring every design supports business objectives, reinforces brand integrity, and resonates with our target audience.

As a senior creative, you will lead by example, maintaining design excellence, guiding junior tea
mbers, and setting high standards for creativity, performance, and consistency across all brands.



Key Responsibilities:



Graphic & Packaging Design (30%)

- Conceptualize and execute creative ideas for digital and packaging projects based on brand direction, marketing briefs, and - customer experience principles.

- Design and adapt packaging across product lines using established brand templates, ensuring consistency while introducing fresh variations for new launches.

- Create digital design assets for websites, social media,
s, and campaigns that engage users and drive conversions.

- Maintain a strong and consistent visual identity across all design outputs, ensuring alignment with brand guidelines and marketing objectives.

- Develop and evolve key brand visuals including logos, icons, color systems, typography, and layout frameworks.

- Translate marketing strategies into visually compelling campaigns that strengthen brand equity and support sales growth.

- Mentor and guide junior designers, providing clear feedback and creative direction to improve quality and efficiency.

- Research and incorporate emerging design trends, creative formats, and audience insights to keep the brand relevant and competitive.



Web Design & Frontend Development (70%)

- Design and develop responsive, high-performing web pages with a strong mobile-first approach, ensuring layouts, navigation, and performance are optimized for mobile users.

- Collaborate with marketing, media, and copywriting teams to design and optimize eCommerce landing pages that convert effectively across devices.

- Apply UX/UI best practices to build layouts that are visually engaging, intuitive to navigate, and optimized for performance.

- Develop reusable page templates and modular design systems to improve speed, consistency, and scalability.

- Ensure all web assets meet quality standards for responsiveness, accessibility, and loading performance.

- Coordinate the execution of promotional web materials, ensuring accuracy, brand consistency, and timely delivery.

- Review and refine the work of junior designers, providing constructive feedback that enhances both creative quality and execution.



Key Requirements:

- Strong portfolio showcasing both digital and web design work. Clear examples of mobile-first design projects will be a plus.

- Expertise in responsive and mobile UX/UI design, including optimizing layouts, images, and performance for smaller screens.

- Experience using AI tools to streamline creative processes, generate ideas, or enhance productivity (for example, generating layout variations, assisting with copy, or automating production tasks).

- Willingness to learn, explore, and adopt new AI tools to improve design quality and efficiency.

- Excellent communication skills and the ability to present ideas, feedback, and updates clearly in a remote, cross-functional environment.

- Self-driven, highly organized, and accountable to deadlines.

- Skilled in managing multiple projects while maintaining attention to detail.

- Comfortable collaborating through digital tools and workflows such as Figma, Slack, and Wrike.



Working Arrangement:

This is a fully remote position, open to candidates who can collaborate effectively across digital platforms and time zones.

The potential hire must also be equipped with the following to carry out this role effectively:

- Laptop / CPU with acceptable speed

- At least 1 monitor screen (inclusive of laptop screen)

- Headset with Mic (Noise cancelling)

- Webcam

- Designated Workstation

- Stable and strong power and internet connectivity

- Noise-free and conducive environment



Salary:

[To be discussed based on experience]

title: Appointment Setter
description:
Our lead generation system is strong - delivering 100+ warm leads per month - but we need someone with a track record to pick up the phone and get these prospects on the calendar.



This role is for you if:



- You have a verifiable history of hitting or exceeding targets.

- You know how to handle objections, qualify prospects, and secure commitment over the phone.



The Opportunity:



Set Your Schedule: Part-time or full-time options available (Between 20 - 40 hours per week).



Work Aussie Hours: Shifts scheduled between 8 AM and 6 PM (Melbourne Time).



Uncapped Commissions: The more appointments you book that show up, the more you earn!



Must-Haves:

- Excellent spoken English with a confident, professional phone voice.

- Proven track record in outbound appointment setting, B2B sales, customer service or solving customer queries.

- Ability to provide references or past performance data.



If you are a closer who can pick up the phone and deliver results, you can start anytime with us!



Apply now by filling out the short form below -



jobs.interspeedia.com/jobs/17033.64053.59877.1



Once you apply, we will send you more information.



IMPORTANT NOTE.



We will ONLY consider candidates who submit their application to our candidate management system through the link above.



About Us



At Performia, we help businesses through our flagship product called the Performia Journey, to transition their culture from being a place where people go to 'do a job' to a productive, safe and fun space where much like a sports team, everyone is motivated by accomplishment, and working towards the same goals.



It’s unlike anything else in the market and we need someone who thrives on creating opportunities.



We give businesses a complete system to create a high performing, safe and fun team culture, and it starts with knowing how to hire the right people.



Clients who build their team the Performia way, see that work stops feeling like work, and becomes a game the team is motivated to play.



Performia is a Swedish company established in 2002 with offices in 27 countries, launching in Australia in 2006.

title: Order Management Specialist/Key Account Administrator
description:
Type: Full-Time – Monday through Friday, 7:00am-3:30pm U.S. PST

Location: Remote

Rate: $8-$8.50/hr  (40hrs/week)

 

Role Overview



This role is responsible for managing order processing and shipment coordination in Netsuite, ensuring accuracy and compliance with customer requirements. The position involves handling manual and bulk order entries, routing shipments, submitting invoices, and collaborating with the shipping team to meet service level agreements. Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and proficiency in communication and order management systems are essential for success.



Key Responsibilities

-Manual order entry in Netsuite.

-Bulk order uploads into Netsuite.

-Routing orders for pickups through LTL carriers and/or providing shipment details to customer for customer routed orders.

-ASN & Invoice Submissions in EDI platforms or customer portals.

-Reviewing Vendor Routing Guides prior to order processing to ensure customer standards are communicated to the shipping team.

-Collaborating with shipping team to ensure all orders are shipping per the customers’ guidelines and SLA’s.

-Credits Memos. (as needed)

-Sending label printing requests to in office personnel



Qualifications

-Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

-Experience with Microsoft Excel.

-Experience with Microsoft Outlook.

-Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

-Eagerness for problem solving.

-Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

-Proficiency in basic computer applications and order management systems. (Netsuite knowledge is required)

-Previous experience in an administrative role is a plus.



Why Join Us:

- Supportive, people-first team culture

- Permanent Remote setup



To apply: Please submit your application through the link below:

title: Long-Term YouTube Video Editor + Thumbnail Designer (On-Call / As Needed)
description:
I’m looking for a skilled, dependable, and detail-oriented YouTube video editor to join my team on an on-call / as-needed basis.



This is a long-term opportunity for the right person, but hours are not guaranteed each week. Work will be assigned whenever new videos are ready to edit. This role is ideal for an editor who already has other clients and wants to add a reliable, recurring client with clear standards and a straightforward workflow.



I’m looking for someone who takes pride in clean, professional edits and understands how to make educational YouTube videos engaging without overdoing effects.



What You’ll Be Editing



You’ll mainly be editing:



Talking-head educational and informational YouTube videos

Content focused on clarity, pacing, and audience retention

Videos that need to feel polished, professional, and easy to watch



This is not a flashy “MrBeast-style” editing role. I want edits that are clean, modern, and effective.



Responsibilities



Video Editing



Cut mistakes, dead space, long pauses, and filler words

Improve pacing to keep viewers engaged

Add clean zooms, jump cuts, transitions, and light motion when appropriate

Insert royalty-free background music where needed

Add simple on-screen text, graphics, or visual callouts when useful

Follow editing notes and brand style consistently

Deliver projects on time once assigned



Thumbnail Design



Create high-click, professional YouTube thumbnails

Use strong contrast, clean layouts, and readable text

Design with mobile viewers in mind

Match the tone and branding of the channel



What I’m Looking For



At least 2 years of YouTube video editing experience

Strong understanding of viewer retention, pacing, and storytelling

Experience editing talking-head, educational, or commentary-style content

Good eye for clean, clickable thumbnail design

Strong English comprehension

Reliable communication and quick response time

Detail-oriented and able to follow instructions closely

Open to feedback and committed to improving over time

Able to work independently without constant supervision



Technical Requirements



Stable internet connection

Quiet, distraction-free home workspace

Computer or laptop capable of smooth video editing

Willing to use TimeProof for time tracking



Job Details



Pay: $3 USD/hour

Type: On-call / As needed

Hours: Not guaranteed; depends on content production

Payment Method: PayPal

Location: Remote / Home-based



How to Apply



Please send the following:



Links to YouTube videos you personally edited

A short summary of your editing experience

The editing software you use (Premiere Pro, CapCut, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve, etc.)

A few thumbnail examples, if available



To confirm you read everything carefully, start your application with the word: RETENTION



Important

This role is best for someone who wants a long-term working relationship, values consistency, communicates well, and can deliver solid work every time a project is assigned.



If you are dependable, creative, and understand how to make YouTube content more engaging while keeping it clean and professional, I’d love to hear from you.

I am currently looking for a reliable and talented YouTube video editor to help with my content on an on-call / as-needed basis.



This is a long-term position, but it is not full-time and hours are not guaranteed every week. Work will be assigned only when new videos are ready. This is a great fit for someone who already has ongoing clients and is looking to add another steady client with clear expectations and long-term potential.



I create educational and informational YouTube content, and I need an editor who understands how to make videos more engaging, more polished, and easier to watch without making them feel over-edited or distracting.



Type of Content

You will mainly be editing:



Talking-head YouTube videos

Educational, business, and informational content

Videos that need strong pacing, clarity, and professional presentation



The editing style should feel clean, modern, and engaging. I am not looking for excessive effects or overly flashy edits. The goal is to improve viewer experience and retention while keeping the content professional.



Your Responsibilities



Video Editing



Remove mistakes, pauses, filler words, and unnecessary sections

Tighten pacing to improve watch time and retention

Add clean cuts, zooms, light transitions, and simple motion effects

Add background music when appropriate

Add text, visual callouts, or simple graphics when needed

Follow editing instructions and keep a consistent style

Complete assigned projects on time



Thumbnail Design



Create professional and attention-grabbing YouTube thumbnails

Use strong contrast, bold layouts, and readable text

Make thumbnails optimized for both desktop and mobile

Keep designs clean and in line with the brand style



Ideal Applicant



Minimum 2 years of YouTube editing experience

Understands YouTube retention and pacing

Has edited talking-head or educational videos before

Can create strong thumbnails that improve click-through rate

Good English comprehension

Communicates well and responds in a timely manner

Detail-oriented and able to follow directions

Open to feedback and willing to make improvements

Can work independently and stay organized



Technical Requirements



Reliable internet connection

Quiet home-based workspace

Computer or laptop capable of handling video editing smoothly

Willing to use TimeProof for tracking time worked



Position Details



Pay: $3 USD per hour

Schedule: On-call / as needed

Hours: Vary depending on how many videos are being produced

Location: Remote

Payment: PayPal



How to Apply

Please send:



Links to videos you have personally edited

A short summary of your experience

The editing software you use

Thumbnail samples if available



To show that you read this job post carefully, begin your application with the word: RETENTION



This position is for someone who wants a long-term client relationship, communicates clearly, and takes pride in delivering quality work consistently.



I’m looking for someone dependable, easy to work with, and committed to doing great work over the long run.

title: (VA) Virtual Assistant
description:
Job Description



We are a fast-growing online fitness coaching business looking for a high-quality Virtual Assistant to manage front-end conversations and help convert leads into booked calls.



This is not a typical VA role.

We are looking for someone who can communicate effectively, think on their feet, and drive conversations toward action — not just copy and paste messages.



Key Responsibilities

Reach out to new and existing leads via Instagram DMs

Follow up with older leads and re-engage conversations

Build rapport and hold natural, engaging conversations

Qualify leads based on interest and readiness

Guide prospects toward booking a call

Book calls directly into Google Calendar

Maintain a high level of communication and response time

???? What We’re Looking For

Strong written English and communication skills

Ability to hold natural conversations (not robotic or scripted)

Confidence in guiding conversations toward a clear outcome

Previous experience in sales, setting, or lead generation is preferred

Understanding of the fitness industry is a bonus

High level of accountability and consistency



Important



This role is performance-driven.



You are not here to just send messages — you are here to:



Start conversations

Build interest

Turn that into booked calls



Compensation

$650 USD per month (base rate)

+ 2% commission (pooled across setters, based on closed clients)



There is strong potential for growth within the role as the business scales.



How to Apply



Please include:



Your previous experience (if any)

Examples of conversations or outreach you’ve done

Why you would be a good fit for a sales-focused role



At $650/month:



You will get a lot of low-quality applicants



So your edge is:

Your filtering process, not the job ad



Next step (you should do this):

I can build you a VA trial task + scoring system so you don’t hire dead weight again.

title: Senior Graphic Designer / Junior Art Director — LA-Based Studio (Remote, Hourly)
description:
NO VIRTUAL ASSISTANTS PLEASE. and if you are wearing a suit in your picture, please do not apply.



Hi, I'm Peter Bae! Entrepreneur, creative director, and family man. I started a graphic design studio 5 years ago and we're growing. We work with tech companies, CPG brands, and mission-driven organizations that need consistent, high-level creative execution across branding, pitch decks, and marketing collateral.



We have an art director on the team. What we need now is a senior-level designer who can come in, hit the ground running, and own projects from start to finish. Monday through Friday, 4-6-ish hours a day, paid hourly.



*Who you are*

You have 5+ years of experience and a portfolio that does the talking. You pick up new brands quickly, work clean under pressure, and communicate clearly. You don't need hand-holding — you need a good brief, or just enough info, and room to do your thing.

You care about the craft. You sweat the details. And you want to be part of something that takes the work seriously without taking itself too seriously.



*What you'll work on*

Visual identities, logos, pitch decks, presentations, web design, mockups, social assets, print, and photo manipulation.



*Skills required*

Expert-level Photoshop, Illustrator, and Figma. Strong branding and design fundamentals. Sharp art direction instincts. Logo design ability. Web and UI design experience a plus. Photo manipulation is a plus.



*Expectations*

Communication that is proactive. Execution at your highest level. Work schedule is on your own time but we should have at least 2-3 hours of overlap for communication.



*What this can become*

I'm not looking for a one-off hire. I want someone who grows with the studio. As we scale, the right person will have real opportunities for more creative ownership, broader client exposure, and an expanded role. I take care of the people who show up for this team.



One more thing on culture

I pride myself on building a work environment where you feel appreciated and challenged in equal measure. We ask for excellence every day but we also make it an enjoyable work environment. You'll feel a level of humanness pretty quickly.



*To apply*

Share your favorite design resource or tool — inspiration, photography, references, whatever you actually rely on — that isn't Behance, Unsplash, Pexels, Dribbble, Same.Energy, or anything equally generic. Give me the one you keep to yourself.

Then send a portfolio link. Not a Google Drive folder. One or two links I can scroll through in a few minutes.



Serious inquiries only.



I look forward to meeting you!

title: Senior Product Designer (Medical Devices & Equipment)
description:
We are seeking a meticulous and visionary Product Designer to lead the development of next-generation medical equipment. You will be responsible for the end-to-end design process—from initial ethnographic research in clinical environments to production-ready CAD models. The ideal candidate doesn't just design beautiful products; they design safe, intuitive, and compliant user experiences that meet global regulatory standards.



Key Responsibilities

- User-Centric Design: Conduct contextual inquiries and usability testing with clinicians, patients, and caregivers to identify unmet needs.

- Industrial Design & Engineering: Develop high-fidelity 3D models (SolidWorks/Creo) with a focus on Design for Manufacturability (DFM) and assembly.

- Regulatory Documentation: Generate and maintain the Design History File (DHF), including design inputs, outputs, and verification/validation protocols.

- Risk Management: Lead UFMEA (Use Failure Mode and Effects Analysis) sessions to identify and mitigate potential use errors.

- Prototyping: Build functional prototypes using 3D printing, CNC machining, and soft-tooling to test ergonomic and mechanical hypotheses.

- Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with Quality Assurance (QA) and Regulatory Affairs (RA) to ensure compliance with ISO 13485 and IEC 62366.



Required Skillset & Qualifications

- Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Industrial Design, Mechanical Engineering, or Human Factors Engineering.

- Experience: 5+ years in product design, with at least 3 years specifically in the medical device industry.

- Technical Proficiency: Expert knowledge of 3D CAD (SolidWorks preferred), Adobe Creative Suite, and rendering software (Keyshot).

- Compliance Knowledge: Deep understanding of FDA 21 CFR 820.30 and ISO 14971 risk management standards.

Materials Expertise: Knowledge of biocompatible materials, sterilization processes (Autoclave, EtO), and IP-rated enclosures for clinical disinfection.



Preferred Attributes

- Experience taking a Class II or Class III medical device from concept through to 510(k) or PMA submission.

- A portfolio that demonstrates a "process-first" approach, showing sketches, research data, and failed iterations alongside final products.

- Strong communication skills to translate complex clinical needs into engineering requirements.



Please send you resumes ONLY at

title: Fractional Online Trainer – Cleaning Rockstar Program
description:
Important: We do not monitor OnlineJobs.ph messages or applications.



If you are interested in this opportunity, please apply at the link below:


/application-online-trainer-3944



Company Overview

Serenity Clean is a high-growth, eco-friendly home cleaning company on a mission to provide families with more time, peace of mind, and a spotless home. With a goal of 432 locations and 65,000 bi-weekly cleanings, our 200% “Make It Right” guarantee and commitment to sustainable, safe cleaning products have earned us a reputation for quality and convenience.



Role: Fractional Online Trainer – Cleaning Rockstar Program

Company: Serenity Clean

Location: Remote (Offshore)

Regular Schedule: Monday, Wednesday, Friday (M/W/F) — guaranteed

Additional Days: Tuesday and Thursday may be scheduled depending on training volume

Hours: 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM EST (includes 1-hour unpaid lunch, 6 paid hours/day)

Pay: $90 retainer per week (3 guaranteed days) — could be up to $150/week ($5/hour) if additional sessions are scheduled

Compensation Guarantee: Paid for all 3 regular training days, even if no sessions are held

Platform: Google Meet



About the Role

Are you ready to bring energy and impact to online training sessions? If you’re outgoing, a natural motivator, and know how to keep people engaged on Google Meet, we need you to lead our Cleaning Rockstars through their training.



This role turns training sessions into memorable experiences where every new recruit feels part of something meaningful.





What You’ll Do

- Lead by Example: Guide Cleaning Rockstars (CRs) through training with energy, encouragement, and motivation. Make sure CRs not only complete the training but are excited about it.



- Run the Room: Host interactive sessions where every CR feels seen and supported. Keep cameras on, smiles up, and engagement high.



- Teach the Tools: Help CRs get comfortable with Trainual, BookingKoala, Gusto Wallet, and Slack. Training will be provided.



- Cover Policies & Processes: Guide CRs through essential company processes and policies to ensure they thrive on Day 1.



- Facilitate Real-Time Testing: Lead assessments, review answers with the group, and support re-takes while keeping the rest engaged.



- Embody Core Values: Use our company values to guide CRs and model the culture during every session.



- Make it Fun and Engaging: Encourage questions, maintain a positive vibe, and add your personal touch. Training should be enjoyable and memorable.



- Be Ready for Anything: If CRs don’t show up, use your time productively updating materials, logs, or prepping for upcoming sessions. You’re still paid for guaranteed days.





Core Values

- Team First: We win together. Support each other, communicate clearly, and share the load.



- Own It: No excuses. Take responsibility, fix issues fast, and follow through.



- Details Matter: Inspect what you expect. Double-check your work and take pride in the small things.



- Ask. Don’t Assume: Clarity is our responsibility. Ask questions, check for understanding, and communicate clearly.



- Find Gratitude: Focus on the positive, even in challenging 
nts. Serve with purpose and joy.





Schedule & Compensation

- Guaranteed training days: Monday, Wednesday, Friday

- Optional training days: Tuesday and Thursday depending on training volume

- Hours: 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM EST (1-hour unpaid lunch, 6 paid hours/day)

- Pay: $90/week guaranteed for 3 regular training days, up to $150/week with optional sessions



What Makes You Perfect for This Role

- Engaging Personality: Confidently lead a virtual room and encourage participation.

- Clear & Confident Communicator: Strong English skills, professional and approachable.

- Tech-Savvy: Comfortable with Google Meet, Trainual, BookingKoala, and Slack.

- Reliable & Accountable: Solid internet, dependable attendance, and professionalism.

- Training or Teaching Experience: Helpful but not required—energy and clarity matter most.



Why Join Serenity Clean

- Guaranteed pay for all 3 regular training days/week even without training sessions

- Flexible schedule with optional extra days depending on training volume

- Positive, high-energy team culture

- Growth opportunity with a scaling, eco-friendly company



How to Apply

Apply here:

???? 
/application-online-trainer-3944



Serenity Clean is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds.

title: Senior B2B LinkedIn Designer (Consulting & Professional Services Focus)
description:
We are looking for a high-level designer who understands how to create LinkedIn content that drives engagement, authority, and inbound leads, not just visually appealing graphics.



You will work with consulting and professional services brands that expect premium, non-generic, insight-driven content.



What You’ll Do

 • Design high-performing LinkedIn content including carousels, single-image posts, frameworks, and visual storytelling

 • Translate complex B2B ideas into clear, compelling visuals

 • Turn posts into scroll-stopping assets

 • Create distinct visual identities for each client (not templated or repetitive)

 • Design with engagement and conversion in mind, not just aesthetics



What We’re Not Looking For

 • Basic Canva designs with plain backgrounds

 • Overly text-heavy graphics with no visual hierarchy

 • Generic social media templates

 • Designers without B2B or consulting experience



What We Are Looking For

 • Proven experience designing for B2B companies

 • Experience working with consulting or professional services brands

 • Strong understanding of LinkedIn content design

 • Strong grasp of visual hierarchy, content framing, and scroll-stopping design

 • Ability to turn insights into compelling visuals

Portfolio Requirements (Mandatory)

Applications without relevant work will not be reviewed.



Bonus Points

title: Figma Web Designer
description:
We're a Gold Coast-based digital agency looking for a reliable Figma web designer to work with us on an ongoing basis. You won't be a one-and-done hire - we want someone who becomes a trusted part of our design process across multiple client projects.



Each project is scoped and paid individually, so you'll have flexibility, but we're looking for someone who's in it for the long haul.



What you'll typically be working on:

• Desktop and mobile versions of each page

• Designs built primarily for WordPress builds, though the stack may vary project to project



What we need from you:

• Clean, well-structured Figma files

• Auto-layout used throughout

• Components that are clearly named and described so our dev team can build from them without guesswork

• Files handed off ready for development - organised, consistent, and complete



Requirements:

• Strong Figma skills with a solid grasp of auto-layout and component architecture

• Portfolio showing real web design work (please include links)

• Comfortable designing for WordPress-based builds (experience with Bricks Builder, Elementor, or similar is a bonus)

Rate & Timeline

• Please include your typical turnaround time in your application



How to apply:

Send us a message with:

• A link to your portfolio or 2–3 relevant web design samples

• A brief note on your Figma workflow (specifically how you approach auto-layout and component organisation)

• Your typical turnaround for a 5-page project



Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

title: Part-Time | ArchiCAD Draftsperson – Construction Documentation (Remote)
description:
Code: ARCHI-DOC-2026



Role Overview

This role is centred on documentation and drafting support.



Your work will directly contribute to planning submissions, construction documentation, and model coordination.



You will be responsible for:

* Preparing and updating town planning drawing sets

* Producing working drawings for construction documentation

* Creating dimensioned plans, annotations, and detailed notes

* Developing door and window schedules

* Working from marked-up drawings to accurately update documentation

* Assisting with ArchiCAD model setup, cleanup, and sheet layouts

* Exporting models to Twinmotion where required



Software Requirements



Essential:

* Strong proficiency in ArchiCAD (Version 27 preferred, earlier versions acceptable)



Preferred:

* Basic AutoCAD experience (for handling DWG files)

* Familiarity with Twinmotion or similar rendering software



Requirements (Do Not Apply If You Do Not Meet These)

* Proven ability to produce accurate and consistent documentation in ArchiCAD

* Strong attention to detail and ability to follow markups precisely

* Good understanding of drawing presentation and documentation standards

* Ability to work within existing templates and maintain consistency across drawing sets

* Fluent English (written and professional communication level)

* Reliable, organised, and able to meet deadlines consistently



Knowledge & Experience (Preferred, Not Essential)

* Experience in residential documentation

* Exposure to Australian building documentation standards

* Understanding of planning drawings and approval processes

* Awareness of National Construction Code (NCC 2022) and ResCode (Clause 54/55)

* Experience with childcare (Class 9b) projects is beneficial



Note:

Experience with Victorian childcare compliance is not required. Training and guidance will be provided, but a willingness to learn is essential.



Core Skills

* High attention to detail and accuracy

* Ability to follow instructions and interpret markups clearly

* Consistent and reliable drafting output

* Strong organisation and file management skills

* Clean layer and attribute use

* Consistent file naming and structured project organisation



Workflow & Communication

* Clear written communication

* Willingness to ask questions when unclear

* Strong time management and reliability with deadlines

* Ability to maintain organised and well-structured project files



What Success Looks Like

* Drawings are accurate, consistent, and require minimal revisions

* Documentation is clean, well-organised, and aligned with project standards

* Models and layouts are structured and easy to navigate

* Communication is clear, proactive, and professional



Application Instructions (Strict)

To apply, you must complete ALL steps below:



Step 1 – Answer Questions

Include answers to:

* How do you ensure accuracy when working from markups?

* How do you organise layers and attributes in ArchiCAD?

* Describe a documentation set you have worked on

* How do you manage revisions and maintain consistency across drawings?



Step 2 – Submit Portfolio

Include samples of:

* Town planning drawings

* Working drawings or construction documentation

* ArchiCAD-based projects



Step 3 – Include This Code

At the top of your application, write: ARCHI-DOC-2026

Applications without this code will not be reviewed.

title: Sales Director
description:
SALES DIRECTOR ROLE

Employee Retention Benefits, Inc. (ERB)



1. POSITION INFORMATION

Position Title: Sales Director (Enrollment Operations)

Department: Sales / Enrollment

Reports To: Integrator

Location: Remote / Offshore (Philippines)



2. PURPOSE OF THE ROLE

The Sales Director is responsible for driving revenue growth, building and leading the enrollment sales organization, and ensuring consistent execution across all sales and enrollment activities.



This role owns sales strategy, team performance, and revenue outcomes, ensuring that ERB meets its premium targets across public and private sector accounts.



The Sales Director acts as the growth engine of the organization, aligning people, process, and performance to deliver scalable and predictable revenue results.



3. ROLE DEFINITION

Sales Director (Enrollment Operations)



Role Purpose 

The Sales Director provides strategic leadership, operational oversight, and execution across ERB’s sales and enrollment functions.



This role is responsible for building high-performing teams, developing scalable sales processes, and ensuring full alignment between revenue goals and operational delivery.



4. CORE AREAS OF OWNERSHIP



Sales strategy and revenue growth

Enrollment team leadership (Agents & EORs)

Recruitment, onboarding, and retention of sales personnel

Sales process design and performance management

Pipeline visibility, forecasting, and reporting

CRM usage, data accuracy, and automation adoption



5. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



A. Sales Strategy & Revenue Execution

Lead and execute revenue strategy aligned with company growth targets

Develop and implement sales plans tied to:

premium production goals

account acquisition

Drive new business development in coordination with leadership

Ensure consistent achievement of revenue KPIs across the team



B. Team Leadership & Development

Recruit, onboard, and retain:

Enrollment Agents

Enrollment Outreach Representatives (EORs)

?Apply EOS LMA (Lead, Manage, Accountable) principles

Set clear performance expectations and accountability standards



Conduct:

weekly Level 10 (L10) meetings

performance reviews and coaching sessions

Build a high-performance, results-driven sales culture



C. Sales Process & Performance Management

Design, implement, and refine sales workflows and processes

Ensure full adoption and usage of:

CRM systems

appointment scheduling tools

follow-up and pipeline tracking systems

Monitor and manage key performance metrics, including:

premium written (weekly/monthly)

appointment conversion rates

follow-up and referral capture rates

agent productivity and retention



D. Pipeline Management & Forecasting

Maintain accurate pipeline visibility across all accounts

Provide:

weekly sales performance dashboards

monthly revenue forecasts and strategy updates

Track progress against targets and adjust strategies as needed

Ensure leadership has clear, real-time insight into sales performance



E. Operational Alignment & Execution

Coordinate with:

Client Success Team (CST)

Operations

Account Management

Ensure that sales commitments align with operational delivery capacity

Oversee onboarding of new accounts to ensure smooth transitions

Support alignment between sales execution and client expectations



F. Process, Systems & Automation

Design and optimize sales systems and workflows using:

CRM platforms

automation tools (e.g., GHL, reporting dashboards)

Ensure data accuracy and completeness across all systems

Build scalable processes to support growth without breakdowns



6. REPORTING & ALIGNMENT STRUCTURE

Direct Report

Integrator

title: Real Estate Operations VA Wanted: Turn Chaos Into Systems & Scale With Us
description:
We’re looking for a highly organized, detail-driven Virtual Assistant with real estate experience who thrives on building systems, improving workflows, and keeping a fast-moving business running smoothly behind the scenes.

This is not a basic task-based VA role.

This is for someone who enjoys structure, efficiency, and taking ownership of operations.



You’ll support daily real estate operations by managing
 and calendars, maintaining and organizing the CRM (Follow Up Boss or similar), tracking and nurturing leads, assisting with client communication and care, organizing transactions and timelines, managing tasks in systems like Trello, and documenting/updating SOPs. You’ll also help improve workflows using tools like Zapier and AI to create smarter, more efficient systems.



Who You Are



You have hands-on experience in real estate operations, including working with transactions, CRM systems,  lead follow up and client care. You’re extremely organized with strong attention to detail, and you naturally bring structure to everything you touch. You’re tech-savvy and quick to learn new systems, with experience using platforms like Follow Up Boss or similar CRMs. You’re comfortable using automation tools like Zapier and leveraging AI to improve efficiency. Work flow tools like Trello and Click Up. You communicate clearly and professionally, manage your time well, and stay on top of multiple moving parts without things slipping through the cracks. Most importantly, you’re proactive, reliable, and solution-oriented—you don’t just complete tasks, you look for ways to improve systems and make the business run smoother.



Apply



If this sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.



Please submit the following:



Your resume and a brief summary of your relevant experience

Make sure your DISC assessment is on your profile

A short written response to this question:

“Tell me about a time you improved a system or workflow. What was the problem, and what did you do to fix it?”

What is your favorite AI tool and why?

Include the word “SYSTEMS” in the subject line of your application so we know you read this post carefully



If all answers are not submitted your application will not be considered.

title: Senior Bookkeeper *Superstar Only*
description:
We are looking for two experienced bookkeepers to join our finance team and take ownership of expense categorization, transaction reconciliation, accounts payable, and invoice processing across multiple legal entities.



The bookkeepers will work closely with the CFO, ensuring that all financial transactions are accurately recorded, categorized, and reconciled on a regular basis. This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable managing financial data across multiple platforms — including Xero, Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and our custom CRM.



Key Responsibilities

- Categorize all expenses and transactions in Xero, ensuring accurate classification for reporting and compliance

- Reconcile transactions across multiple payment platforms, including Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRM tools

- Manage accounts payable, ensuring all invoices are properly reviewed, recorded, and scheduled for payment

- Assist with invoice processing, ensuring all vendor invoices are accurately documented and match purchase orders where applicable

- Work closely with the CFO to provide up-to-date financial records for monthly, quarterly, and annual reporting

- Ensure all financial data is accurate and properly organized to support compliance across multiple jurisdictions

- Flag discrepancies or unusual transactions for review by the CFO



What We’re Looking For

- At least 5 years of experience in bookkeeping and expense reconciliation

- Strong proficiency in Xero

- Experience working with Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRMs

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Experience handling multi-entity, multi-currency financial data preferred

==============================



WHAT WE OFFER

* WE ARE WILLING TO PAY MORE FOR A HIGH-QUALITY, PROVEN CANDIDATE - THE LISTED RATE IS A STARTING POINT

* Additional earning potential through commissions and performance-based bonuses

* Fully remote - work from home

* Flexible hours within Australian timezone

* Long-term role with growing scope over time



==============================



WHAT YOU'LL DO



* Audit existing social channels, content, and performance data - identify what is working and what is not

* Build a clear content strategy and present it to the business owner

* Create content daily - graphics, captions, short-form video edits, carousels

* Post consistently across Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube

==============================



REQUIREMENTS

* Ability to build and articulate a content strategy - not just execute one that already exists

* Strong video editing skills - you will be working with raw phone footage filmed in a single take

* Exceptional written English - captions, comments, and DMs are all public-facing brand touchpoints

* Self-directed and able to make decisions without constant guidance

* Comfortable reading platform analytics and adjusting strategy based on data

* Reliable computer, internet connection, and equipment suitable for video editing



==============================



NICE TO HAVE

* Experience helping a business owner build a personal brand or thought leadership presence

* Background in service-based businesses - trades, home improvement, or similar

* YouTube channel growth experience (long-form content)

* Digital marketing agency experience



==============================



SCHEDULE

==============================



If you have built real followings, can back it up with numbers, and want a role where your results are recognised and rewarded - apply now.



==============================

title: Operations Coordinator
description:
We are hiring an Operations Coordinator to support across our company to keep the business moving forward. You will handle admin tasks, maintain internal systems, write documentation, and support cross-team projects as they come up. We are actively bringing in AI solutions and automation to replace repetitive manual work. That means some of the tasks you do when you start with us will eventually be handled by AI or an automation. 



But your job remains! Your job is to be the person who keeps things running while that transition happens, helps document processes so they can be automated, and stays adaptable as the role evolves. We are looking for someone comfortable working alongside AI tools and open to their own role shifting over time.



Please note this role functions 9-5PM EST, and AI literacy is a requirement for this role. You should already be using Claude, ChatGPT, or similar tools in your daily work. 



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING:



Maintaining Systems & Writing Documentation

A large part of this role is keeping internal tools organized and building the documentation the team relies on. You do not need to be an expert in every tool on day one, but you should be comfortable learning new platforms quickly.

Write and maintain SOPs (standard operating procedures) for repeatable processes

Build and own the onboarding/offboarding checklists: account setup, credential management, tool access, permissions

Create self-service guides (Loom recordings + short written docs) so tea
mbers can handle routine tasks themselves

Organize and maintain the company Google Drive, Notion workspace, and shared documentation

Audit Slack channels, keep descriptions current, and help enforce communication routing standards

Keep credential records updated (1Password, shared logins, 2FA)



Recurring Admin & Coordination

The daily and weekly operational tasks that keep the team running. None of this is flashy, but it is important and it cannot be dropped.

Monitor and triage support inboxes (respond to client and lead inquiries, escalate as needed)

Manage Notion portal updates (market records, inspection reports, resource pages)

Coordinate creative asset requests and submissions

Calendar management and meeting scheduling for leadership

Cross-team task routing: make sure requests get to the right person and do not sit in a DM unanswered



Supporting Cross-Team Projects

From time to time, leadership will kick off projects that need someone to keep them organized and moving. You are not leading these projects or making the strategic decisions. You are the person making sure the pieces come together: tracking what is due, following up with people, flagging blockers, and keeping the project channel active.

Help set up project channels, timelines, and milestone trackers when leadership starts a new initiative

Follow up with tea
mbers on deliverables and deadlines they have committed to

Surface blockers early. If something is stuck, say so. Do not wait until the deadline passes

Help coordinate tool rollouts and new system setups as they come (for example: setting up a new pipeline in Pipedrive, configuring a new Notion workspace, onboarding a new vendor)

Working With AI Tools



We use AI daily and expect you to as well. This is not about being a technical AI expert. It is about being someone who reaches for Claude or ChatGPT before doing something manually when the tool can do it faster.

Use AI to draft SOPs, summarize meeting notes, clean up documentation, and build templates

Flag repetitive tasks in your own workflow that could be handled by AI or automation

Stay open to new AI tools as we roll them out and adapt your workflow accordingly

Help document processes clearly enough that an AI solution or automation could eventually take them over



You Might Be a Good Fit If You...

See a task and start working on it without being asked twice

Get tagged in a Slack channel and respond with work, not silence

Are comfortable juggling multiple tools and switching between platforms throughout the day

Write clearly. Your documentation should make sense to someone reading it for the first time

Already use AI tools daily and would feel weird working without them

Care about finishing things. A half-built SOP or an unanswered inbox is not acceptable to you

Can take a vague ask (“we need a better onboarding checklist”) and come back with a working first draft

Are okay with your role changing as the company grows and automates. You are not protective of tasks — you are protective of outcomes





Tools You Will Use - Required (moderate experience expected)

Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides)

Slack

Zoom

Go High Level (GHL)

Pipedrive

Jira

AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, or similar) — active daily use, not just awareness



ABOUT US:

We are a short-term rental company that helps people invest in Airbnbs that actually perform. We work with high-income professionals and W2 earners who want to invest in short-term rental properties for cash flow and tax savings. We find the property, underwrite it with proprietary data, and walk our clients through every step from acquisition to launch.



Interested in applying? Submit your application with a message that includes a short note (2–3 sentences) about

how you currently use AI tools in your work and a specific example that connects to this role

title: Marketing Manager

title: YouTube Video Editor
description:
Title: YouTube Video Editor — Finance Channel (Long-Term, Part-Time)



Description:



I run a YouTube channel about credit cards, travel rewards, and personal finance (Michael Martinez Finance). I'm looking for a reliable video editor for ongoing work — approximately 5–8 videos per month.



What you'll be editing:



Talking-head videos (me on camera) that need to be cut down from 20–40 minutes of raw footage into 7–15 minute final videos

Style: clean, professional, fast-paced. Think Ali Abdaal or Graham Stephan — not overly flashy, but not boring



What I need you to do:



Cut dead air, filler words, and bad takes

Add zoom cuts and flow to keep pacing tight

Add text overlays and various edits to hold the viewer's attention for key points, numbers, and card names

Add relevant B-roll (stock footage or screenshots I provide)

Color correct if needed

Export in 4K for YouTube upload



What I'll provide:

Raw footage (Google Drive link)

Brand Edit Guide

Links to my published videos so you can see the content style and pacing I'm going for

References of channels and the exact edit style I am looking for

A rough outline or script so you know the structure

Screenshots, graphics, or product images to use as B-roll

Feedback on each edit until we dial in the style



Requirements:



Experience editing YouTube talking-head content (send me 2–3 examples)

Bonus points if you have experience editing in the finance or credit card niche

Proficient in Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut

Can deliver a first draft within 24–48 hours

Responsive on chat 
,
, or WhatsApp)

Willing to do a paid test edit ($5-10) before we commit 

Budget: I would like to start with 2–3 paid videos at $15–20 per video. If we're a good fit, we would move to a $125 USD/month retainer for 5–8 videos per month.

title: Data Entry Assistant (LONG TERM WITH MONTHLY SALARY)
description:
We are looking to hire someone long term on monthly salary for our data entry role. 

The role is very simple, and only requires basic math skills and data entry skills.



*WE NEED CONSISTENT DAILY WORK MONDAY-FRIDAY ROUGHLY 2 HOURS PER DAY - NO EXCUSES OR DELAYED WORK ACCEPTED*



You will be provided a list of 50-100 properties/addresses every weekday. 

You will do a basic calculation on each property to determine what is called the "Debt-To-Value" (DTV) percent % 

You will take qualified properties (< 70% DTV) and use our tools to Skiptrace + Import the owner information into our CRM

(ALL TOOLS & INSTRUCTIONS PROVIDED)

MUST BE ORGANIZED AND ATTENTION TO DETAIL



Salary paid via Remitly

title: ZOHO Project Developer and CRM Administrator
description:
Role Description:

We are looking for a skilled Zoho Developer to join our team. This role combines coding expertise and administration responsibilities, ensuring seamless configuration, customization, and optimization of Zoho applications to support the company’s operational needs. The ideal candidate will work closely with the Finance Manager to develop custom solutions, integrate third-party systems, and manage day-to-day Zoho administration tasks.



Job Specification & Responsibilities:



Zoho Development & Customization:

- Develop, configure, and customize Zoho applications (e.g., Zoho CRM, Zoho Creator, Zoho Desk) according to business needs.

- Write and implement Deluge scripts to automate workflows and business processes.

- Create custom functions, modules, and API integrations to enhance Zoho functionality.



System Integration & API Management:

- Integrate Zoho applications with third-party software and internal systems.

- Manage API requests and maintain smooth communication between systems.



Zoho Administration:

- Monitor and maintain data integrity, system performance, backups, and security settings.

- Provide technical support and troubleshooting for Zoho applications and customizations.

?

Data Management & Reporting:

- Create and maintain custom reports, dashboards, and analytics to support business decision-making.

- Ensure data integrity by setting up data validation rules and workflows.



Training & Documentation:

- Train end-users on Zoho applications and custom solutions.

- Create and maintain technical documentation or training manual for developed solutions and system configurations.



Requirements:

- Strong experience with Zoho CRM, Zoho Creator, and other Zoho applications.

- Proficiency in Deluge scripting.

- Understanding of APIs, web services, and third-party integrations.

- Problem-solving skills and the ability to translate business needs into technical requirements.

- Good communication skills for client interactions and user training.

- Experience with additional Zoho applications (Zoho Projects, Zoho Books, etc.).

- Knowledge of databases, SQL, and cloud-based platforms.

- Familiarity with other programming languages, especially JavaScript (and others).

title: Freelance Print Designer
description:
Subcontractor (Per-Project Basis)



We're a print production company looking for a reliable freelance designer for ongoing per-project work during peak seasons. Jobs include large-scale outdoor print, cut substrates, paneled vinyl, flag and grand format designs.



What you'll be doing:

- Working within provided blank Photoshop/Illustrator template files. Proper sizing, scale, and file naming are already set, your job is to design within them. Following file name guidelines is a must!

- Working from supplied design briefs. Briefs are provided for all jobs, complexity varies.

- Using provided stock art when available.

- Delivering CMYK print-ready files and lower-res RGB proof JPGs per round.

- Managing revisions within a 24–48 hour turnaround per round.

- Communicating and tracking work through ClickUp and keeping a Google Drive folder up to date with proofs and final layered working files once complete.



You're a fit if you have:

- 3+ years Photoshop and Illustrator experience.

- Large format print experience preferred.

- Understanding of live, bleed, and finished areas.

- Strong CMYK and production file knowledge.

- Illustration or digital painting skills (big plus, paid add-on).

- Solid written English communication.



Logistics:

- NDA and work-for-hire agreement required before starting. All working files and derivatives remain property of the client and cannot be used or displayed elsewhere.



Pay per item:

  - Small items: $10

  - Large items: $15

  - Illustration/digital paint add-on: +$8 when painting or starting from scratch.

(Most tasks will have 2-5 items).



Each item requires 2–5 layout variations (logo placement, stock photo selection, layer effects, etc.) for internal review before client feedback. Further adjustments or mixing elements between variations may be requested. Variations are included in the per-item rate.



- Trial run on a paid test order before ongoing work.

- If things go well, potential for ongoing work throughout the season and beyond.



To apply:

Send a portfolio with print-specific, digital art, and photo manipulation samples and a short note about your experience.

title: Controller Role
description:
What This Job Is

A fully remote, senior finance leadership role for a profitable US-based food and wellness company. You are the sole finance person — no team, no manager above you in finance. You report directly to the COO and own everything related to money, tax, and accounting.



What the Company Does



-Delivers chef-designed, health-focused meals (gluten/dairy/sugar-free) to high-net-worth clients across California and nationally

-Has a commercial production kitchen, farm partnership, and logistics network

-Sells direct-to-consumer (D2C) via Shopify and ships nationally

-Growing into CPG products — cookies, pantry items, retail

-$26M revenue, 12%+ net profit margin — bootstrapped and stable





What You Will Own

-Tax — everything



File all federal, state, city and county corporate tax returns

Research and claim R&D credits, WOTC, donated food credits, energy credits

Handle all IRS correspondence and audits independently

Work toward or maintain Enrolled Agent credentials



-Accounting Operations — everything



Approve every single expense at the company

Own month-end close (target 3–5 days)

Prepare monthly P&L, balance sheet, cash flow statements

Reconcile Shopify, Stripe, and other merchant processors



-Manufacturing Accounting — complex



Track inventory for perishable/fresh food

Allocate COGS across culinary labor, delivery labor, food purchases, packaging

Manage shrinkage and waste tracking

Build production cost models by SKU and menu item



-Strategic Finance — forward looking



Build budgets, forecasts, and scenario models

Implement and upgrade QuickBooks, Xero, Bill.com, Dext

Segregate P&Ls for 3 business units with different economics

Build financial infrastructure that scales to $50M–$100M





-Who This Is For

Someone with 5–7 years of progressive US accounting experience who has been the sole finance lead at a company — not a support person, not someone who sends reports to a US controller for review. Someone who has built systems, filed tax returns, and made decisions independently.



-What Makes It Different From a Typical Controller Role



You are replacing all outsourced CPA/tax services — massive scope

Direct daily access to the COO in Las Vegas

Performance bonus up to $40K on top of $40K base = $80K maximum

Clear path to VP Finance as company scales

Intellectually complex — farm-to-table supply chain, perishable inventory, multi-state compliance, new CPG lines all at once





-Non-Negotiables



CPA or equivalent

US GAAP — not IFRS only

Minimum 4–5 hours overlap with Pacific Time (8am–12pm PT)

Fluent business English

Ownership mentality — "I built," "I decided," "I own" — not "we supported"

title: Procurement Specialist – Perishable DTC Food & CPG
description:
Procurement Specialist – Perishable DTC Food & CPG

Remote-Friendly | Pacific Time Overlap Required | Reports to: Chef of Staff – Ops & Supply Chain



About the Company

We are an 8-figure food-as-medicine company with our own production kitchen, courier network, and national shipping programs. We serve busy, ambitious customers who pay for food that actually improves how they feel.

A few things that make this a different environment:



Vertically integrated — in-house kitchen, logistics, and fulfillment, plus partners for farming and packaging. You see the full chain from vendor quote to a box at a customer's door.

Profitable and disciplined — no growth-at-all-costs mindset. Tight unit economics and operational excellence.

High bar, low drama — the team values clear thinking, data, accountability, and direct communication more than titles or politics.





About the Role

Your mission is to keep the right materials in the right places, at the right time and cost, with no preventable emergencies. You will manage weekly ordering and inventory for cold-chain and food packaging, support relationships with our warehouse and 3PL partners, and regularly re-benchmark the market so our pricing and specs improve over time.

This is a hands-on, spreadsheet-heavy role. There is no ERP. You will operate and improve a set of Google Sheets, trackers, and playbooks that need to be accurate, clean, and plug-and-play for backups.



What You Will Do



Maintain par levels and weeks-of-cover for packaging SKUs (liners, ice packs, corrugate, jars, lids, labels, inserts) across HQ and 3PL.

Place weekly and monthly POs on a clear cadence, with accurate lead times and delivery dates visible to ops and warehouse partners.

Track inbound shipments, reconcile actual receipts with POs and vendor packing lists, and resolve mismatches with vendors and the warehouse.

Coordinate with warehouse and 3PL partners on pallet counts, storage, photo/audit requests, and accessorial fees that impact true cost.

Keep an up-to-date packaging cost model showing cost per order and per box each week, and understand what is driving any changes.

Benchmark top-consuming SKUs at least twice per year, run simple RFQs, and build landed-cost comparisons to keep vendors honest.

Help manage blanket POs and pallet-based storage logic to avoid tying up cash in dead inventory.

Keep the procurement playbook and file catalog up to date so a new hire can learn the role from documentation and recordings, not from memory.

Send a short daily written update summarizing what was ordered, what arrived, any issues, and risks in the next 2–4 weeks.





This Role Is a Good Fit If You Are



2–4 years into your career in procurement, purchasing, or supply chain, ideally with exposure to packaging or perishable products.

Strong in Google Sheets or Excel and comfortable running operations without an ERP — MRP logic, PO logs, inventory trackers, simple cost models.

Calm, structured, and reliable under pressure. You like checklists, repeatable routines, and catching issues before others see them.

Direct and clear in writing — comfortable sending concise updates, asking pointed questions, and pushing for clarity with vendors and teammates.

Naturally curious about how small operational decisions roll up into COGS, shipping economics, and margin.





This Role Is Not a Fit If You Are



Looking for a stepping stone into marketing, product, or a purely strategic role. This is operational, detailed work.

Uncomfortable owning an outcome end-to-end, including raising uncomfortable topics early with leadership or vendors.

Sloppy with documentation, trackers, or follow-through. The system only works if the numbers are right and updated.





How We Work Together



Remote-friendly with at least a few hours of overlap with Pacific Time for live calls and vendor coordination.

You will work closely with the operations lead rebuilding procurement into a plug-and-play function with clear KPIs and playbooks.

Direct access to leadership when needed — what you see and recommend on packaging and vendors directly affects margin and capacity planning.





How to Apply

Send an
 that includes:



A brief story (5–10 sentences) about a time you either prevented a stockout or reduced material/packaging cost in a measurable way. Include the numbers.

A short description of a spreadsheet-based system you have owned (e.g. MRP, PO log, inventory tracker) — what it did, how it was structured, and how often you updated it.

Your CV, current location, typical working hours, and overlap with Pacific Time.

Must be ready to start immediately



If you’re available, experienced, and ready to perform, reply confirming your interest and send either a video recording of you closing calls or a video telling us about yourself and why you are the best fit for the role.

title: Qualified Quantity Surveyor  In Residential Construction
description:
Job Hiring: Qualified Quantity Surveyor  In Residential Construction 

Work From Home

Company (AU): Riverstone Builders

Website: 

Salary: to be discussed during the call





Riverstone Builders is seeking a Qualified Quantity Surveyor with strong experience in residential construction to support custom home building projects.

This role is ideal for someone who can confidently work from Archicad plans, engineering drawings, and residential construction documentation to prepare detailed takeoffs, manage schedules, and help improve project flow from pre-construction through delivery.



ABOUT THE ROLE: 



You will be responsible for preparing accurate takeoff quantities, developing and managing detailed construction schedules, and helping organize project information so it can be uploaded into internal systems. You will work closely with supervisors, construction managers, designers, procurement teams, and subcontractors to ensure smooth sequencing, realistic timelines, and strong visibility across multiple builds.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES: 



1. Create, update, and manage detailed construction schedules for custom home builds using platforms such as Buildertrend, MS Project, Asta, or Databuild



2.Review Archicad plans and engineering drawings to produce accurate takeoffs and scheduling inputs



3. Conduct complete takeoff quantities for:

-Concrete

-Steel

-Bricks

-Brick hardware

-Roof framing

-Plastering

-Ceilings

-Cabinet layouts

-Painting

-Timber or tile main flooring

-Tiling

-External concrete



4.Prepare detailed trade and material takeoffs for:

-Concrete slabs, footings, and suspended slabs

-Brickwork

-Timber or steel framing

-Roofing, including timber trusses, steel, tiles, and Colorbond

-Windows and doors, including custom sizes and lead times

-Cladding and external finishes

-Internal linings, plasterboard, feature walls, and ceilings

-Cabinetry and joinery, including kitchens, robes, and vanities

-Flooring, including timber, tiles, hybrid, and polished concrete

-Services, including electrical, plumbing, and HVAC rough-ins and fit-offs

-Finishes such as painting, fixtures, fittings, and hardware

-Landscaping and external works, including retaining, paving, and pools where applicable



5.Coordinate with site supervisors, project managers, designers, and procurement teams to confirm sequencing, lead times, and resource availability



6.Monitor progress across multiple residential projects and adjust schedules based on site conditions, delays, design changes, and client variations



7.Identify project risks such as weather impacts, material lead times, subcontractor availability, and design complexity, then recommend mitigation strategies



8.Liaise with subcontractors and suppliers to confirm program timing, availability, and completion targets



9.Prepare weekly progress reports and communicate schedule changes clearly to internal teams and clients



10.Support pre-construction planning by preparing baseline schedules and advising on realistic build durations



11.Help structure and upload estimating and scheduling information into the company’s internal computer systems



12.Ensure scheduling and planning practices align with WHS requirements, NCC standards, and company procedures



WHAT WERE LOOKING FOR: 



-Proven experience as a Quantity Surveyor, Estimator, Construction Scheduler, or similar in residential construction



-Strong ability to read and interpret Archicad plans, engineering drawings, and residential building documents



-Experience using software such as Truth Engine, Buildertrend, MS Project, Asta, and similar construction planning tools



-High attention to detail in quantity takeoffs, estimating support, and scheduling



-Strong understanding of residential construction sequencing from site prep through completion



-Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines at once



-Strong communication skills and confidence working with internal teams, subcontractors, and suppliers



-Experience preparing reports and maintaining organized project records



-A practical mindset with the ability to identify issues early and help solve them



TO BE CONSIDERED: 



Please send your resume to 
 along with a short introduction video covering your experience in:



-Working from Archicad plans and engineer drawings

-Using programs such as Truth Engine, Buildertrend, MS Project, and Asta

-Construction scheduling and material take-offs



Applicants are also welcome to share their screen and briefly walk through relevant past work or portfolio examples as part of their introduction video. Providing proof of experience in this way would be considered a strong advantage during the selection process.
